title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.

, Zapier, and n8n

 triggers)

Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

STRONG PLUS

WHY JOIN US?

- Long-term stability

HOW TO APPLY

title: Digital Operations & Marketing Specialist
description:
We are a Melbourne-based cabinetry and wardrobes business looking for a sharp, capable digital operator to help us improve our customer communication, marketing systems and automation.



This is a part-time remote role for someone who is strong technically, but who also has good judgment.



We do not want someone who just follows instructions literally. We want someone who can look at an
, form, workflow or page and tell whether it actually makes sense, feels polished, and would land properly with Australian customers.



What you’ll work on

This role will support a mix of digital marketing, CRM and automation work, including:

HubSpot workflow setup, cleanup and optimisation

Customer
 flows and automated communications

Improving the customer journey from enquiry through to installation

Helping create clearer customer sign-off and pre-install communication

Building or refining forms, landing pages and process automations

SEO support including service page improvements, metadata, internal links and content updates

Website content updates and formatting

CRM hygiene, list management and reporting support

Using AI tools well to draft, refine and improve work faster

Reviewing digital touchpoints and flagging things that feel unclear, clunky or off-brand



You should be:

very strong in written English

highly organised and detail-oriented

comfortable with HubSpot and digital tools

able to work independently

thoughtful about wording, presentation and customer experience

someone who cares whether the final output is genuinely good, not just technically complete

You do not need to be an expert in everything, but you do need to be capable, reliable and have strong attention to detail.



Important

We are an Australian customer-facing business, so tone matters. We want someone who can help make sure our
s, workflows, forms and website updates feel clear, polished and appropriate for our market.



This role is best suited to someone who enjoys making things better — not just finishing tasks.



Hours

Part-time. Flexible structure for the right person.



Pay

We are open to paying well for the right person. Please include your expected hourly or monthly rate in your application.



How to apply

Please do not send a generic application.



At the top of your application, write ALMARA.



Then include:



A short intro about you

Which digital tools you have used most

Examples of relevant work in HubSpot,
, SEO, websites or automation

One example of something you improved, not just completed

A short note on why presentation and judgment matter in customer-facing digital work



Please also answer this question:



What is the difference between something being technically correct and being done well?



We are looking for someone thoughtful, reliable and switched on who wants to do high-quality work for the long term.

title: Systems Analyst
description:
I’m looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Systems Analyst to support the day-to-day administration, maintenance, and development of our core business systems. These systems support property management, accounting, budgeting, and data management functions. This role will focus on providing systems support and training while also identifying opportunities to enhance and streamline business processes and workflows.



Primary Responsibilities:



- Address Yardi support tickets and inquiries through our IT ticketing system (GoGenuity)

- Organize, maintain, and troubleshoot core business applications, including application servers, hardware, endpoints, databases, and advanced technical issues

- Work closely with me and the management team to develop and improve processes, procedures, automations, and workflows across departments

- Research and test new software versions, plugins, and system customizations

- Support third-party integrations with Yardi platforms (e.g., budgeting tools, utility billback programs, resident screening providers)

- Assist in conducting systems training sessions through one-on-one sessions, group instruction, demonstrations, and workshops

- Complete systems-related tasks for onboarding and offboarding properties (acquisitions, transfers, or sales)

- Ensure databases comply with data governance policies, with a strong focus on protecting PII

- Modify and create reports using Yardi tools (SSRS, YSR, Custom Financial Analytics) to meet business needs

- Work with Yardi support to maintain the database and its modules supporting property management, accounting, compliance, and reporting

- Contribute to project planning, implementation of new systems or enhancements, and tracking of approved initiatives



Other Duties:



- Support me and the management team with additional tasks as needed

- Ensure compliance with company policies and applicable federal and local regulations

- Attend meetings and collaborate with tea
mbers to share best practices



Qualifications:



- Advanced knowledge of Yardi Voyager 7s, including its modules and backend functionality ** MUST HAVE

- 4–6 years of experience in information technology and systems analysis

- Strong foundational computer skills, including Outlook and Microsoft Office

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel

- Experience designing and building enterprise-level systems

- Strong background in large-scale data and integration projects

- Expertise in data integration, data modeling, data warehousing, business intelligence, SSIS, and cubes

- Experience with query tuning, scripting, and program tracing

- Familiarity with programming languages (e.g., JavaScript, Python) is a plus

- Strong analytical, technical, and problem-solving skills

- Excellent organizational and time management abilities

- Proven ability to translate business needs into effective system solutions

- Strong interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills

- Positive attitude with strong attention to detail and follow-through



Work Schedule:

- Full-time, 40 hours per week



Apply here:

title: GHL-certified GoHighLevel VA — CRM Setup & Admin Training
description:
Mr Neate Cleaning · Melbourne, Australia (remote role) · Project-based with strong long-term potential



This is a project-based role that transitions into ongoing support. You must have hands-on GoHighLevel experience — not just theoretical knowledge. If you have not actually built pipelines, workflows, and custom fields inside GHL, please do not apply.



About the business

Mr Neate Cleaning is a professional carpet cleaning company based in Melbourne, Australia. We use GoHighLevel as our CRM and central operations hub. Our tech stack includes GHL, Jobber, QuickBooks Online, and a WordPress website with an embedded GHL booking form.



We have an existing GHL sub-account that needs to be correctly rebuilt from the ground up — and a Philippines-based office admin (Kim) who needs to be properly trained on GHL before we go live on the new setup.



What you will be doing

This is a structured 6-phase project. A full brief will be provided. At a high level:



Phase 1 — Rebuild custom fields, pipeline, booking form, and contact tags in GHL (you work alone, no disruption to live system)

Phase 2 — Train Kim on GHL fundamentals across 6 structured modules. Identify and correct bad habits. Kim signs off each module before you proceed.

Phase 3 — Migrate contacts and opportunities to the new pipeline, update workflows, tidy old data, apply DND list, restrict Kim's access role

Phase 4 — Build 8 automations/workflows (enquiry handling, booking confirmation, reminders, review requests, anniversary follow-ups, invoice follow-ups)

Phase 5 — Write 10 SOPs with screenshots and Loom walkthroughs, written for Kim specifically

Phase 6 — Assist with Jobber ? GHL integration via GHL App Marketplace (no Zapier)



Requirements — must have all of these

GoHighLevel certification (please state which certification in your application)

Proven hands-on GHL experience: pipelines, custom fields, workflows, forms, contact management, invoicing

Experience training non-technical users on GHL — not just building, but explaining

Ability to write clear, simple SOPs with screenshots (Loom video experience a strong plus)

Strong written English — Kim will be learning from your documentation

Reliable internet, quiet working environment, availability for regular check-in calls with the business owner (AEST timezone)



Nice to have

Experience with Jobber or other field service management software

Familiarity with Australian GST (tax-inclusive pricing)

Experience with service-based businesses (trades, home services, cleaning)

Previous experience working directly with a business owner, not through an agency



What we offer

Full project brief provided upfront — you will know exactly what is expected before you start

Direct communication with the business owner throughout — no middlemen, no agency

Competitive rate based on experience — please state your expected hourly or project rate in your application

Strong potential for ongoing work beyond this project. This business is actively growing and the right person will have the opportunity to take on additional projects — including further GHL development, other tech stack work, and ongoing monthly system support. We are not looking for someone to do one job and disappear. If you do great work, there will be more of it.



How to apply

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Please send a message that includes:



- Your GHL certification(s) and how long you have been working in GHL

- A specific example of a GHL pipeline or workflow you built — describe what it did and any challenges you solved

- Have you trained someone else on GHL? If yes, briefly describe who and how.

- Your availability (hours per week, timezone) and your expected rate — please give a specific number, not a range, and do not ask what our budget is. Applications that say 'negotiable' or ask us to name a figure first will not be considered.

- Start your message with the words: "I have read the full job description" — this confirms you have read everything



Mr Neate Cleaning · Melbourne, Australia · ABN
· Remote role for Philippines-based applicants

title: Interior Finisher
description:
Start ASAP. Work abroad. Works towards making the inside of a building look good, through their carpentry work.       

Interior finishers build, install and repair interior wall paneling, trim and crown moldings for single and multi-family 

homes, and commercial buildings.  

• Attention to detail  

• Sound judgement and estimating ability  

• Strong math skills  

• Use of precision tools  

• Cutting and shaping materials and joining them with 

nails, screws, bolts or glue  

• Developing work plans  

• Look through blueprints and drawings to determine 

requirements for interior finishing work 

• Selecting, measuring and marking materials for 

interior paneling, trim or moldings  

• Reading and interpreting blueprints  

• Assist in installing wood and plastic paneling on 

walls and doors, while maintaining an aesthetic 

look of the surface responsible for installing, repairing, and maintaining interior surfaces such as drywall, plaster, and trim to ensure a polished and professional finish. This role requires precise measurements, cutting, fitting, and finishing techniques to achieve smooth, durable results that meet design specifications. Expertise in reading blueprints and working with various materials is essential for delivering high-quality interior finishes in residential and commercial construction projects.



Role:

Specializes in the final touches that complete a building's interior. This role involves installing finished surfaces, including drywall, trim, molding, and cabinetry with precision and skill.



You ensure that floors, walls, and ceilings are prepared and polished according to design specifications. Enhancing both the aesthetic appeal and functionality of interior spaces.



Key Responsibilities, crucial role in completing the aesthetic and functional aspects of interior spaces. Your responsibilities involve applying finishes that enhance the visual appeal and durability of walls, ceilings, and floors.



Surface Preparation - Prepare walls, ceilings, and floors by sanding, cleaning, and repairing to ensure smooth and even surfaces before finishing.



Application of Finishes - Apply paint, wallpaper, plaster, or other decorative finishes with precision and attention to detail.



Material Handling - Measure, cut, and install molding, trim, and other interior detailing components efficiently and accurately.

Essential Skills for Interior Finishers



What are the essential skills for an interior finisher to excel in construction projects?



Must have a keen eye for detail to ensure smooth and flawless surfaces. Proficiency in reading blueprints and technical drawings is crucial to accurately follow design specifications.



Tools and Materials: 

Use a variety of specialized tools such as trowels, putty knives, and sanding blocks to achieve smooth and precise surfaces. Common materials include drywall, plaster, joint compound, and various types of molding and trim to create a polished final look. These tools and materials ensure high-quality finishes in residential and commercial construction projects.



Safety Practices and Regulations:

Must strictly adhere to safety practices and regulations to prevent a
 and ensure a secure work environment. Proper use of personal protective equipment (PPE), safe handling of tools, and compliance with OSHA standards are critical components. Your commitment to following these guidelines protects both workers and clients throughout the interior finishing process.



Typical Work Environment: 

Work in a variety of construction sites, often indoors where they apply final touches to buildings. Your work environment involves detailed, hands-on tasks that require precision and care.



Indoor Construction Sites: 

Operate inside residential, commercial, or industrial buildings during the final stages of construction.



Variable Work Conditions: 

Work environments can range from newly built, unfinished spaces to existing structures undergoing renovation.

Use of Specialized Tools -frequently use hand and power tools, which require careful handling in confined or dust-prone settings.



Required Qualifications and Certifications:

Completing construction projects by installing drywall, trim, and other finishing materials with precision. Required qualifications include a high school diploma or equivalent and hands-on experience in carpentry or related fields.



Certifications such as OSHA 10 or 30-hour safety training and a finish carpentry certification enhance your employability and ensure compliance with industry standards. Additional credentials like a lead paint certification may be required in older buildings to guarantee safety and quality.

title: Senior AI Automation Engineer (Agents & Workflow Systems)
description:
About Us



TA Project Services is an Australian-based consultancy delivering civil engineering, town planning, project management, and surveying services.



We are building a systemised, AI-enabled delivery model to improve efficiency, consistency, and scalability across our business.



This is a hands-on opportunity to help design and build real-world AI systems that will be used daily by our team.



The Role



We are looking for a high-level AI Automation Engineer to:



Design and build AI-driven workflows

Develop agent-style systems using APIs

Integrate AI into real business processes



This is a builder role.



If your experience is limited to prompting ChatGPT, this role is not suitable.



First Project



You will take an existing GPT-based assistant and:



Convert it into a structured, repeatable workflow

Integrate it into:

Asana (task workflows + internal communication)

OneDrive (document outputs)

Microsoft Word (structured documents)



What You Must Be Able To Do

Design workflows (not just write prompts)

Build multi-step AI systems using APIs

Structure inputs ? processing ? outputs

Handle real-world constraints (errors, edge cases, messy data)

Explain your system clearly



Required Skills (Non-Negotiable)

Strong experience with:

OpenAI API (or equivalent LLM APIs)

Python OR JavaScript / TypeScript

API integrations

Proven ability to build:

AI workflows or agent-style systems

Automation that is actually used (not just demos)



Bonus (But Valuable)

Experience with:

Workflow tools (Make, Zapier, n8n, etc.)

Document automation

SaaS integrations

What We Are NOT Looking For

Virtual assistants using ChatGPT

Prompt-only “AI specialists”

People without real build experience



What Success Looks Like

A working workflow used by our team

Clear, structured outputs

Reduced manual work

Systems that are maintainable and scalable



Application Requirements 



To apply, you MUST include:



1. Real Example (Required)



Describe one system you have built:



What it does

How it works end-to-end

Tools and architecture used



Be specific. Generic answers will be rejected.



2. Workflow Thinking (Required)



Answer this:



You are given a project brief and need to produce a structured, repeatable document output using AI.

How would you design the system?



We are looking for:



steps

structure

logic

not tools alone



3. Proof of Capability



Include at least one of:



GitHub

Code sample

Loom walkthrough

Screenshots of systems you’ve built



4. Attention Check



Include the word:

“BUILDER” in your subject line.

We're a small but growing operation and we take care of people who take care of us. If you're passionate about design and want consistent work, let's talk.

title: Sales Closer (Warm Leads – No Cold Calling)
description:
Join Our Team as a Sales Closer



Are you a high-energy sales professional who thrives on closing deals? We’re looking for a motivated Sales Closer to join our team and convert warm, inbound leads into customers—no cold calling required.



How to Apply

Send us a 1-minute audio or video introduction sharing who you are and your relevant sales experience.

What We’re Looking For

Fluent in spoken and written English

Strong closing skills and confidence on calls

Consistent, reliable, and results-driven

Stable internet connection

Team player with a positive attitude



Available to work Monday–Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (EST) with a 1-hour break



What You’ll Get

$1,000/month base salary + commission based on performance ($500–$3,000)

Paid sick leave and vacation leave

Payments twice per month (1st and 16th)

100% remote work environment

Annual tea
etups in the Philippines

A supportive, growth-focused company culture



Why This Role Is Different

We offer a non-toxic, respectful work environment where performance is rewarded and growth is encouraged. You’ll be working with warm leads, selling high-ticket items (shipping containers), and earning strong incentives based on your results.



This role is perfect for someone who is:

Competitive and driven to exceed targets

Energetic and engaging on calls throughout the day

Hungry for commissions and growth



Important

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. This is not a temporary position or a side job. If you're looking for short-term work or plan to juggle multiple jobs, this role is not the right fit.

title: Shopify Store Builder (Multi-Channel Inventory System – Books / Amazon Integration
description:
We are looking for a high-level Shopify builder to create a store designed to handle large-scale, single-quantity inventory synced across multiple marketplaces.



This is NOT a basic Shopify design role.



You will be building the foundation for a system that connects Amazon, eBay, and other marketplaces where each product has a quantity of 1 and must remain perfectly synced to avoid overselling.



---



**Scope of Work**



* Build a clean, high-converting Shopify storefront (theme selection + customization)

* Structure product pages for large catalog ingestion (thousands of SKUs)

* Import and organize existing Amazon inventory into Shopify

* Implement a system for ongoing product uploads

* Integrate Shopify with multi-channel inventory software (ex: Monsoon, Sellbrite, or similar)

* Ensure inventory syncing logic is properly configured (1 sale = removed everywhere)

* Set up collections, navigation, and search for large book catalog

* Optimize site speed and performance under large SKU load

* Ensure mobile-first usability



---



**Key Objective**



Build a system that can handle continuous daily inventory uploads and maintain accurate stock levels across all platforms.



If the system breaks, we lose money.

Accuracy > design.



---



**Requirements**



* Proven experience building Shopify stores with large product catalogs (1,000+ SKUs)

* Experience integrating Shopify with Amazon and/or multi-channel inventory systems

* Strong understanding of SKU structure and inventory syncing logic

* Experience with bulk product imports (CSV or API-based)

* Ability to think in systems, not just design

* Strong attention to detail (inventory errors are unacceptable)



---



**Preferred (Not Required but Valuable)**



* Experience with books / media inventory

* Familiarity with AbeBooks or similar marketplaces

* Experience with tools like Monsoon, Sellbrite, or LitCommerce

* Understanding of Amazon Seller Central workflows



---



**Timeline**



* Initial build: 2–3 weeks

* Potential for ongoing work based on performance



---



**To Apply**



Include the following:



1. Links to Shopify stores you’ve built (must include large catalogs)

2. Brief explanation of how you would structure inventory syncing across multiple platforms

3. What systems/tools you’ve used for multi-channel inventory management

4. Your approach to preventing overselling with single-quantity products



Applications without this information will not be considered.



---



We are not looking for someone to “try this out.”

We are looking for someone who has done this before and can execute without supervision.

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.

title: Elementor WordPress Developer (Long-Term | CRO Focus)
description:
We are looking for a skilled Elementor WordPress developer to join our team for a long-term collaboration.



You will work on both rebuilding existing custom-coded websites into Elementor, as well as building completely new websites from scratch. The goal is not just to recreate designs, but to improve websites from a conversion and user experience perspective.



You will be our first international tea
mber, and we want to build a strong, long-term relationship where we grow together.



What you will do



You will be responsible for:



Rebuilding websites from custom code into WordPress (Elementor)

Building new websites from Figma designs or concepts

Translating designs into clean, scalable Elementor structures

Improving UX and conversion rates during builds

Setting up reusable sections, templates, and global styles

Helping us standardize our processes over time



We are also planning to build a Skool community to document and improve our workflows, and we would love your input in this.



What we are looking for



Strong experience with WordPress and Elementor

Experience with ACF (Advanced Custom Fields) is required

Ability to work with Figma designs is a big plus, and it would be great if you can also create or adjust designs yourself

Good understanding of UX, structure, and conversion optimization

Strong attention to detail and consistency

Good English communication

Reliable and proactive



How we work



We work with Slack for communication and believe in clear, structured workflows.



We care a lot about clean and consistent builds. This means:



Consistent spacing across the entire website

Proper use of padding and margins

Reusable elements and scalable structure

No messy or random layouts



We want to build websites that are easy to maintain and improve over time.



What we want to avoid



We are specifically looking for someone who avoids:



Inconsistent spacing and messy padding

No clear structure in Elementor

Slow or poorly optimized websites

Bad mobile responsiveness

Copy-paste work without thinking



Application instructions (important)



To apply, please include:



Your portfolio with Elementor websites

A short Loom or video where you:

Show the backend of a website you built in Elementor

Explain how you structure sections, spacing, and styles

A short explanation of how you approach building a clean and consistent website



What we offer



Long-term collaboration

Flexible working hours

Opportunity to grow together as a team

Involvement in improving processes and workflows

title: Tech VA — GoHighLevel, Funnel Design & Media Production
description:
About Us

We’re a business coaching company helping personal trainers, nutritionists, and health coaches build profitable online businesses using paid ads and funnel systems. We need a sharp, self-starting tech VA who can own our tech stack and production pipeline without being told what to do next.



The Role

You’ll be the go-to person for building and maintaining funnels, automations, and content production — both for our brand and for our coaching clients. This starts as a part-time role with a clear path to full-time, if you're the right fit. My last assistant was with my for 8 years.

 

You’re welcome to have other clients — we just expect honest time tracking and full transparency, and willing to move to full time and release other clients when working with us. You bill for hours worked, period,



What You’ll Do

GoHighLevel (Primary — ~60% of time)

Build and design funnels, landing pages, sales pages, and thank-you pages in GHL — for us AND our coaching clients

Set up and manage GHL automations/workflows 
 sequences, SMS, triggers, tagging, pipeline management)

Maintain and troubleshoot our GHL accounts

Implement webinar registration flows, order forms, and checkout pages

Clone and customize funnel templates across client accounts



Design (~15% of time)

Create clean, on-brand page designs that don’t look like default templates for me and our clients.

Design social media graphics, thumbnails, and visual assets using Canva or similar tools

Maintain brand consistency across everything you touch (we have a brand guide you’ll follow)



Podcast & YouTube Production (~25% of time)

Edit podcast audio (remove filler, clean up, level audio, add intro/outro) You'll use descript

Upload and optimize YouTube videos (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails, end screens)

Manage the publishing workflow across podcast platforms

Create episode graphics and promotional assets



You MUST Have

Proven GoHighLevel experience (funnels, automations, workflows) — screenshots or portfolio required (If you've never working with GHL before that's fine, but you need to have funnel experience)

Strong design eye — show us pages you’ve built that actually look good

Audio/video editing experience (Descript, CapCut, PremirePro or similar)

Canva proficiency

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for audio work

Fluent written English

Self-starter mentality — you take initiative, not just instructions



Bonus Points For

Experience with Claude Code or AI-assisted development tools

Familiarity with Kajabi, ConvertKit, or Teachable

Experience supporting a coaching or course-based business

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager (even basic)

WordPress or basic HTML/CSS knowledge

Experience with Descript, PremirePro, Capcut



Schedule & Compensation

Part-time to start (15–20 hours/week) with a clear path to full-time

$5–$10 USD/hour depending on experience and skill level



You’re welcome to have other clients during part-time phase — we just require honest, transparent time tracking

Flexible hours, with some overlap in Eastern Time for login approvals

Long-term position — we want someone who grows with us and is willing to go exclusive when the role moves to full-time



How to Apply

Send us:

Send an
 to 
 and show your portfolio and ONE GoHighLevel funnel or page you’ve built that you’re proud of

A link to your portfolio or screenshots of GHL work

One example of audio or video editing you’ve done

Your hourly rate expectation



This Role is NOT a Fit If…

You bill for hours you’re not actively working

You need to be micromanaged to stay productive

title: Senior Photoshop & Quality Control VA (Real Estate Media)
description:
Agentary is a premium real-estate media company. You’ll be our last line of defense on quality: receive photos/video exports from editors, perform expert Photoshop touch-ups, add boundary lines, run a tight QC checklist, and deliver assets to clients on time with zero rework.



What you’ll do



Final-polish real-estate photos (sky swaps, object removal).



Apply boundary lines, straighten & crop, and prepare web/MLS/social variants.



Run a strict QC pass on photos & short-form video covers/thumbnails; flag fixes.



Package and deliver to clients (Drive/Dropbox/MLS portals), naming + metadata correct.



Maintain a same-day turnaround SLA; update our Notion/Trello boards and SOP checklists.



Join daily Zoom stand-up; collaborate with editors and the Ops Admin.



Must-haves



- Advanced Adobe Photoshop (real-estate retouching portfolio required).



- Speed + accuracy: you can complete 40–60 images/day with consistent quality.



- Working English (clear written updates, can speak on Zoom).



- Reliable PC + fast internet (back-up connection preferred).



- Coachable, checklist-driven, obsessed with details.



Nice-to-haves



- Lightroom, Topaz, boundary-line tools, 



- Experience with real-estate media workflows 



Schedule



Core collaboration window: 5:00 a.m. – 1:00 p.m. PHT (aligns with 9:00 a.m. NZT).

If you prefer earlier to match 7:00 a.m. NZT, alternate is 3:00 a.m. – 11:00 a.m. PHT.

title: Digital Marketing VA — Google & Meta Ads | Social Media | Healthcare Clinic (Australia)
description:
We're a healthcare clinic in Northern NSW, Australia providing dental prosthetic services directly to patients — no middlemen, end-to-end care. We're a small, growing team and we're building the systems to scale. You'll be working directly with the business owner, not a manager in a chain.



The Role



We're looking for an experienced Digital Marketing VA to own our paid advertising, social media, and reporting. This isn't a "post and pray" role — we want someone who genuinely understands performance marketing and can bring ideas, not just execute tasks.

You'll work approximately 4–5 hours per day, long-term.





What You'll Do



Manage and optimise Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns (we have live campaigns — you'd be taking ownership)

Plan and schedule social media content across platforms

Update and maintain our website (static HTML — no CMS, basic HTML comfort is a plus)

Build and maintain weekly/monthly performance reports

Bring proactive suggestions — if you see an opportunity or a problem, say so



You're a Great Fit If...



You have 2+ years of hands-on Google Ads and Meta Ads experience (not just boosting posts)

You can read campaign data and make decisions from it

You've worked with healthcare, allied health, or service-based businesses before (a plus, not required)

You're honest about what you know and what you don't

You want a long-term role where your work actually matters



To Apply, Please Include:



A brief summary of a campaign you managed — what the goal was, what you did, what the result was

Your experience level with Google Ads and Meta Ads (be specific — campaigns managed, budgets handled)

Your hourly or monthly rate



Applicants who do not include the above will not be considered.

title: Social Media Growth Manager + Sales & CRM Operator (Organic Marketing – Beauty Brand)
description:
VOdS Luxe Beauty is a growing beauty and wellness brand focused on skincare, anti-aging, and confidence for women 40+. We are building a strong online presence and are looking for a highly driven, execution-focused tea
mber to take FULL ownership of our organic social media growth, engagement, and lead conversion process.



This role is responsible for generating visibility, building relationships, and turning conversations into customers and potential partners.



This is NOT a basic posting role. This is a performance-based role focused on results.



???? Core Responsibilities

Social Media Growth (Daily Execution)

Post 10–15 short-form videos daily across TikTok, Instagram,
, and YouTube Shorts

Repurpose content across all platforms

Post consistently inside
 groups (5–10 posts daily)

Stay on top of trends and adapt content quickly

Maintain consistent daily posting without supervision

Engagement & Relationship Building

Comment on 50–100 targeted posts daily to increase visibility

Send and respond to 30–50 direct messages daily

Build genuine relationships with followers

Start conversations from comments, stories, and posts

Drive engagement through natural, friendly communication

Sales & Conversion

Identify potential customers and recommend products based on their needs

Guide conversations toward a sale in a natural, non-pushy way

Follow up with leads consistently

Support purchasing decisions and next steps

Recruitment & Affiliate Outreach (Light Focus)

CRM Management



Experience with GoHighLevel is required



Input and manage leads daily

Update pipeline stages (New Lead, Contacted, Engaged, Customer)

Tag leads by platform source (TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube)

Track conversations and follow-ups

Keep CRM organized and accurate

Reporting & Performance Tracking



Track and report DAILY:



Number of posts

Number of comments

Number of DMs started

Number of leads generated

Conversions (when applicable)



Provide weekly insights on performance and improvements.



???? Daily Output Expectations (Non-Negotiable)

10–15 videos posted

50–100 comments

30–50 DMs

5–
 group posts

CRM updated daily



???? Role Clarity (Important)



This role focuses on DRIVING TRAFFIC, STARTING CONVERSATIONS, and GENERATING LEADS.



You will:



Create and post content

Engage and communicate with potential customers

Drive leads into the system



You will NOT be responsible for:



Building websites

???? Compensation

Performance-based raise after 30 days to $5.50–$6/hour

Additional raise at 90 days to $6–$7/hour based on performance and results



Raises are based on:



Consistency in daily output

Engagement and communication quality

Lead generation and conversion support

CRM accuracy

Reliability and professionalism



Performance Bonuses Available:



Weekly bonuses for hitting content and engagement targets

Bonuses for lead generation and conversions

???? Requirements

Experience managing or growing social media accounts (TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube)

Experience using GoHighLevel (CRM, pipelines, tagging)

Strong written English communication

Comfortable initiating conversations and selling via DM

Fast execution (speed over perfection)

Organized and self-managed

???? Key Traits

Proactive and takes initiative

Consistent and disciplined

Strong communicator

Results-driven mindset

Positive and professional

???? Growth Opportunity



This is a long-term opportunity.



As the brand grows, you will have the opportunity to:



Increase your hourly rate based on performance

Take on a leadership role managing future tea
mbers

Help scale a fast-growing beauty brand

???? How to Apply



Please send:



Examples of social media accounts you have managed or grown

Your experience using GoHighLevel

3–5 content ideas for a beauty brand targeting women 40+

A short explanation of how you would handle daily posting, engagement, and DMs

???? Important



This role requires high daily activity and consistent performance.



If you are not comfortable with fast-paced work, high output expectations, and taking ownership of results, this is not the right position.



We are looking for someone who is ready to execute, grow, and win with us.

title: TIK TOK GROWTH MARKETER (DTC E-COMMERCE)
description:
We're looking for a TikTok-first performance marketer who knows exactly how to turn paid spend into consistent, scalable sales. TikTok is your primary platform and where you'll spend most of your time. Meta is your second lever. 



TikTok — Primary Focus

• Own and lead the full paid strategy on TikTok for e-commerce clients

• Plan, execute, and optimize Standard Ads and GMV Max campaigns with a ROAS and revenue mindset

• Build and manage TikTok Affiliate programs; recruit creators, structure commissions, and drive GMV

• Leverage Spark Ads to amplify top-performing affiliate and creator content

• Build and segment cold, remarketing, and lookalike audiences optimized for conversion and scale

• Run structured A/B tests across creatives, audiences, and copy to identify winners and scale fast

• Analyze TikTok Ads Manager performance  and make data-driven decisions

• Stay current on TikTok Shop updates, GMV Max changes, and algorithm shifts that impact performance



Meta — Secondary Support

• Plan and execute Meta campaigns 
 & Instagram) aligned with the TikTok funnel strategy

• Monitor performance, optimize for ROAS and CAC, and ensure both platforms work as a cohesive growth engine



IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS

• This is a remote full-time contractor position

• Must be available during US working hours (9am-5pm)

• Great written and verbal English is a must

• Proven experience in TikTok and Meta. Previous experience driving success is a must.

title: Online English Teacher for Nurse
description:
Hello,

Each class is 25 minutes long, and we are currently recruiting online instructors with a nursing background.

ELS or TEFL certification preferred

Prior teaching experience is preferred

WhatsApp ID



Thank you.

title: AI Marketing Automation Specialist (GHL / HubSpot / AI Agents)
description:
About Digilari Media



Digilari Media is a Brisbane-based digital marketing agency delivering SEO, paid media, marketing automation, and AI-powered growth strategies for clients across Australia and internationally. We are scaling our remote team and have multiple openings for specialists who can design, build, and deploy repeatable AI-driven sales and marketing systems at scale.



If you are a genuine power user of GoHighLevel (GHL) and/or HubSpot, and you are actively building with AI automation tools, we want to hear from you.



ROLES AVAILABLE



We are hiring across several specialisations. Apply even if you only cover one or two areas:



1. GHL & or  HubSpot Automation Builder

Build repeatable lead management pipelines, nurture sequences, CRM workflows, and smart automation inside GoHighLevel and or HubSpot.



2. Conversational AI & Chatbot Specialist

Design and deploy AI chatbots and conversational flows for lead capture, qualification, appointment booking, and customer support across web, SMS, and social.



3. AI Social Media Agent Operator

Configure and manage AI agents that handle content scheduling, social engagement, and audience management.



4. AI Agentic Workflow Builder

Build multi-step autonomous agents across agentic platforms to automate sales, research, and marketing tasks end-to-end.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Working closely with the Australian team, you will:



- Build and maintain scalable marketing automation packages inside GHL and or HubSpot, including pipelines, triggers, tags, and smart lists that can be deployed to new clients fast

- Design and deploy conversational AI chatbots for lead qualification, appointment booking, and sales support

- Configure AI social media management agents to automate content, engagement, and reporting

- Integrate CRM platforms, landing pages, calendars, and third-party tools into seamless automated funnels

- Build and iterate on AI agentic workflows using platforms such as Claude/Anthropic API, n8n, Make, and similar tools

- Document all builds as repeatable SOPs so the team can deploy them independently

- Actively test new AI tools and bring recommendations back to the team



CORE TECH STACK: STRONG KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED



- GoHighLevel (GHL)

- HubSpot

- Conversational AI / chatbot platforms

- n8n / Make (Integromat)

- AI social media management agents

- Zapier / API integrations



AGENTIC AI PLATFORMS: ONE OR MORE PREFERRED



- Anthropic / Claude API

- OpenAI Agents / GPT-4 API

- LangChain / LangGraph

- CrewAI

- Relevance AI

- AgentGPT / AutoGPT or similar



BONUS: VIBE CODING PLATFORMS



Candidates who can work in vibe coding / no-code dev platforms will be fast-tracked:

- Replit

- Lovable

- Base44

- Bolt.new

- Similar rapid prototyping platforms



WHO YOU ARE



- GHL and or  HubSpot are platforms you can teach, not just use

- You think in systems, you build things once so they run forever

- You are genuinely excited about agentic AI and you test new tools proactively

- You communicate clearly in written English, and documentation comes naturally

- You are a self-starter who can manage your own schedule in a remote team

- You have real examples of automation builds, chatbot deployments, or agentic workflows you can show us



CONDITIONS



- Full-time role (40 hours per week), working remotely from your home country

- Overlap with Australian Eastern Time (AEST) preferred

- Competitive salary based on skills and experience

- Long-term position, we are building a team, not filling a contract

- Multiple positions available across different specialisations



HOW TO APPLY



Please include a cover letter in your application with the subject line:

"AI Automation Specialist - [your primary skill]"



Please include:

- A short cover note explaining your background (no templates please)

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A portfolio, GitHub, or examples of automation builds you have created

- A Loom video (2–5 minutes) walking us through a build or workflow you are proud of



Applications without examples of real work will not be progressed.

title: STR Operations & Marketing VA
description:
The Casa Collective is hiring someone who understands how short-term rentals actually operate, including guest experience, listing performance, and how daily decisions impact bookings, reviews, and revenue.



Your role is not just to manage tasks. Your role is to help keep properties booked, optimized, and running smoothly.

If you do not have direct STR or Airbnb experience, this role is not the right fit.

This is not an entry-level VA role.



About The Casa Collective

The Casa Collective is a design-forward short-term rental brand focused on creating unique, experience-driven stays.

Our properties are designed for:

Getaways

Girls trips

Couples retreats

Small events and micro-weddings



We focus on:

Strong branding

High-performing listings

Standout guest experiences

We do not just manage properties. We build experiences that people book and share.



About the Role

This role blends:

STR operations

Guest communication

Listing optimization

Demand awareness

Marketing execution



You will work directly with the owner and be expected to take ownership, think proactively, and identify opportunities for improvement.



What You’ll Own

STR Operations & Guest Experience

Manage guest communication across Airbnb and booking platforms

Ensure fast, professional, and consistent responses

Handle guest issues, complaints, and resolution professionally

Navigate cancellations, refunds, and platform policies

Coordinate cleaners, maintenance, and vendors

Ensure smooth turnovers, check-ins, and stays



Listing Management & Optimization

Maintain and update listings across all platforms

Optimize titles, descriptions, photo order, and amenities

Monitor listing performance and identify improvements

Apply STR SEO and platform ranking best practices

Ensure listings stay competitive and aligned with seasonality



Demand & Market Awareness

Research local events, tourism trends, and seasonal demand

Identify high-demand dates and booking opportunities

Flag pricing, availability, and minimum stay opportunities

Support positioning properties for peak seasons, events, and group stays



New Listing Setup

Assist with launching new properties from start to finish

Build and optimize listings for visibility and conversion

Apply proven STR setup strategies



Light Bookkeeping & Tracking

Track rental income and expenses in spreadsheets

Maintain organized financial records

Support reporting and internal tracking



Marketing 

Social media posting and scheduling

Support content organization and repurposing

Maintain consistency across platforms

Support seasonal campaigns and promotions



Platform Experience (Preferred)

Experience with one or more of the following:

Airbnb | VRBO or 

Google Vacation Rentals

Property management systems such as Hostex, Hostaway, Hospitable

Happy Guest (not required but would need to learn)

HostCo (not required but would need to learn)



What Success Looks Like

Guest communication is fast, professional, and consistent

Listings remain optimized and competitive

No operational details are missed

Properties stay well booked and performing

Guest issues are handled smoothly and confidently

Opportunities for improvement are proactively identified

You help turn operations into a reliable, revenue-generating system.



Requirements

STR Experience

Proven experience working with short-term rentals or Airbnb

Understanding of guest lifecycle, reviews, and booking flow

Familiarity with listing optimization and performance



Operations & Organization

Highly detail-oriented and organized

Able to manage multiple properties and workflows

Strong follow-through and accountability



Communication

Strong written English

Professional and friendly tone

Comfortable handling guest issues independently



Performance Awareness

Understands how pricing, demand, and visibility impact bookings

Able to identify problems and suggest improvements

Thinks beyond tasks and understands outcomes



Tools & Systems

Airbnb, OTAs and STR platforms

Google Workspace

Spreadsheets


 or similar CRM preferred

Social media platforms



Compensation

Month 1 (Training Traill)

$5 to $7 per hour

25 to 30 hours per week



After 30 Days

$800 to $1,000 per month

Full-time at 40 hours per week



 **To Apply - READ below and submit ALL of the following: using this link 



Resume with STR or hospitality experience

Examples of listings or properties you have worked on

Platforms you have used such as Airbnb or VRBO



Interview process:

1) Fill out form

2) Send on pre-interview questions

3) Send us message letting us know you applied and items are complete 

4) Set up Zoom interview 



Pre-interview Questions in a video:

If a listing is not getting bookings, what steps would you take to improve it?

How do you research local demand or events that impact bookings?

Have you helped launch or optimize a listing? Explain your process

How would you prioritize guest messages, a maintenance issue, and updating a listing?



Final Note

This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow beyond basic VA work and become a key part of operations.

If you understand how to manage properties while improving performance and guest experience, we want to hear from you.

title: Social Media Marketer / Content Creator
description:
We are a fast-growing service dog & dog training company looking for a social media marketer who knows how to generate REAL LEADS (messages & booked calls), not just views or likes.



If your focus is only making videos look good, this is NOT the role.

We are looking for someone who understands how content turns into paying clients.



YOUR MAIN JOB

Take raw dog training content and turn it into posts that:

- Get people to message us

- Build trust with potential clients

- Help convert viewers into booked calls



RESPONSIBILITIES

- Create and post 1–3 pieces of content daily (Reels, Stories, Posts)

- Edit short-form videos (CapCut or similar)

- Write captions with strong call-to-actions

- Turn training clips into engaging, lead-focused content

- Repurpose content across Instagram &

- Test different hooks, angles, and styles to improve results



WHAT WE CARE ABOUT (READ THIS)



We do NOT care about:

- Views

- Likes

- Followers



We ONLY care about:

- Messages

- Leads

- Booked calls



If you don’t understand how content drives leads, this role is not for you.



REQUIREMENTS

- Experience with Instagram/Facebook content

- Basic video editing skills (CapCut or similar)

- Canva or similar tools

- Understanding of:

      - Hooks (first 3 seconds)

      - Engagement

      - Call-to-actions

- Ability to post consistently every day

? BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)

- Experience in dog/pet niche

- Experience with lead generation content

- Understanding of short-form trends



PAY

Hourly (based on experience) ($3.15/hr - $6.50/hr)



Performance bonuses:

- 10 booked calls from content = +$50

- 25 booked calls = +$150



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)

- Include the word "DOG" when you message or apply through OnlineJobs.

- Fill out this application form: 



Only applicants who complete the form will be reviewed, even if you reached out on OnlineJobs.



FINAL NOTE



We are looking for someone who:

- Thinks like a marketer, not just an editor

- Understands how to make people take action

- Can work consistently without constant supervision



If that’s you, apply. I am excited to meet you.

title: Web Developer / SEO / AI & Marketing Systems
description: We’re hiring a high-level Web Developer / SEO / AI & Marketing Systems Architect who can design, build, scale, optimize, and troubleshoot modern digital platforms end-to-end; this role requires deep expertise in frontend and backend web development, scalable architecture, performance optimization, and security, along with advanced technical SEO (site structure, schema, Core Web Vitals, speed), marketing technology (analytics, tracking, CRO, automation, CRM integrations), and AI integration (LLM APIs, chatbots, workflow automation, internal tools, personalization); you’ll be responsible for developing and maintaining all web and AI assets, structuring clean and scalable systems, integrating APIs, optimizing UX and conversions, solving complex technical issues, and continuously improving rankings, speed, and reliability—ideal candidates have 5+ years of real-world experience, strong knowledge of modern frameworks and cloud infrastructure, a systems-level mindset, and the ability to execute independently while delivering production-ready, business-driven results fast.

title: Senior AI Agent Engineer (LLM Systems & Autonomous Agents)
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced AI engineer specializing in the design, development, and deployment of LLM-based agents and autonomous AI systems.

This role is not focused on web development, SEO, UI, or general software engineering. It is a deeply technical position for engineers whose core expertise is AI agents, reasoning systems, and large language model orchestration.



Role Overview

You will design and build production-grade AI agents capable of executing complex tasks with minimal supervision. This includes single-agent and multi-agent systems with structured reasoning, memory, tool use, and robust failure handling.



Key Responsibilities

Architect and implement LLM-driven autonomous agents

Build multi-agent systems with coordination, delegation, and feedback loops

Design structured reasoning pipelines (planning, execution, reflection)

Implement long-term and short-ter
mory mechanisms

Integrate tool calling, function execution, and external APIs

Develop Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using vector databases

Debug and mitigate hallucinations, looping behaviors, and reasoning failures

Optimize systems for reliability, latency, cost, and scalability



Required Technical Expertise

Advanced Python engineering (clean, modular, production-ready code)

Deep hands-on experience with OpenAI / GPT-4 / GPT-4.1 / o-series models

Strong understanding of LLM prompting at a system and architectural level

Practical experience with agent frameworks, such as:

LangChain / LangGraph

AutoGen

CrewAI



or equivalent custom implementations



Expertise in embeddings, semantic search, and vector databases:



Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS, Chroma, or similar



Experience designing and evaluating RAG pipelines



Familiarity with LLM evaluation, observability, and agent debugging



Strongly Preferred Qualifications



Experience deploying AI agents in real-world or production environments



Ability to reason about failure modes, edge cases, and system behavior



Comfort designing AI architectures without reliance on templates or tutorials



Strong understanding of LLM limitations and trade-offs



Ability to clearly explain technical decisions and system designs



What This Role Is Not



Not web development (frontend or backend)



Not SEO, marketing, or automation scripting



Not prompt-only experimentation



Not entry-level or exploratory AI work



Application Requirements



Applicants should submit:



A summary of AI agents or LLM systems they have built



Relevant code samples, repositories, or architecture diagrams



A brief explanation of a challenging AI system problem they encountered and how they solved it

title: Bookkeeper & Operations Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based marine services company providing towing, salvage, and mooring services across Long Island Sound. We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Operations & Bookkeeping Coordinator to support our day-to-day administrative, financial, and operational workflows.



This role is critical in helping us scale by ensuring jobs are documented properly, invoices are accurate, and our internal systems run smoothly.



?



???? Key Responsibilities



???? Bookkeeping & Financial Support

 • Enter and categorize transactions in QuickBooks Online

 • Create and send customer invoices based on completed work

 • Match receipts, expenses, and job documentation

 • Reconcile accounts and flag discrepancies

 • Assist with monthly financial reporting



?



?? Operations & Job Management

 • Review technician job submissions (photos, notes, repair selections)

 • Ensure all jobs are properly documented and ready for billing

 • Organize and store job photos and service records

 • Track job status across multiple service locations

 • Maintain clean, accurate internal records

Ideal Candidate Profile



Must-Have:

 • 2+ years experience with QuickBooks Online

 • Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

 • Excellent written and spoken English

 • Highly organized and process-driven

 • Comfortable working U.S. Eastern Time overlap (at least 4 hours/day)

title: AI Expert with Advanced Programming and AI Systems Experience
description:
We are seeking an experienced AI Specialist to join our team and lead the development of advanced AI solutions. The ideal candidate will have extensive expertise in AI programming, implementation of AI systems, and hands-on experience with the latest AI tools and technologies.



Key Responsibilities:

Develop and deploy custom AI solutions for various applications, including design, marketing, and automation.

Utilize and optimize AI frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.) and tools for project-specific needs.

Implement and manage AI-driven programs and systems to streamline workflows.

Lead the integration of AI technologies into websites, marketing platforms, and business operations.

Research and apply cutting-edge AI advancements to innovate and improve processes.

Qualifications:

Proven expertise in AI programming and development (Python, R, or other relevant languages).

Extensive experience with AI tools such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenAI APIs, DALL·E, and MidJourney.

Strong background in machine learning models, neural networks, and data analysis.

Practical knowledge of deploying AI in real-world applications, including marketing and web platforms.

Ability to independently create and implement AI systems from the ground up.

title: React Native Developer Needed — Faith-Based Mobile App (1 Week Build, Full Code Provided)
description:
**TITLE:**

React Native Developer Needed — Faith-Based Mobile App (1 Week Build, Full Code Provided)



---



**OVERVIEW:**

We are building a bold, luxury faith-based CHRISTIAN mobile app for iOS and Android. All code is written and provided by an AI system. We need a skilled React Native developer to implement, connect, and deploy the app in 7 days.



This is NOT a design or architecture role. The code is already written. You execute, deploy, and troubleshoot.



---



**WHAT YOU WILL DO:**

- Set up React Native + Expo development environment

- Configure Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Storage, Cloud Messaging)

- Implement all screens from provided code (15+ screens)

- Connect real-time Firestore data listeners

- Integrate payment gateway (TBD — PayPal, 
, or RevenueCat)

- Set up push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging

- Deploy to Vercel (web PWA) and Expo (iOS + Android)

- Submit to Apple App Store and Google Play Store

- Attend daily check-ins and implement feedback same day



---



**TECH STACK:**

- React Native + Expo

- Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Storage, FCM)

- OpenAI API (for AI Prayer Assistant and AI Group Manager)

- Payment gateway (TBD)

- GitHub for version control

- Vercel for web deployment



---



**APP FEATURES:**

- Cinematic onboarding flow (5 screens with animations)

- Home Feed with live streams, posts, videos, exclusive content

- Small Groups with real-time chat and AI Group Manager

- Events page with countdown timers

- Rhapsody of Realities interactive flipbook

- Store with merch + digital products

- Prayer Request page with AI assistant

- Referral system with badge progression

- Push notifications

- Full user profiles with badges and stats

- Admin content management



---



**REQUIREMENTS:**

- 2+ years React Native experience

- Strong Firebase experience (Auth, Firestore, FCM)

- Experience submitting apps to App Store and Google Play

- Available to start IMMEDIATELY

- Available 4-5 hours per day for 7 days

- Strong English communication

- Must be comfortable working from detailed AI-generated code

- Bonus: Experience with Expo EAS Build



---



**TIMELINE:**

Day 1 — Environment setup + project scaffold

Day 2 — Onboarding + Authentication

Day 3 — Home Feed + Profile

Day 4 — Small Groups + Events

Day 5 — Store + Payments

Day 6 — AI Features + Push Notifications

Day 7 — Polish + App Store Submission



**Deadline: 7 days from start date**



---



**BUDGET:**

$200 — $1,000 fixed price (based on experience)

Milestone payments: 25% on Day 1, 50% on Day 4, 25% on delivery



---



**TO APPLY — answer these 3 questions:**

1. Have you submitted an app to the Apple App Store before? Share the app name.

2. Describe your Firebase experience in one paragraph.

3. What is your earliest available start date?



Applications without answers to all 3 questions will not be considered.



---



This is a Kingdom project. We are building the #1 faith-based app in the world. If you are skilled, fast, and available now — apply immediately.

title: Kissed Earth – Social Media Manager (Content + Community)
description:
About Us

Kissed Earth is a premium Australian wellness brand specialising in supplements, skincare, and performance products. We are building a strong global presence across ecommerce and retail, and social media is a key part of our growth.



The Role

This is not just a posting role. You will be responsible for creating content, managing our social presence, engaging with our audience, and helping grow the brand.



Key Responsibilities



1. Content Creation & Editing

- Create and edit short-form videos (Reels / TikTok)

- Design image posts and carousels

- Turn product images into engaging video content

- Follow trends while maintaining a premium brand feel



2. Social Media Management

- Manage daily posting across Instagram and TikTok

- Plan and schedule content

- Maintain consistency and brand tone



3. Community Management

- Respond to comments and direct messages

- Represent the brand in a professional and friendly tone

- Handle basic customer service enquiries



4. Creative Input

- Suggest content ideas and trends

- Improve engagement strategies

- Collaborate on campaigns and launches



5. Growth & Performance

- Track engagement and follower growth

- Identify high-performing content and scale it



Requirements

- Experience managing Instagram and TikTok accounts

- Strong video editing skills (CapCut or similar)

- Basic graphic design (Canva or similar)

- Strong written English

- High attention to detail



Bonus Skills

- Interest in health, wellness, fitness or supplements

- Understanding of social media trends

- Ecommerce brand experience



What We’re Looking For

- Creative and proactive

- Fast and reliable

- Comfortable working independently

- Strong communication skills



KPIs

- Content consistency

- Engagement rate

- Follower growth

- Response time to messages



Compensation

- Competitive salary

- Part-time or full-time options

- Opportunity to grow with the brand



How to Apply

Please include:

1. Social media accounts managed

2. Examples of content created

3. Answer: “What would you post to grow a premium supplement brand on TikTok?”



Important

Start your application with the word: EARTH

title: Short-Form AI Video Editor — HeyGen, CapCut, Higgsfield, Veo 3
description:
I run a fast-growing
 health and wellness page with over 939,000 followers built around a AI avatar, plus a network of additional AI avatar pages. I am looking for an experienced short-form video editor who already knows how to use HeyGen, CapCut, Higgsfield, and Veo 3 and can produce high-quality content from day one with minimal direction.



This is not a training role. You must already know how to use the following tools:



HeyGen — generating talking head videos using AI avatars, setting voice and avatar settings, exporting clean vertical video

Higgsfield — generating hyper-realistic AI images from written prompts, maintaining consistent character appearance across generations

Veo 3 — generating high-quality AI video content from prompts

CapCut — editing short-form vertical videos with text overlays, font styling, music syncing, color grading, and precise pacing. You can look at a reference video and replicate the editing style exactly



What the daily workflow looks like:

You receive a plain text script fro
. You handle everything from there — Higgsfield image generation, HeyGen video creation, Veo 3 where applicable, and CapCut editing — and deliver a minimum of 10 finished videos per day ready to post. The process is fast and repeatable once you know the style.



What I need from you:

Proven hands-on experience with HeyGen, Higgsfield, Veo 3, and CapCut — please include examples of your work

Ability to match an existing editing style precisely without being told every detail

High output capacity — 10+ videos per day, 7 days a week

Reliable, fast, and communicative

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

s in Go High Level
