title: B2B Appointment Setter — Digital Marketing (Australian Market)
description:
About Digilari Media



Digilari Media is a Brisbane-based digital marketing agency and an accredited partner of Google and active users on GHL and HubSpot. We help Australian & NZ businesses grow through SEO, Google Ads, inbound marketing, social media, and marketing automation. We are expanding our outbound sales team and looking for experienced, confident B2B appointment setters who can open conversations, handle objections on the fly, and consistently book qualified meetings for our Australian sales consultants.



This is a high-activity role that rewards people who are disciplined, articulate, and genuinely motivated by results. If you need hand-holding on every call or you shut down at the first objection, this role is not for you.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY



- Make 75–100 outbound calls to Australian businesses, targeting key decision-makers

- Aim for 20–30 meaningful conversations per day with business owners, marketing managers, and senior leaders

- Use provided scripts and objection-handling guides as a foundation, then adapt in real time based on the conversation

- Book qualified appointments directly into the calendars of our Australian sales consultants

- Log all call activity, outcomes, and notes accurately into our CRM after every session

- Send follow-up and information
s to prospects who need more detail before committing to a meeting

- Complete a daily activity report covering calls made, conversations held, and appointments set



YOUR DAILY TARGETS



- 75–100 outbound calls per day

- 20–30 conversations with decision-makers

- 5-10 qualified appointments booked weekly 

- CRM updated after every call

- Daily activity report submitted



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Proven experience in outbound B2B calling, appointment setting, or telephone sales, ideally 2 or more years

- Excellent spoken and written English with a clear, confident, and professional approach on every call

- Ability to work autonomously with a high degree of initiative, you do not wait to be told what to do

- Genuine resilience, you handle rejection professionally and keep dialling

- Strong listening skills, you ask good questions and know when to adapt mid-call

- Basic familiarity with digital marketing concepts (SEO, Google Ads, social media, marketing automation) you do not need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable discussing these services at a high level

- Experience logging calls and managing follow-ups in a CRM (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Salesforce, or similar)

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home working environment



WHAT DIGILARI PROVIDES



- Detailed call scripts and proven objection rebuttals, you will not be starting from scratch

- Full onboarding and ongoing coaching from our sales leadership team

- CRM access, calling tools, and all the systems you need to do the job well

- Clear KPIs so you always know exactly where you stand and what you are working toward



COMPENSATION



Competitive hourly base rate, plus a per-appointment bonus for every qualified meeting booked. Additional performance bonuses are tied to volume milestones and actual signed clients. The harder you work and the better you perform, the more you earn, uncapped.



WORKING CONDITIONS



- Full-time, Monday to Friday

- Hours aligned to Australian Eastern Time (AEST), you will be calling Australian businesses during their business day

- 100% remote from the Philippines



HOW TO APPLY



Include a cover letter with the subject line:

"Appointment Setter Application — [your name]"



Please include:

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A short note on your outbound calling background: what you were selling, how many calls per day, and the results you achieved

- A 2–3 minute Loom video or voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you are right for this role



Applications without evidence of prior outbound calling experience will not be progressed.

title: Civil Engineer
description:
Responsible for planning, designing, and overseeing construction projects to ensure they are completed safely and on time.

Do estimation cost, have knowledge in purchasing, importing materials and must be able to work aboard. Start ASAP.



Core Responsibilities: 

Design and Planning: Civil engineers create detailed designs for infrastructure projects such as roads, bridges, buildings, dams, airports, tunnels, and water supply systems. They conduct feasibility studies, analyze materials, costs, and environmental impacts, and ensure structural integrity and safety standards are met. 



Project Management: They oversee the entire lifecycle of a project, including budgeting, scheduling, procurement, and resource allocation. Civil engineers coordinate with contractors, architects, urban planners, and regulatory agencies to ensure projects are completed on time and within budget. 



Construction Supervision: Civil engineers monitor construction sites to ensure work adheres to design specifications, quality standards, and safety regulations. They provide technical guidance, resolve on-site issues, and supervise construction teams. 



Site Investigation: Before construction, civil engineers assess geological and environmental conditions, including soil composition, water tables, and potential hazards, to determine site suitability. 



Regulatory Compliance: Ensure projects comply with local, state, and federal regulations, environmental guidelines, and health and safety requirements. 



Technical and Software Skills: Civil engineers use computer-aided design (CAD) software, such as AutoCAD Civil 3D, for designing infrastructure frameworks. They also prepare technical reports, bid proposals, and environmental impact statements.



Resource and Quality Management: They schedule material and equipment deliveries, manage labor allocation, and oversee the quality of construction materials to ensure durability and sustainability. 



Additional Duties:

Conducting risk assessments and providing creative solutions for construction challenges. 



Preparing plan and profile drawings, grading plans, utility plans, and roadway plans. 



Engaging in ongoing professional development to stay current with engineering advancements.

title: Google Ads Specialist (Lead Generation – Roofing & Solar)
description:
We are a growing roofing and solar company based in Vancouver, Canada.

Our goal is to dominate North & West Vancouver and expand into surrounding areas.



We’re looking for a Google Ads specialist focused on lead generation, not clicks.



This is a long-term role starting with a full campaign build, followed by ongoing optimization and scaling.



What You'll Be Doing



Phase 1 – Build & Launch (2–3 weeks)



Build call-focused search campaigns

High-intent local keyword research

Ad copy creation & testing

Negative keyword strategy

Conversion tracking setup (calls + forms)

Coordinate landing page improvements



Phase 2 – Ongoing Optimization (Long-Term)



Reduce cost per lead

Improve lead quality

Expand into new service areas

Ongoing testing and scaling

We’re Looking For Someone Who

Has 3+ years Google Ads experience

Has generated real leads for service businesses

Understands local campaign structure

Focuses on calls and conversions

Can show before/after results

Comfortable working long-term



Experience with home services (roofing, HVAC, solar, etc.) is a strong advantage.



Compensation

Hourly: $8–$12 CAD (depending on experience)

Long-term role

Performance bonuses based on:

Cost per lead

Lead volume

Campaign performance

To Apply, Please Include

Years of Google Ads experience

Example of a lead-gen campaign you've worked on

Typical cost per lead you've achieved (if available)

Monthly budgets you've managed

Experience with local service businesses (if any)

Your hourly rate

Your timezone



Optional but helpful:



Screenshots

Case studies

Landing pages



We are looking for someone who wants to build a long-term system and scale campaigns, not just manage ads.

title: Digital Marketing & Growth Specialist (SEO + Google Ads + Landing Pages)
description:
Job Description:



We are a roofing and solar company based in Vancouver, Canada looking for a reliable and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to help generate leads through SEO, Google Ads, and landing page optimization.



This role includes technical SEO, Google Ads management, WordPress/Elementor landing pages, and local backlink outreach. You will be working directly with the owner, so clear communication and execution are important.



Responsibilities:



Perform SEO improvements (on-page SEO, internal linking, basic technical fixes, schema markup)

Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns (improve cost per lead and conversions)

Build and update landing pages in WordPress (Elementor preferred)

Support local SEO (Google Business Profile, location pages, content updates)

Perform outreach for local backlinks and mentions (no spam links)

Track basic performance (traffic, leads, conversions) and report progress



Requirements:



Experience with SEO (on-page + basic technical understanding)

Experience with Google Ads

Ability to build/edit WordPress landing pages

Understanding of modern SEO (structured data, AI/search changes is a plus)

Good written English

Organized and able to follow direction



Work Schedule:

Flexible hours, but must have at least 2 hours daily overlap with Vancouver, Canada time (approx. 8:00 AM – 10:00 AM Vancouver time)



Compensation:



$5.50 – $7.05 USD/hour (based on experience)

Performance bonuses available ($100–$300+/month based on results)



To Apply:

Please include:



Examples of websites or projects you’ve worked on

Your experience with SEO and Google Ads

A short audit of 
 (2–3 improvements you would make)

title: Property Management Operations Lead — NJ Rental Portfolio
description:
WHO WE ARE



Family-owned NJ real estate brokerage with a 20+ year track record managing a portfolio of rental properties. Two principals. You'd be our first dedicated property management hire — direct access to decision-makers, no bureaucracy. We use Notion, OpenPhone, GoHighLevel, and Baselane daily. We also use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) and expect you to as well.





WHAT YOU'LL OWN



- Rent collection follow-ups (Baselane + OpenPhone)

- Maintenance request triage and vendor coordination (Notion)

- Lease expiration tracking and renewal prep

- Tenant communication using templates and AI-assisted drafting

- Property and tenant records in Notion

- Daily shift report: what you did, what's pending, what needs my decision





GROWTH PATH (Months 3-6)



- Rental listing coordination (MLS, showings, tenant screening)

- Landlord communication and relationship management

- Transaction coordination support

- SOP creation and process improvement — we want you to make our systems better, not just follow them





REQUIREMENTS (Non-Negotiable)



- 2+ years hands-on US property management experience — managing or directly supporting a real rental portfolio. If your PM experience is limited to data entry or virtual reception, this is not the right fit.

- Actively using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) in your daily work

- Proactive problem-solver who flags issues before they become emergencies

- Built or improved SOPs at a previous job (we'll ask for specifics)

- Works independently — you don't wait to be told what to do

- Takes ownership. When something falls through the cracks, you catch it.

- If you're looking for a role where someone tells you exactly what to do every day, this is not it.





NICE TO HAVE



- NJ/NY rental market knowledge

- Used at least 2 of: Notion, GoHighLevel, OpenPhone, Baselane, AppFolio, Buildium, Rent Manager

- Experience with rent collection platforms

- Familiarity with MLS systems

- Experience building process documentation in Notion

- Background in real estate transaction coordination

- Vendor management experience





SCHEDULE



- Starting with a 1-week paid trial at 1 hour/day

- 5-7 days/week after trial period

- Available time slots (choose one): 9-10 AM, 10-11 AM, 2-3 PM, 3-4 PM, or 4-5 PM Eastern Time

- This is 1 focused, productive hour. We measure output, not time.

- Hours grow based on performance — more work available for the right person





COMPENSATION



- $8/hr starting, clear path to $10+/hr based on performance

- Hours increase as you prove yourself — this can grow to 2-4 hrs/day

- As your role grows: 13th month bonus, health stipend, internet allowance, course funding, paid PH holidays



Long-term role, not a project. Real path from PM operations to managing our entire rental division.





MANAGEMENT STYLE



I'm direct. Sometimes blunt. I value honesty over harmony. I'd rather hear "I don't understand" than discover a mistake later. After 2 weeks of onboarding, my daily involvement is about 15 minutes — the rest is yours to own.





HOW TO APPLY



Include "NJ-PM Ready" as the first line of your message. Then answer these 3 questions:



1. How many rental units have you managed or supported? What PM tools did you use? How long were you in that role?

2. Describe one process you improved at a previous job without being asked. What was the problem, what did you do, what was the result?

3. How do you use AI (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) in your current work? Tell me a specific workflow, not just "I've used it."



BONUS (Optional but strongly preferred): Record a 2-minute Loom video answering the 3 questions above instead of writing them out. This is not required, but candidates who submit a video will be reviewed first.





Applications without "NJ-PM Ready" and answers to all 3 questions will not be reviewed.

title: Accountant – Car Rental Company
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing car rental company focused on providing affordable weekly rentals to gig workers and everyday drivers. Our goal is to build efficient systems so the business can scale while maintaining clean, organized financials.



We follow operational principles inspired by Buy Back Your Time, meaning we believe in hiring great people to own processes, improve systems, and free leadership to focus on growth.



?



Mission of This Role



Your mission is to keep the company’s financial records accurate, organized, and up-to-date so leadership can make clear financial decisions.



Success in this role means our books are clean, reports are accurate, and financial tasks run without constant oversight.



?



Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Financial Management

 • Record all income and expenses from rentals

 • Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards weekly

 • Track vehicle expenses (repairs, maintenance, insurance)

 • Monitor renter payments and overdue balances

 • Categorize transactions correctly in accounting software



Reporting

 • Prepare weekly financial summary reports

 • Track revenue per vehicle

 • Provide monthly profit & loss reports

 • Maintain dashboards showing cash flow and expenses



Accounts Receivable

 • Track weekly rental payments

 • Flag overdue accounts

 • Send payment reminders when needed



Accounts Payable

 • Track vendor invoices

 • Schedule and record payments

 • Maintain vendor records



Systems & Organization

 • Maintain organized financial folders

 • Improve accounting workflows

 • Document repeatable processes (SOPs)



?



Required Skills

 • Experience with bookkeeping or accounting

 • Familiarity with accounting software (Wave, QuickBooks, or similar)

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Organized and process-oriented

 • Ability to work independently



?



Nice to Have

 • Experience with rental businesses or fleet management

 • Knowledge of financial reporting

 • Experience working with virtual teams



?



Tools You May Use

 • Accounting software (Wave or QuickBooks)

 • Google Sheets

 • Google Drive

 • Slack / messaging tools



?



Success Metrics (How Performance Is Measured)

 • Books updated weekly

 • Accurate financial reports delivered on time

 • Zero missing or uncategorized transactions

 • Organized and documented financial systems



?



Work Details

 • Remote / Virtual Assistant Role

 • Part-time or full-time depending on experience

 • Long-term opportunity with growing company



?



How to Apply



Please submit:

 1. Your bookkeeping or accounting experience

 2. Accounting software you’ve used

 3. An example of financial reports you have created

title: Project Manager
description:

We are a fast-growing Creator Network seeking a highly organized, proactive, and strategic Project Manager & Executive Operations Partner to support business growth, product development, and daily operations.



This role goes beyond traditional project management. You will act as a right-hand partner, helping drive execution, build systems, streamline processes, and keep leadership focused and on track.



The ideal candidate is a self-starter who takes initiative, solves problems independently, and thrives in a fast-paced, evolving environment.

Create and manage project timelines, deliverables, and launch plans

Track performance metrics and suggest improvements



???? Additional Responsibilities (Recommended for Growth)

Support scaling efforts and new business opportunities



? Qualifications

???? Ideal Candidate Traits

title: Graphic Designer — Instagram Theme Page Style
description:
About the Role

Ronin Socials is a full-stack content marketing agency building out content ecosystems and paid ads for high-ticket service businesses across the United States. Our clients include tax attorneys, financial advisors, wealth managers, and similar professional service businesses that have historically been underserved in the digital content space. Our goal is simple: build trust with their audience, generate visibility, and turn social media into a real business asset for these firms.

We're looking for a graphic designer who specializes in Instagram theme page-style carousel content. If you can make scroll-stopping, polished, brand-consistent carousels that feel native to the platform, we want to hear from you.



What You'll Be Doing



Designing Instagram images and carousels on a recurring basis for professional service clients

Using Canva and AI tools to source and generate visuals

Researching and sourcing copyright-cleared imagery appropriate for each client's brand and audience

Following brand guidelines and adapting your style to fit more traditional, trust-oriented industries

Delivering assets at a consistent cadence with minimal revision cycles

This position will also require light research to confirm accuracy in content.



What We're Looking For



Fluent in English, copy clarity matters in this niche

Proficient in Canva and AI image tools

Solid understanding of basic design principles: typography, hierarchy, color, layout

Knows how to find and verify copyright-free images (Getty, Unsplash, licensed AI outputs, etc.)

Understands what performs on Instagram, especially in the B2B and B2C professional services space

No minimum years of experience required, your portfolio is what matters

Proof of generating views and link clicks with your content



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience scheduling and publishing content (Meta Business Suite, Later, Buffer, etc.)

Prior work with finance, legal, or professional service brands



Send your portfolio and any engagement stats or social proof from past designs. We are not looking for the longest resume, we are looking for the best work. Show us carousels or images you have designed, especially anything in professional or high-trust niches.

title: CRM, Data & AI Tools Manager — American Political Strategy Firm
description:
OPERATIONS MANAGER WITH CRM, DATA & STRONG AI TOOLS EXPERIENCE?

Work directly with an experienced American political strategist who is genuinely invested in your growth.

Build real, marketable skills in CRM management, data analytics, AI tools, political research, and operations management.



AI TOOLS ARE CENTRAL TO THIS ROLE

You’ll use Claude, Gemini, Google AI Studio, and NotebookLM as everyday professional tools. We want someone who follows AI developments the way others follow sports — keeping up with new features, watching tutorials, and reading release notes because they find it genuinely interesting, not because it’s required.

You don't need to know every tool we use. But you should have experience working with AI platforms and be genuinely excited to go deeper.



AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITY

AI Tools and Knowledge Management

Organize AI research systems, help set up workflows in Google Workspace using AI tools, build prompt libraries, and stay current on new AI features and bring them to our work.



CRM and Workflow Automation

Manage and maintain our Zoho CRM — data cleanup, imports, and automated workflows. Experience with any major CRM is helpful; Zoho can be learned on the job.



Data Analytics

Work with large databases — filtering, sorting, analyzing, and exporting datasets to support client campaigns. Includes matching, merging, and standardizing voter data across multiple platforms. Training provided.



Operations and Administration Management

Maintain a master task list for all active projects, handle invoicing and billing, supervise a small staff, and keep Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, and Sheets) organized.

Business Development

Research political candidates, opponents, and markets — backgrounds, key issues, online presence, and campaign activity. Build prospect lists, monitor candidate announcements, and help identify where we should be growing.



SEO and Website

Competitive research, keyword updates, and website improvements using AI tools. No prior SEO experience required — if you know how to use AI, you can learn this quickly.



Digital Advertising

Learn our digital advertising platform and help coordinate campaigns across social, streaming, and programmatic channels.



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

You follow AI news and new tool releases on your own time — genuinely.

You like figuring things out on your own.

You keep things organized without being reminded.

You’re interested in U.S. politics or willing to learn about it.

You want to build skills in AI, CRM, data, and operations that will serve you for years.



COMPENSATION

$6–$7 USD per hour, depending on experience

30–40 hours per week

Hours increase during peak election months

Profit split at the end of each election cycle — in strong years, this has been a life-changing bonus

Professional AI tool subscriptions provided



QUALIFICATIONS

Excellent English, spoken and written

Demonstrated experience with AI tools used in real work — you’ve gone beyond basic prompting and actually organized, customized, or built something with AI

Data analytics experience — comfortable filtering, sorting, and working with large data sets

Strong Google Sheets, Docs, and Drive skills; full Google Workspace experience a plus

SEO experience is helpful but not required

Available approximately 2–11 AM Philippine Time

Able to commit through November 2026, with the possibility to continue



RECENT GRADUATES WELCOME. Demonstrated AI curiosity and strong English matter more than years of experience.



ABOUT PRECISION POLITICS

An American-based Democratic political strategy and advertising firm. 400-plus campaign wins. 94% win rate. 24 National POLLIE Awards. You’ll work directly with the firm’s owner, a nationally recognized strategist and former Chief of Staff to a U.S. mayor.

HOW TO APPLY

Begin your subject line with the word MANAGER — this confirms that you read the posting and can follow directions.



ATTACH YOUR RESUME AND INCLUDE A COVER LETTER:

Why does this role interest you?

Why are you qualified for this position?

What relevant experience do you have from jobs, education, or independent projects?

Which AI tools do you use, and what have you built or organized with them?

What is the most recent AI feature or tool you discovered on your own?

Can you work between 2–11 AM Philippine Time on a regular basis?



FINALISTS WILL BE ASKED TO COMPLETE A SKILLS TEST.

English writing and editing

AI prompting and data extraction

Google Sheets and data cleaning

CRM workflow scenario

title: Bilingual Spanish-Speaking Virtual Assistant
description:
About Us:



Lowe Law is a fast-growing personal injury law firm based in Houston, Texas, operating as The Insurance Outlaw. Our New Client Team (NCT) is the engine that drives our growth — every call answered is a potential new case for the firm. We already have a team of Philippines-based VAs providing 24/7 English-language coverage, and now we’re expanding to add dedicated bilingual Spanish-speaking intake specialists.



The Opportunity:



We are hiring bilingual (English + Spanish) Virtual Assistants to join our New Client Team. You will be the first point of contact for Spanish-speaking potential clients calling our firm. Your job is to answer every call, qualify leads, schedule consultations, and move new clients through our intake process — all in Spanish and English. This is not a general admin role. This is a high-impact, client-facing position where your work directly drives revenue for the firm.



Positions Available:



POSITION 1: Day Shift — Spanish Intake Specialist

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST (includes 1-hour unpaid lunch)

Days Off: Saturday & Sunday

Weekly Hours: 40 hours/week

You will work alongside our daytime NCT team (in-office specialist + English-speaking VA) handling all Spanish-language calls, intake, and follow-up during business hours.



POSITION 2: Night + Weekend Shift — Spanish Intake Specialist

Weeknight Schedule: Mon/Tue/Wed: 6:00 PM – 2:00 AM CST

Weekend Schedule: Sat/Sun: 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM CST (includes 1-hour unpaid lunch)

Days Off: Thursday & Friday

Weekly Hours: 40 hours/week

You will provide after-hours and weekend Spanish-language coverage, working alongside our evening English-speaking VA on weeknights and our weekend daytime VA on Sat/Sun.



What You’ll Do:



Phone & Intake (Primary Priority):

Answer ALL incoming calls from Spanish-speaking potential new clients (PNCs)

Full bilingual intake screening — qualify PNCs in Spanish, translate details for English-language CRM entries

Speed-to-lead outreach — immediately call back Spanish-speaking web form submissions, missed calls, and voi
s (do NOT wait until morning)

Schedule and confirm consultations (bilingual)

Follow up with prior consultations and potential new clients who haven’t signed



New Client Administration:



Enter and follow up with leads in LeadDocket according to firm timelines

Send out contracts and all accompanying documents (Spanish versions where available)

Ensure all documents are returned fully completed and signed by client and firm

Create case files in CRM (CasePeer) for new sign-ups

Send welcome correspondence to new clients (bilingual)

Request case files from prior firms



Between-Call Duties:



Voi
 and
 triage — clear out messages, route to the right people

CRM cleanup — update LeadDocket and CasePeer records, tag case types, flag incomplete records

Appointment reminders — confirm upcoming consultations via text/email

5-star review follow-up — text or
 satisfied clients requesting Google reviews



Requirements:

Fluent in both English AND Spanish (spoken and written) — this is non-negotiable

Excellent phone presence and customer service skills in BOTH languages

Reliable high-speed internet and quiet home office setup

Own computer with headset/microphone suitable for professional phone calls

Available to work the full posted schedule including weekends (for Position 2)

Comfortable working U.S. hours (Central Standard Time)

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow processes precisely

Experience with CRM/lead management tools (LeadDocket, CasePeer, or similar) is a plus

Prior experience in a law firm, insurance, or medical intake environment is a strong plus but not required



Compensation & Bonuses:

Base Pay: $5 – $8 USD per hour (based on experience and language proficiency)



Performance Bonuses:

Bonuses tied to intake KPIs: leads contacted, consultations scheduled, sign rate, and speed-to-contact metrics

Additional bonuses for signed cases originating from your calls

Monthly and quarterly performance incentives based on team and individual results

Top performers have real earning potential well above base rate



Why This Pays More Than Typical VA Roles:

This is not data entry or general admin. You are a bilingual intake specialist at a U.S. law firm where every call you answer can result in a signed case. We pay accordingly and reward results.



Why Join Lowe Law?

Join a proven, growing firm with hundreds of cases signed annually and aggressive growth targets

Work with an established Philippines VA team (you won’t be alone)

Clear performance metrics and bonus structure — your effort directly impacts your earnings

Stable, long-term position — we are building a permanent 24/7 operation, not a one-off project

Professional development — learn U.S. legal intake processes and CRM systems

Supportive management that values your role — every missed call is a missed case, and we know it

Philippines Time Reference



For your convenience, here is how the shifts translate to Philippines Time (PHT):

Day Shift (9 AM – 6 PM CST): 11:00 PM – 8:00 AM PHT (next day)

Night Shift Weeknights (6 PM – 2 AM CST): 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM PHT — a normal daytime schedule!

Night Shift Weekends (9:30 AM – 6:30 PM CST): 11:30 PM – 8:30 AM PHT

The weeknight evening shift is especially attractive — 6 PM–2 AM CST is 8 AM–4 PM in the Philippines, meaning you work a completely normal daytime schedule in your local time.



How to Apply:



Send your application with:

Your updated resume

Which position you are applying for (Day Shift, Night Shift, or Both)

Your internet speed test results (screenshot from speedtest.net)

Any relevant experience in sales,  legal intake, insurance, or bilingual customer service

title: Appointment Setter
description:

System and Work Requirements:

* Memory: At least 4GB RAM

* Storage Space/Capacity: 250GB or higher

* Hard Drive: preferably SSD

* Operating System: Windows 10, Mac OS X 10.8 or later

* Must have a backup Internet, backup headset, and backup power source 

* Quiet working environment - no background noise

/disc-personality-test/

title: FULL-TIME REMOTE CUSTOMER SUPPORT ASSISTANT
description:
FULL-TIME REMOTE CUSTOMER SUPPORT ASSISTANT

$4–6 USD/hr + performance bonuses | Full-time | Remote



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a reliable, articulate, and personable Customer Support Assistant to join our remote team full-time. This is a long-term position, not a gig or short-term contract, built for someone who values consistency, clear communication, and the opportunity to grow within a structured environment.



In this role, you will manage written conversations with customers and community members across digital platforms. The work requires you to be quick, engaging, and adaptable, shifting tone and style depending on the context of each conversation, sometimes representing a persona or brand voice rather than your own. You will handle multiple conversations simultaneously, maintain a professional yet warm tone at all times, and flag patterns or issues that help the team improve.



Full onboarding and training are provided. You will not work independently until you are fully prepared.



REQUIREMENTS

- Typing speed: 60+ WPM

- Internet speed: 50 Mbps or higher

- Computer: Laptop or desktop with at least 8 GB RAM

- Schedule: 8 hours per day, 6 days per week (set schedule)

- English: Strong written communication is essential



You must be comfortable writing in a natural, engaging way, not just answering questions, but holding conversations. Experience in chat support, community management, or any writing-heavy remote role is an advantage but not required.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

Base pay is $4–6 USD per hour depending on experience and performance. In addition, we offer performance-based bonuses, scheduled salary reviews, and a clear path to higher-responsibility roles for tea
mbers who consistently deliver quality work. This is a position where your effort is directly rewarded.



SELECTION PROCESS

Shortlisted applicants will go through a structured multi-stage process including a written assessment, a typing and communication test, and a short interview. This process is designed to set you up for success, not to catch you out. We want to make sure this role is the right fit for you.



PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF:

You are looking for short-term or project-based work, your typing speed is below 60 WPM, your written English is not strong, or you are not comfortable working a set 6-day schedule. Applications that do not meet these requirements will not move forward.



HOW TO APPLY

Send us a message with the following: your full name,
 address, typing speed (include a screenshot or link from a typing test), internet speed (upload and download), computer specifications, and a short paragraph about any relevant experience you have. Applications without all of the above will not be considered.

 which visuals and B-roll support each

Work on product listings and content updates

Learn how all parts of the business connect

High standards + strong team

 what to respond to first?

title: Legal Assistant
description:
Job Description:  A US law firm focusing on bankruptcy law is looking to hire a legal assistant.  The successful candidate will work directly with the attorney to prepare documents for bankruptcy cases, and will assist the attorney throughout the bankruptcy process.  The successful candidate will also assist the attorney with practice management tasks, such as preparing engagement agreements for prospective clients.  The position is full time (40 hours/week).



Job Responsibilities:

1. Prepare bankruptcy documents and schedules

2. Prepare notices and other non-substantive court documents

3. Communicate with clients to gather documents and information

4. Communicate with the trustees’ offices, gather, organize, and submit documents to the trustees

5. Submit service of process requests and track to ensure completion

6. File documents in court and
 to opposing parties and counsel

7. Submit mailing requests through an online platform

8. Prepare exhibits and assist in preparation of substantive motions and briefs

9. Acquire/request records

10. Communicate with court staff to schedule hearings 

11. Prepare engagement agreements and follow up with clients to ensure agreements are signed



Best candidates should have the following qualities:



1. Integrity.  Honesty and open communication are paramount.  If you are not able to meet a deadline or make a mistake, be upfront about it. 



2. Commitment.  We are looking for someone who is looking for a long-term relationship.  Our goal to find someone who we can work with for many years to come.



3. Desire to Learn.  Certain minimum skills are required for this position (see below for details).  We will provide training on everything else.  We are looking for someone who is open to learning and developing new skills. 



4. Attention to Detail and Thoroughness.  In the legal field, small errors or omissions can have serious consequences for clients.  We are seeking someone who recognizes the importance of precision, consistently attends to details, and completes tasks carefully and thoroughly.



5. Self-Managing. This position requires the ability to work independently for significant periods without direct supervision. We are seeking someone who can effectively manage their time, prioritize tasks, and stay on schedule to ensure work is completed accurately and on time.



6. Good People Skills.  This position requires frequent interaction with clients, attorneys, court staff, and other professionals.  We are looking for someone with the ability to communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully in all settings—whether by phone or in writing.



Minimum Skills:

1. Knowledge of basic office software (e.g. Word, Excel, pdf editor)

2. Knowledge of basic arithmetic

3. Formal training as a legal assistant or attorney 



Hours required: 40 hours/week



Compensation: $5-9/hr, depending on experience



Work Schedule: Successful candidate will need to be available starting at 6am local time, to provide for some overlap with the attorney’s work schedule.  The initial training and onboarding will be 1 week, during which the candidate will work 20 hours/week.  During this onboarding period, the candidate will need to be available starting 4am local time (alternatively, the candidate can work from 11pm to 3am local time)



When you apply, make the subject of your application “Legal Assistant – [YOUR NAME]”



Use 4 Apply Points for your application.

 support or ticketing systems (e.g., Zendesk)

title: Ecommerce Operations Coordinator
description:
Veloce Distribution is a growing ecommerce business and we are looking for one person to join the team full-time.

This is not a random virtual assistant gig. You will be responsible for the entire backend operation of the business. You will have real ownership over how things run day to day and your role will grow as the company grows.



THE WORK

You will be managing inventory tracking and data entry across multiple tools. Coordinating with our prep centers. Keeping pricing accurate and competitive. Monitoring product performance and catching problems before they become expensive. Filing claims and recovering money that would otherwise be lost. Reconciling inventory at every stage so nothing falls through the cracks. Reviewing expenses and flagging anything that looks wrong. Keeping our accounts healthy and compliant. Handling communication where needed. Problem solving on your own before bringing issues to management. Documenting every process so the business runs on systems not memory. You will need to think critically and make smart decisions, not just follow instructions blindly.



You do not need ecommerce or Amazon experience. We will train you on everything through a structured plan over the first two months. What matters is that you are sharp, detail oriented, you notice small things, you can follow a process accurately, and when something looks off you speak up instead of ignoring it.



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Someone who wants to be part of building a real company. Not someone looking for a temporary gig or something to do on the side. This is a long-term role and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us, take on more responsibility over time, and be treated like a real member of the team not just a task worker. You should be the type of person who documents things without being asked, solves problems before they get bigger, and takes pride in keeping things running clean.



WHAT YOU GET

$800 to $1,200 per month USD depending on experience. Paid biweekly. Raise after your first 3 months if performance is solid and annual raises after that. Year-end bonus. Paid time off. Equipment stipend available after 3 months for anything you need to do your job better such as a second monitor or better internet. Weekly one-on-one video calls where your input matters and your growth is a priority.

We use basic time tracking and screen monitoring tools during work hours. This is standard for all remote roles and not a trust issue. It keeps both sides accountable.



SCHEDULE

40 hours per week, 5 days a week. Flexible on which hours and days as long as the work gets done and there is overlap for communication. Weekly video call with camera on.



HOW WE COMMUNICATE


 or WhatsApp daily.



HOW TO APPLY

Do not send a copy paste application. We will ignore it.

Answer these four things in your application:



1. Write the word "detail" at the top of your application so we know you actually read this entire post.

2. What was your last job and what did you actually do day to day? Not your title. What you did.

3. If you were tracking hundreds of orders per month and you noticed the same supplier was consistently sending fewer units than what was ordered, what would you do about it?

4. Why would you be a good fit for this role specifically?



If we like your application we will send you a detailed form to complete as the next step. Make sure your
 address is included and accurate. If the form goes well the final step is a video interview.

We are hiring one person. Take your time with this.

title: Studio & Procurement Manager
description:
The Studio & Procurement Manager will manage purchasing, logistics, and studio systems with precision and care. Support the design team in transforming ideas into finished spaces, ensuring that each project is executed smoothly and beautifully.



Responsibilities

1. Manage the full procurement process for FF&E, lighting, textiles, and accessories — from proposals and purchase orders to installation.

2. Place, track, and reconcile all orders while maintaining real-time records and updates.

3. Communicate with vendors, suppliers, and fabricators to confirm pricing, lead times, and production details.

4. Coordinate shipping, warehousing, and delivery logistics to guarantee timely and damage-free installations.

5. Maintain strong relationships with warehouses, freight companies, and delivery partners.

6. Troubleshoot procurement challenges, including damages, replacements, or delays.

7. Prepare and issue proposals, invoices, and purchase orders; reconcile vendor invoices and maintain clear communication with the business manager/accountant.





Qualifications

1. 2–4 years of experience in procurement, purchasing, or project coordination — experience within a high-end interior design firm is required.

2. Deep understanding of FF&E procurement and familiarity with luxury vendors and custom fabricators.

3. Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple projects at once.

4. Detail-oriented, proactive, and calm under pressure.

5. Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets.

6. Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

7. Comfortable working independently in a remote structure

title: Video Editor - Dropshipping/E-commerce EU Market Advertisement Videos
description:

Tools You Will Use

• Vmake (video editing / improvements)

• Higsfield (static creatives when needed)

• HeyGen (AI video / voice tools)



Required Skills



• Intermediate video editing skills

• Proactive and flexible mindset (comfortable working with AI tools for translation)

• Familiarity with AI tools

• Good attention to detail and branding

• Ability to follow instructions and deliver work consistently



Big Plus If You Have



• Experience with TikTok or Meta advertisement videos

• Experience with e-commerce or dropshipping brands

• Experience using AI creative tools



Compensation & Schedule



• $5–$7 per hour depending on experience

• 20–40 hours per week

title: Accountanta/CPA
description:
About Us

Inertia Rentals is a fast-growing independent rental car company focused on providing reliable vehicles to rideshare and gig-economy drivers. Our goal is to build a highly efficient operation with strong financial visibility and disciplined financial management.

We are looking for a detail-oriented Accountant or CPA who can help us maintain clean books, produce accurate financial reports, and provide insights that help the company grow profitably.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with operational businesses and wants to play a key role in building the financial systems behind a growing company.

Mission of the Role

The mission of this role is to build and maintain a reliable financial reporting system that gives leadership clear visibility into the company’s cash flow, profitability, and financial health.

Your work will help leadership make better decisions around fleet expansion, financing, and operational efficiency.

Key Outcomes (Scorecard)

Within the first 90 days, success in this role will look like:

• Accurate monthly financial statements prepared under GAAP

• Consistent cash flow statements and forecasting

• Clean and organized financial records

• Expense categorization and reconciliation completed monthly

• Financial reporting dashboard for leadership

• Clear documentation of accounting processes

Responsibilities

Financial Reporting

• Prepare monthly cash flow statements

• Generate Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet reports

• Maintain books according to GAAP accounting standards

Accounting Operations

• Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards

• Track vehicle-related expenses and depreciation

• Maintain accurate financial records in accounting software

Cash Flow Management

• Build cash flow tracking and forecasting models

• Monitor operational expenses and vehicle ROI

• Provide financial insights to leadership

Compliance

• Ensure financial records follow GAAP standards

• Assist with tax preparation documentation

• Maintain organized financial documentation

Process Improvement

• Create simple SOPs for accounting workflows

• Improve financial visibility and reporting efficiency

Requirements

• CPA preferred but not required

• 3+ years accounting experience

• Experience preparing cash flow statements

• Strong knowledge of GAAP accounting standards

• Experience with small business accounting systems (QuickBooks, Wave, Xero, etc.)

• Strong attention to detail and organization

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Nice to Have

• Experience with fleet management or rental car companies

• Experience with cash flow forecasting for asset-heavy businesses

• Startup or small business experience

title: Senior Accountant - AU
description:
Australian accounting practice looking for a full time Senior Accountant. This is a contractors position.



The successful candidate will be working from our office location in Davao City. This is not a working from home position. Travel, HMO and leave benefits are considered in the remuneration amount. Minimum hours will be from 7:00am PH to 3:00pm PH Monday to Friday. Laptop, peripherals and all software will be provided.



The successful candidate must have at least 5 years of solid experience in completing similar type of work for Australian clients and have excellent attention to detail and pride in their work. Previous experience with Australian accounting firms will be highly regarded.

- bank reconciliations including set up of bank rules

- GST

- end of month entries and reconciliations such as debtors, creditors and superannuation

- ATO account reconciliations

- fixed asset reconciliations

- end of month financial reports

- tax returns for individuals, company's, trusts and partnerships



The successful applicant will be responsible for weekly bank reconciliations, GST coding of transactions and producing end of month/end of quarter financial reports. They will also be working along side our existing admin and accounting teams to complete the work. We have daily workflow meetings and internal chat to support our team, so a team player is a must please. We are picky on what clients we service and have an excellent team environment. Preferred start date is June 2026.



Must be AU Xero Certified and AU Payroll Xero Certified.



Must have experience in using the following applications and software:

- Xero

- Quickbooks

- MYOB

- Excel

- Word



Experience in the following is desirable:

- FYI Docs



If you are interested, please respond with your resume and a cover letter with COLORADO in the subject line. Please provide at least 2 professional referees as part of your resume.

s are sending/receiving properly

 systems — SMTP, SendGrid, inbox management, deliverability

Experience working with large contact databases



Schedule & Pay:

 automation systems, databases you've managed, and any AI APIs you've used. Be specific about what you built and what tools you used. Generic copy-paste applications will be ignored.

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




  



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Loop Animation Designer (Calm / Ambient Visuals)
description:
We’re looking for a talented motion designer to create calming, loopable video visuals for long-form affirmation and relaxation content on YouTube and Spotify.



The visuals will serve as a continuous background for videos that are 1–3 hours long. They should feel soft, minimal, and aesthetically pleasing, with slow, subtle movement that supports relaxation rather than drawing attention.



Style Reference:





Responsibilities:



* Create looping animated visuals (e.g. subtle motion, particles, gradients, light effects)

* Ensure loops are seamless and non-distracting

* Design visuals that feel calm, dreamy, and immersive

* Deliver videos optimized for long playback (1–3 hours)

* Collaborate to match visuals with audio mood and tone



Ideal Skills:



* Strong motion design skills (After Effects, Blender, or similar)

* Experience with loop animations

* A good eye for aesthetic, calming visuals

* Understanding of meditation / ambient / relaxation content

* Ability to create visuals that feel repetitive without becoming boring

* Experience using AI tools to support and speed up creative workflows is a plus



Important:



We are not looking for fast-paced, flashy, or highly dynamic animations.

The goal is to create visuals that people can watch passively for long periods without distraction.



Details:



- Paid test task (20 USD)

- Ongoing work available for the right candidate with separate, project-based compensation



If this sounds like a good fit, please apply with relevant portfolio examples, especially loop-based or calming visual work.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Best,

Fern

title: Residential Cleaning Company Sales and Customer Service Rep | Hourly + Commission Bonuses!
description:
Greater Phoenix Cleaning — Sales & Customer Service Rep (Phoenix, AZ)



We're not your average cleaning company. We're a fun, not-so-corporate, fast-growing entrepreneurial machine on a mission to build a $50M empire in Phoenix — and then rinse and repeat in Miami, FL! If you're obsessed with personal development, love solving problems, and want to be part of an abundant, high-energy team that actually cares about adding massive value to society, keep reading.



We're looking for happy, hungry, humble, and smart closers who take initiative, crush massive action, and are ready to grow with us. This isn't just a sales job — it's your launchpad to leadership in a company that's scaling big.



The Role

You'll be the high-energy voice and closer for Greater Phoenix Cleaning — the first (and most important) person our customers talk to. This is a fast-paced, phone-based sales role where speed, hustle, and personality win.



Respond to inbound leads in under 30 seconds (yes, seconds — we move quick)

Quote jobs, negotiate like a pro, and close residential & commercial cleaning deals over the phone

Collect payment info and lock in bookings with confidence

Turn one-time clients into loyal recurring customers

Master our proven sales process, pricing models, and scripts inside and out



Outbound Hustle

We don't just sit and wait for the phone to ring. You'll proactively hunt for new business like a true entrepreneur:



Outreach to real estate agents, contractors, property managers, and other partners

Smart calling, texting,
ing, and leveraging social media

Creatively using job boards and other platforms to fill our crews' schedules

Relentless (but smart) follow-up on warm leads until they book or bow out



The Schedule



Days On: Saturday, Sunday, Monday — 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM

Days Off: Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday — fully yours to recharge, pursue side hustles, or enjoy life

3 days on, 4 days off. Weekends are our peak — if you can't own them with energy, this isn't the role for you.



What's In It For You



Uncapped commission bonuses — the more you close and exceed targets, the more you earn

Real growth opportunities: performance-based pay bumps, managerial roles, and leadership tracks as we scale

Early entry into something massive — we're expanding to Miami and building toward a national vision

title: Marketing VA – Social Media, Content and Ads
description:
We are not looking for a basic social media VA this is not an entry level position, this is a upper level management position. We are hiring someone who understands how to build brand awareness, execute campaigns, and drive real results — including event attendance, reservations, and engagement.



The Point Restaurant Group is a high-energy, community-driven hospitality brand known for creating experiences, not just meals. We operate multiple restaurant locations and host a wide range of events including:

Bottomless brunches | Trivia nights | Themed pop-ups

Ticketed events and interactive experiences



*Events are the engine. Marketing fills the room.



Our brand is fun, social, a little unhinged (in the best way), and built around bringing people together. From viral brunch 
nts to packed themed events, we focus on creating an atmosphere people want to be part of and come back to.

We are not a quiet restaurant brand. We are a social, experience-driven business, and our marketing reflects that.



*If you enjoy working on brands that are bold, fast-paced, and constantly evolving, you will thrive here. If your experience is limited to posting content without understanding campaigns, paid ads, or audience behavior, this role is not the right fit.



About the Role

You will be responsible for executing marketing campaigns across social media, paid ads, and digital channels using content captured by our in-house team.



Your focus is:

Brand awareness | Consistent content | Campaign execution

Driving engagement and attendance



You should understand how to take a concept like:

“Bridgerton Pop-Up Bar” and turn it into:



scroll-stopping content | consistent visibility | targeted campaigns| real turnout



**For faster hiring & to Apply - READ till the end of job listing and submit ALL of the following: using this link, then send us a message letting us know it is complete.







What You’ll Do



Campaign Execution

Execute marketing campaigns for events and promotions from launch to event day

Plan and schedule content across platforms

Support ticket sales, reservations, and attendance



Social Media & Content

Post daily across Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

Manage evergreen content and promotional content

Maintain strong brand presence and consistency

Engage with comments, DMs, and followers daily

Repurpose content across platforms for maximum reach



Video Content & AI

Create and edit engaging video content for social media using professional editing software and AI tools

Develop platform-native content (Reels, TikToks, Stories)

Stay ahead of content trends and platform behavior

Ability to turn raw footage into engaging, platform-native content

Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, captions, and storytelling



Paid Advertising & Campaigns

Develop, implement, and optimize paid social media campaigns across:

 | Instagram| TikTok | LinkedIn

Design ad creatives aligned with campaign goals and brand voice

Conduct A/B testing on: creatives, copy, targeting

Monitor performance and adjust campaigns to improve ROI



Analytics & Optimization

Track and report on campaign performance

Provide insights and recommendations

Identify what is working and scale it

Stay updated on: platform algorithm changes, advertising policies, emerging trends



Website & Digital Support

Update events and pages on Squarespace

Build simple landing pages for campaigns

Ensure event information is accurate and optimized



What Success Looks Like

Events are consistently promoted and well attended

Social media is active, engaging, and growing

Campaigns are executed on time and with intention

Paid ads are optimized and improving performance

Increased brand awareness and engagement



Requirements



Technical & Tools

In-depth knowledge of:

Meta & Ads Manager

TikTok 

LinkedIn is a bonus 

Experience with
 marketing platforms and automation tools

Familiarity with ManyChat or similar automation tools

Experience updating websites (Squarespace or similar platforms)

Strong use of AI tools to improve workflow, content creation, and efficiency



Work Style & Expectations

Highly organized and able to manage multiple campaigns at once

Self-directed and able to execute without constant oversight

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, event-driven environment

Strong communication and attention to detail

Able to move quickly while maintaining quality



Important

This is not a passive role.

We are looking for someone who:

Thinks strategically. Executes consistently

Moves quickly in a fast-paced environment

Understands that marketing drives revenue



Hours & Structure

Month 1 (Training)

Hourly: $5 to $7

Part-time: 25–30 hours



After 30 Days

>Move to:

$900 to $1,100 monthly

Full-time 40 hrs a week



After 90 Days

Bonuses for sold out ticketed event 



**To Apply - Submit ALL of the following: using this link 



1. Resume with social media experience and results?

2. Portfolio (REQUIRED)

3. Links to social media accounts you've managed?

Examples of AI-generated videos from photos?.
 Ads examples with performance metrics?. Reels/Stories that performed well?

4. Answer These Questions in a Loom video:

How would you promote a themed restaurant event over 14 days?

What platforms would you use and why?

How do you approach paid ads for an event?

How do you balance evergreen content vs promotional content?

What metrics do you track to measure success?



Interview process:

1) Fill out form

2) Send on pre-interview questions

3) Send us message letting us know you applied and items are complete 

4) Set up Zoom interview 



We are a fast-paced hospitality brand. This role directly impacts how many people walk through our doors.

If you understand how to turn content and campaigns into real-world results, we want to hear from you.

title: SEO Specialist
description:

You'll work closely with our Google Ads and content teams to make sure every site we manage is built to rank.

Hours: Project based part time.

title: Creative Design Assistant and Digital Illustrator
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications Reviewed on a Rolling Basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.



Make Your Mark in Design, Lead Creativity, and Contribute to Our Vision.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Creative Design Assistant & Digital Illustrator to join our creative team and play a pivotal role in crafting high-quality, visually stunning designs that enhance our brand presence. If you are a creative powerhouse proficient in Adobe Illustrator with a keen eye for design, we want you to help bring our vision to life.



This is a hands-on, dynamic role ideal for a creative professional passionate about design and eager to make an impact on a fast-growing company. You’ll collaborate with leadership, work on high-priority assignments, and ensure the seamless execution of design projects that elevate Hadley Designs' brand.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand committed to shaping brighter futures through creativity and purposeful design. We create screen-free learning tools that spark curiosity, build confidence, and transform everyday 
nts into meaningful growth. Each product is hand-drawn, crafted with input from teachers, parents, and child development experts, ensuring learning is joyful, engaging, and accessible.



Our mission is simple: to help families and educators unlock children’s potential with tools that inspire curiosity, strengthen connections, and support learning without screens. Trusted by over two million customers worldwide, we are passionate about designing experiences that make children feel supported, capable, and excited to learn.



If you’re looking for a company that designs with purpose and builds with heart, you’ll feel right at home here.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs



We believe in structured creativity. Success in this role means owning your projects and delivering high-quality designs that resonate with our customers while maintaining our visual standards. We’re looking for someone who thrives in a creative environment, is proactive, and possesses a strong attention to detail.



Every Design Assistant is expected to:



Learn the Playbook – Understand our design standards, expectations, and creative processes.

Apply the Playbook – Execute designs consistently, meeting project requirements and adhering to brand guidelines.

Enhance the Playbook – Suggest creative improvements and innovative design strategies after mastering the basic framework.

We value innovation grounded in proven execution and a clear understanding of design principles.



What You’ll Own



-Creation of high-quality, error-free design assets for advertising and marketing campaigns.

-Maintaining consistency in typography, color schemes, and layout across all platforms.

-Regular updates and design of storefront assets for Amazon, Shopify, and other platforms.

-Designing A+ Content templates and custom brand image ads.

-Handling urgent design needs for product launches and special projects.

-Working closely with leadership to ensure deadlines are met and projects are delivered on time.



What Success Looks Like

Within your first 90 days, you will:



-Learn and execute Hadley Designs’ design standards with precision.

-Contribute fresh design ideas that align with the brand and improve our current processes.

-Deliver high-quality artwork that meets or exceeds expectations and is on-brand.

-Support Becca and leadership with urgent creative tasks and maintain consistency in all design work.



Apply Now, Lead Creativity, and Shape Our Future.



Requirements

Who You Are:



-2+ years of professional experience in graphic design or related fields, with a strong portfolio.

-Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop, with a strong grasp of CMYK color management and print-ready file preparation.

-Excellent attention to detail and ability to produce high-quality visuals with minimal revisions.

-Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

-Comfortable receiving and implementing feedback while maintaining a high standard of work.

-Creative, collaborative, and self-driven, motivated by quality and continuous improvement.



Benefits

Why You’ll Thrive Here:



-Join a creative, high-growth company with an established 10+ year track record.

-Own significant projects and make an impact from day one.

-Flexibility to work remotely with a flexible schedule.

-Opportunities for personal development and direct interaction with the Chief Creative Officer.

-A culture of collaboration, trust, and innovation, where your contributions are valued.



Apply Now

If you're a passionate graphic designer who thrives in a dynamic and creative environment, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to join Hadley Designs and help shape the future of our brand!



P.S. If you don’t hear from us within four weeks of your application, please consider that as our decision to move forward with other candidates, but we truly appreciate your interest in Hadley Designs.



To formally apply : apply here

title: Digital Marketing & Content Specialist (Video, Social Media & Growth)
description:

You will play a key role in building our online presence through video content, social media management, community engagement, and support for marketing initiatives across platforms.



Key Responsibilities

What We’re Looking For

title: Director of Sales, Outbound Team (Real Estate Cold Calling) (2)
description:
My name is Lukas Rohler, and the Living In Charlotte Team is my real estate team at eXp Realty, licensed in North Carolina and South Carolina, operating for 4+ years. We have multiple Filipino tea
mbers who have been with us 3+ years, including ALL 3 that have been with us since the founding. Our brand, our numbers, and our results are publicly verifiable — do your due diligence, and here are a few links to start your research.



- Our website: 

- Client reviews: 

- Why partner with us? WE ARE NOT YOUR ORDINARY CLIENT! 

- What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 



We're not looking for someone who's just good — or even great. We're looking for the best. Someone who knows they're THAT good. Someone who could start their own business, or might already be C-suite talent at a large company in the Philippines.



The right person in this role unlocks a lot of value for the business, and we are prepared to offer a compensation plan that rewards the right person for the value they create.



If you step into this role instead of doing something else, you get more stability than going solo, you get to build something meaningful inside a company that's already winning, and you get paid better than just about anything else will pay you.



If this sounds exciting and like what you've been looking for, keep reading.





===================================================

DIRECTOR OF OUTBOUND SALES — LIVING IN CHARLOTTE TEAM

===================================================



We're a high-growth real estate team in Charlotte, NC that dominates the relocation buyer market through YouTube content and referrals. Now we're building a brand-new outbound cold calling operation to create a home listings revenue line — and we need someone to recruit, train, and lead the team that runs it.



This is an opportunity to build and own an entire outbound sales department inside a business that's already growing fast. You'll start as the department — and as you produce results, we'll build support staff and resources under you. For the right person, this is a career-defining role with serious earning potential.



*** You are NOT selling homes or talking to prospects. ***

You are finding talented, US-licensed real estate agents, converting them into confident cold callers, and holding them accountable to a high standard — every single day.





===============

OUR CORE VALUES

===============



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: Anticipate needs and create "magic 
nts" — starting from the very first cold call.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: Daily script practice, role-play, and obsessive improvement. Non-negotiable.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: If we say it will happen, it happens. No excuses.





===========

THE MISSION

===========



Build our outbound calling team from zero to 15–20 deals per month within 9 months.



You own recruiting callers, training callers, and holding callers accountable. You own the KPIs for appointments booked and results generated by your team's activity. The callers generate qualified listing appointments. You generate — and develop — the callers.



Your target: build and maintain a roster of 6–10 A-player cold callers. Finding that many A-players means recruiting significantly more, training hard, evaluating fast, and cutting the people who don't perform. Most won't make it. The ones who do are extremely valuable — and so are you.





==============

RESPONSIBILITIES

==============



RECRUIT

• Source US-licensed real estate agents through job boards, real estate
 groups, LinkedIn, and direct outreach. You'll receive lead data on potential recruits — your job is to work those leads, convert them into cold callers, and build the team.

• Maintain an always-on recruitment pipeline so the team can scale without gaps.



TRAIN

• Run structured 120-day onboarding for every new caller: orientation ? intensive live coaching ("hell week") ? supervised ramp ? full independence.

• Coach daily on scripts, objection handling, the RANTS qualification framework, and appointment setting.



HOLD ACCOUNTABLE

• Run weekly Planning & Review sessions with each caller. Own three core KPIs: sales conversations, appointments set, and accounts verified in CRM.

• Monitor CRM data quality. Know the difference between a coaching problem and a talent problem. Fix the first. Act on the second.

• Report directly to leadership with regular updates on team performance, recruitment pipeline, and recommendations.





=============

REQUIREMENTS

=============



REQUIRED:

• Proven experience recruiting, training, and managing outbound sales teams (cold calling, ISA, BPO outbound, or similar)

• C1 or C2 English — comfortable coaching, role-playing, and giving direct feedback to American sales reps

• CRM proficiency (GoHighLevel experience strongly preferred)

• Assertive, high-standards leadership combined with genuine empathy and care for your people

• Stable high-speed internet (150+ Mbps)

• Available during US Eastern business hours (8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST)



PREFERRED:

• Experience in real estate or real estate-adjacent sales environments

• Experience building outbound teams from scratch, not just managing existing ones

• Familiarity with cold calling data tools, skip tracing, and predictive lead sources





===========================

COMPENSATION & EXPECTATIONS

===========================



TOTAL COMPENSATION (OTE): $4,000–$6,000/month — made up of base pay + variable compensation.



BASE PAY: $1,000/month, guaranteed.



VARIABLE COMPENSATION: $3,000–$5,000/month at full scale, made up of:



• Per-rep commission: $400/month for each caller on your roster who is producing and hitting KPIs. This is ongoing — it pays every month as long as they're performing. During a caller's first month (training/partial production), this pays $200.



• Retention bonuses: $1,000 when a caller hits their 6-month milestone. Another $1,000 at 12 months.



EXAMPLE AT SCALE: You have 8 producing callers. That's $1,000 base + $3,200 in monthly commissions = $4,200/month, plus retention bonuses landing as callers hit milestones. With 10 callers, you're at $5,000+/month before bonuses.



WHY THE 90-DAY PAYOUT DELAY: All variable compensation begins paying out 90 days after the caller starts producing. This is because the revenue their work generates takes roughly 90 days to close. We pay you when the business gets paid — which means the comp is sustainable and real, not a promise we can't keep.



SCHEDULE: Full-time. You need to be available during US Eastern business hours (8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST) for recruitment calls, coaching sessions, and team communication. You have flexibility in how you structure your day within that window — what matters is that you're available when your callers and recruits are available, and that the work gets done.



WHAT "FULL-TIME" LOOKS LIKE DAY TO DAY: In the early months, recruiting is the heaviest lift — sourcing candidates, running screens, making hiring decisions. As the roster fills, your time shifts toward coaching, call reviews, weekly P&Rs, CRM monitoring, and retention. The work evolves as the team grows.





=============

HOW TO APPLY

=============



STEP 1 — APPLICATION (less than 2 minutes)

Submit your application here: 

Write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field to confirm you've read this listing.



STEP 2 — INITIAL INTERVIEW (~15 minutes)

Quick screening call to see if there's a mutual fit.



STEP 3 — CASE INTERVIEW (1 hour)

A live role-play and simulation of the actual work — recruiting, coaching, and managing a caller. We want to see you do the job, not just talk about it.



STEP 4 — REFERENCE CHECK

1 former employer/team lead reference and 1 character reference, both verified.



STEP 5 — 90-DAY PAID TRIAL

You will be paid at your full compensation rate during the trial — this is not a discount period. It's our opportunity to confirm mutual fit and set you up for long-term success. You'll onboard directly with the CSO, begin recruiting callers, run your first onboarding cohort, and prove you can build and hold a team to standard. Successful completion results in a permanent role with long-term growth as the department scales under you.



Apply here:

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:
We are a growing startup on a mission to change lives through financial empowerment, and we are looking for a Credit Repair Specialist who wants to be more than just an employee—we want you to be a cornerstone of our family. Because we are in the early stages of our journey, we are intentionally building a culture rooted in mutual respect, open communication, and a genuine "team-first" dynamic.



You’ll be stepping into a high-impact role where your deep expertise in consumer law and your fluency in English will be the backbone of our client success. Whether you are managing the CRM or conducting sensitive client interviews, you won’t be just a cog in a machine; you’ll be a foundational partner helping us shape the soul of this company. If you’re looking for a workplace that feels like a tight-knit community rather than a corporate office, we’d love to have you help us write our first chapter.



Skills & Requirements

Expertise in Consumer Law: You possess a deep, working knowledge of the FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA. You don't just follow a script; you understand the legal leverage points that get results for clients.



Communication Mastery: You are fully fluent in English with a professional and empathetic phone presence. You are comfortable conducting client interviews and translating complex credit jargon into understandable advice.



Technical Proficiency: You have prior experience navigating Credit Repair CRMs and are comfortable maintaining organized, accurate digital records.



Adaptability & Growth Mindset: Since we are a new startup, your role will be dynamic. In the beginning, there may be "light" periods of credit repair work; during these times, you’ll be compensated for assisting with various administrative or operational tasks to help relieve the founder.



Flexible Availability: We are looking for someone comfortable starting part-time. As our client base grows, we intend for this role to evolve into a full-time position. While this transition is our ideal path, we are open to discussing what works best for your schedule as we scale.



The "Founding" Spirit: You are excited about the prospect of being the first of many. As the workload exceeds what one person can handle, you will play a role in helping us integrate and train new staff members.

title: High-Level Graphic Designer & Content Creator (Fast, Creative, Takes Initiative)

Our business, Jay’s Tire Academy, is based out of Miami, Florida. We specialize in helping individuals start and scale their own Mobile Tire Shop businesses. We have thousands of mentees across the United States and are continuing to grow rapidly.



Responsibilities:

• Design PDFs, guides, and program breakdowns
