title: SENIOR VA — EU B2B, MARKETING & OPERATIONS
description:
SENIOR VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — B2B MARKETING & OPERATIONS

ShoulderSink ApS | Remote | Part-time (50%) with path to full-time by end of 2026

 

 

ABOUT US

 

ShoulderSink is a small Danish B2B company. We make mobile hand hygiene solutions for commercial vehicles — our product is installed in 50,000+ vehicles across Europe. Small team, clear strategy and growing fast across key European markets.

 

 

THE ROLE

 

You work directly with the founder across three areas:

 

Operations (25%): Track our plans, flag slipping deadlines, ask the right questions, keep things moving without being asked.

 

Marketing (35%): Build the monthly content calendar. Draft posts using AI tools. Schedule and publish on LinkedIn,
 and Instagram across several languages. Track META ad campaigns in Germany and the Netherlands.

 

Projects (40%): Build prospect lists, execute approved
 outreach, log everything in Pipedrive CRM, support influencer programmes and event preparation.

 

This is a close working relationship. You will have daily contact with the founder and a weekly video status meeting. You need a minimum 2-hour overlap with European/UK business hours (CET).

 

 

WHAT WE NEED

 

- C2 written English — non-negotiable. German or French would be a plus.

- 3+ years as a VA or coordinator in a B2B environment

- Comfortable using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT or similar) to draft and refine content

- Experience with LinkedIn,
, Google Sheets and Gmail

- CRM experience — Pipedrive preferred

- Proactive communication style: you flag problems before they become crises, not after

- Available for daily contact and weekly video check-in during EU/UK business hours

 

 

WHAT WE OFFER

 

- $600/month at 50% hours

- Performance bonus after 6 months — based on personal and company KPIs

- Possibility of full-time position by end of 2026 for the right person

- Direct, daily access to the founder — fast decisions, no corporate layers

- A real senior role with genuine responsibility — not a task list

- Stable company, clear processes, documented strategy

- Confidentiality agreement required before onboarding

 

 

PLEASE APPLY VIA THIS PLATFORM

 

Please include:

- A short cover note (max 150 words) — why this role, why you. Be specific. Generic applications will not be considered.

- One concrete example of a time you flagged a problem proactively before it became an issue

- Your available hours and CET overlap

- Your personal situation and workspace setup

title: Appointment Setter — High-Ticket Sales (Instagram DMs)
description:
Schedule: EST hours required (Mon–Fri, minimum 9am–6pm EST)

Type: Part-time to Full-time | Contractor



Pay: Hourly + $100 commission per closed deal



About Us

We're a fast-growing brand in the financial sector, helping clients achieve real results through a premiu
ntorship program. We run a high-volume Instagram presence that generates warm leads daily, and we convert them through DMs. No cold calling. No
 blasts. Our content does the heavy lifting — we need a setter who can close the gap between interest and a booked call.



The Role

You will be the first human touchpoint for every lead that comes through our Instagram DMs. Your job is simple: respond fast, qualify the lead, and book a sales call.

Speed is everything. A lead that waits 30 minutes is a dead lead.

You'll work inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to manage contacts and track your pipeline, and inside Instagram DMs to run conversations. Scripts and SOPs are fully built — you're not starting from scratch.



What You'll Do



Monitor and respond to Instagram DM leads in real time during EST business hours

Follow our proven setter script to qualify prospects and handle early objections

Book qualified leads directly onto the sales calendar

Tag and update contacts in GoHighLevel after every interaction

Escalate hot leads immediately and flag unqualified ones correctly

Start at 5–10 booked calls per week, scaling to 2–3 booked calls per day as volume grows





You Must Have



Proven appointment setting experience in high-ticket offers ($2,000+). Do not apply if you've only done low-ticket or e-commerce.

Experience working in Instagram DMs as a setter

Familiarity with GoHighLevel or a similar CRM (HubSpot, ClickFunnels, etc.)

Excellent written English — conversational, warm, and persuasive

A quiet workspace, reliable internet, and a laptop or desktop

Availability during EST hours — this is non-negotiable

A track record you can prove — we will ask for it





You'll Thrive If You



Treat response time like your close rate depends on it — because it does

Know how to build trust over text without sounding scripted

Can handle objections in the DMs before the call even happens

Are self-managed and don't need to be chased to do your job

Are hungry — the commission is on top of your hourly, not instead of it





Compensation



Hourly rate (discussed upon hire)

$100 bonus for every deal that closes from your booked calls 

High performers will be rewarded as we scale





How to Apply

Record a 2–3 minute Loom video answering the following:



How many booked calls did you set last month, and what was the offer price?

Walk us through how you handle a lead who says "I need to think about it"

What CRM have you used and how did you track your pipeline?



Also include: Screenshots of real high-ticket DM conversations you've had as a setter. These can be anonymized — we just want to see how you communicate.

Applications without a Loom video AND screenshots will not be reviewed.

Send your Loom link, screenshots, and a short note about your experience

title: DM Setter/Appointment Setter via Social Media
description:
**WE'RE DOWN 1 ONE MORE POSITION, LOOKING FOR AN EXPERIENCED DM SETTER IN COACHING AND SPORTS PERFORMANCE**



NOW HIRING — Instagram DM Setter (Virtual Assistant) | Coaching & Mentorship

Remote | Full-Time | Philippines-Based | Performance Bonuses



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a fast-growing coaching and mentorship company helping individuals unlock their full potential and expand their professional opportunities. We are looking for a driven, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to serve as our Instagram DM Setter — the first point of contact for potential clients and the bridge between our audience and our coaching team.

This is not a copy-paste spam role. We are looking for someone who is genuinely curious, emotionally intelligent, and skilled at having natural conversations that uncover whether someone is the right fit for what we offer.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Your primary responsibility is to initiate and manage Instagram DM conversations that identify qualified leads — individuals who could genuinely benefit from our coaching program.



Reach out to and engage with target prospects on Instagram daily

Build genuine rapport through natural, thoughtful conversation

Ask strategic questions to identify and confirm the Big 3 qualifiers (see below)

Book qualified leads onto the calendar for a strategy call with our team

Track all outreach, conversations, and bookings in our CRM / tracking sheet

Follow up with warm leads who haven't yet booked

Report daily metrics and conversation updates to the team

Maintain a professional, consistent tone that reflects our brand voice





THE "BIG 3" QUALIFIER FRAMEWORK



A lead is only considered a QUALIFIED CALL when all three of the following qualifiers are confirmed within the DM conversation. Each qualified call earns you a $10 bonus — paid in addition to your base monthly salary, with no cap on how many you can earn.

QUALIFIER #1 — Age & Eligibility

The prospect must be a high school student or older. Our target market is 16–22 years of age. This ensures they are at a stage in life where our coaching can make a meaningful and lasting impact.

QUALIFIER #2 — Belief in Untapped Potential

The prospect must have expressed, in some form, that they believe their current results don't reflect what they're truly capable of. This can sound like: "I feel like I have more in me," "I know my velocity could be better," "I'm not operating at my ceiling," or anything of similar nature.

QUALIFIER #3 — Expressed Frustration or Motivation to Improve

The prospect must have clearly expressed a desire or frustration tied to improving their situation — whether that's career, income, performance, mindset, or overall opportunities. They want more, and they're ready to do something about it.

All three qualifiers must be confirmed before booking. A call that does not meet all Big 3 criteria will not count as a qualified call and will not earn the $10 per-call bonus. Quality over quantity — every bonus you earn should be one you're proud of.



KPIs & PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



DMs Sent Per Day — Minimum: 80+ | Top Performer: 120+

Response Rate — Minimum: 20%+ | Top Performer: 35%+

Qualified Calls Booked Per Month — Minimum: 25 | Top Performer: 40+

Lead-to-Call Conversion Rate — Minimum: 5%+ | Top Performer: 10%+

Response Time During Shift — Minimum: Under 10 min | Top Performer: Under 5 min

KPI reviews occur at 30, 60, and 90 days. Consistent underperformance on core metrics will be addressed with a performance improvement plan before any further action.



SCHEDULE & HOURS





Full-time position: 40 hour weeks, shifts listed below under "Typical shift".

Hours: Central Standard Time (CST) — our target audience is most active in the afternoon and evening

Typical shift: 4:00 PM – 10:00 PM CST Monday-Friday, 2:00 PM - 10 PM CST Saturday (38 hours a week). Morning hours see little to no engagement as our target audience (student-athletes) is in class and not active on Instagram during these times

You are expected to be online, responsive, and active during your full shift

Weekend coverage may be requested occasionally and will be compensated accordingly

We actively monitor activity during your shift. If hours are missed without prior notice, pay will be reduced accordingly for that time. In the event of a power outage, internet issue, or other circumstance outside your control, we are not responsible for pay during that lost time — however, you are welcome to make up those hours over the weekend to retain your full weekly pay





COMPENSATION & PAY SCALE



Starting Rate — $450/month base | $7 bonus per qualified call

30-Day Review (25+ qualified calls) — $475/month base | $10 bonus per qualified call

60-Day Review (25+ calls/month consistently) — $500/month base | $10 bonus per qualified call

Top Performer / 90-Day Review — $500/month base | $12 bonus per qualified call

HOW BONUSES WORK:

You earn $10 for every qualified call booked from day one. After your 30-day review, if you have consistently booked 25 or more qualified calls per month, your bonus scales to $12 per call. Top Performers who reach the 90-day milestone earn $15 per booked call. Bonuses are tracked weekly and paid out monthly alongside your base pay. There is no cap on the number of bonuses you can earn.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR





Excellent written English communication skills — natural, warm, and professional

Experience with Instagram and social media engagement (DM outreach experience is a strong plus)

Comfortable having real conversations — not just copy-pasting scripts

Detail-oriented with strong follow-through — you track everything

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently during your shift

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work environment

Familiarity with Google Sheets, CRMs, or any tracking tools is a plus

Previous experience as a VA, appointment setter, or sales support role preferred





HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please do ALL of the following when submitting your application:



Write "I read the full job description" at the top of your message.

Briefly describe (2–3 sentences) why you'd be a great DM setter

Share any relevant experience with Instagram outreach, appointment setting, or sales support

Include your availability and confirm you can work CST hours (2:00 PM – 10:00 PM)

Attach your resume or relevant portfolio



IMPORTANT: Write "I read the full job description" at the top of your message. We will not respond to messages that miss this request as an organization. This is our first test of attention to detail — a non-negotiable skill for this role.



We look forward to finding our next great DM Setter. If you're hungry, consistent, and love connecting with people — this role is for you.
salary: Base pay $450 month with bonus incentive

title: Automation & Full-Stack Specialist (Make.com / Supabase / React)
description:
About the Project

We operate a Premium Digital Intelligence Asset — a fully automated, AI-driven content platform built on a modern JAMstack. The system is functional but has a critical pipeline failure that requires a surgical, one-time fix by a specialist who can read execution logs, correct formula mappings, and verify the result end-to-end.



This is a focused, well-scoped engagement with clear acceptance criteria. A monthly maintenance retainer is available for the right candidate after the initial fix is confirmed.



The Stack

- Automation: 
 (scenario with 5 modules: RSS ? Gemini AI ? OpenAI ? SerpApi ? Supabase POST)

- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS enabled)

- Frontend: React / Vite / Tailwind (deployed via 
v)

- Image Search: SerpApi (Google Image Search)



What's Not Working — The Exact Bugs



Bug 1 — Pipeline Short-Circuit (Critical)

The 
 scenario runs on schedule and correctly pulls RSS feed titles. However, all downstream modules (Gemini AI [27], OpenAI [2], SerpApi [19]) appear to be bypassed. The Supabase module [24] writes rows with clean titles but null slugs, empty content, and broken image URLs. As of April 12, 2026: 458 rows inserted, 454 with null slugs, 454 with empty content, 436 with news page URLs instead of direct image files.



Bug 2 — SerpApi Image URL Failure

Module [19] (SerpApi) is configured with a fragile search query: get(split(27.Result; "Keywords:"); 1) — a substring extraction that breaks when Gemini output format varies. When this fails, SerpApi returns article page URLs (e.g., 
/..., 
/...) instead of direct image file URLs. The frontend receives these as image_url values, causing broken images on every article.



Bug 3 — Supabase JSON Body Mapping

Module [24] (Supabase POST) has formula mappings for slug, content, and image_url that are not resolving — all three fields write as null or empty. The title field (from RSS) writes correctly, confirming the module executes but formula references to upstream modules are broken.



Bug 4 — Frontend Link Desync (Downstream Effect)

Because 99% of rows have null slugs, the React frontend (HeroSection.tsx, ArticlePage.tsx) generates links as /article/ with no path, causing 404s on every article click. The frontend code itself is correct — this resolves automatically once the pipeline writes valid slugs.



Your Tasks



Task 1: Diagnose the 
 scenario execution logs to identify why modules [27] (Gemini) and [2] (OpenAI) are being bypassed. The scenario URL is: 
. Restore the correct execution chain so all 5 modules fire in sequence.



Task 2: Fix Module [19] (SerpApi). Replace the fragile get(split(...)) query with a reliable dynamic title reference. Set tbm=isch (image search), add tbs=itp:photos,isz:l to force large photos, set num=3. Confirm that SerpApi returns direct image file URLs (.jpg / .png / .webp), not webpage URLs.



Task 3: Fix Module [24] (Supabase POST) JSON body. The following fields must resolve correctly:

- title: Strip "Headline:" prefix and everything after the first newline using trim(first(split(...; newline)))

- slug: Lowercase, hyphenated, special-character-free slug derived from title

- content: Full OpenAI [2] output via 2.choices[1].message.content with quote and newline escaping

- image_url: 3-tier fallback — try images_results[1].original, then [2].original, then [3].original; block 
, 
,
.com, 
, 
, 
, 
, 
 at each tier; final fallback to a static Unsplash URL



Task 4: Run TRUNCATE TABLE public.articles RESTART IDENTITY in Supabase to clear 458 contaminated rows. Verify schema is intact (slug unique index, RLS policies). Trigger one manual "Run Once" in 
 and verify the inserted row has: clean title, populated slug, populated content (500+ characters), and a direct image URL ending 
g/.png/.webp.



Task 5: Verify the live frontend reflects the fix — hero carousel shows real article titles and images, article pages render full markdown content, Related Intelligence sidebar populates, all article links route correctly with no 404s.



What Success Looks Like

1. 
 scenario executes all 5 modules in sequence with no short-circuit

2. Every new Supabase row has: non-null slug, content >500 characters, image_url pointing to a direct image file

3. Zero news page URLs (
, 
, etc.) in the image_url column

4. Live site hero carousel displays real dynamic article titles and images with working links

5. A written diagnostic report explaining what was broken and what was changed



Requirements

Must-Have:

- Demonstrated 
 experience with complex formula syntax (split, trim, replace, nested if/and/contains)

- Supabase / PostgreSQL experience — can run SQL migrations, understands RLS policies

- Ability to read and debug 
 scenario execution logs

- React/TypeScript reading comprehension to verify frontend behavior (no coding required)

- Clear written English for diagnostic reporting



Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with SerpApi or Google Image Search APIs

- Familiarity with 
v or AI-assisted React builders

- Experience with RSS-to-AI automated content pipelines



Compensation

$100–$150 USD for the complete one-time fix (all 5 tasks above, verified end-to-end).

Monthly maintenance retainer available for the right candidate upon successful completion.



How to Apply

In your application, please include:

1. A brief description of a 
 scenario you have debugged or built with 3+ modules

2. Your experience level with Supabase (beginner / intermediate / advanced)

3. Your availability to start and estimated time to complete



Applications without specific 
 experience described will not be reviewed.

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Wedding Tech Startup + Founder Brand
description:
About Us



We're Foreverly, a US-based wedding tech startup building a platform that shows couples transparent wedding venue pricing. The founder also owns a wedding venue in Minnesota. We're creating content across TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn to grow both the company brand and the founders' personal brands.



What You'll Be Doing



You'll be our go-to editor for all short-form video content. Each week, we'll drop raw footage into a shared Google Drive folder. You turn that into finished, ready-to-post videos.



Some videos will be simple a talking head clip that just needs captions, a clean cut, and a hook on screen. Others will be more involved split-screen formats, screen recordings with voiceover, b-roll cuts, multi-clip story edits, trend-based formats, and more complex motion text. The mix will vary week to week.



Specifically, you'll handle:



Cutting raw footage into 15-90 second short-form videos

Adding auto-synced captions (styled to match current trending formats)

Text overlays, hooks on screen, lower thirds

Formatting and exporting for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

Suggesting cuts, hooks, or improvements when you see opportunities (we value creative input)

Occasional thumbnail creation or static graphics for carousels

Volume



Approximately 15-25 finished videos per week across company and personal brand content. Most weeks will be around 15. The majority will be for the Foreverly company accounts, with some for the founders' personal accounts.



What We're Looking For



Strong portfolio of short-form content (TikTok/Reels style, NOT wedding cinematography or corporate video)

Experience editing for personal brands, founders, or creators

You know what performs on social right now trending caption styles, pacing, hooks, transitions

Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

Fast turnaround: 24-48 hours per batch of videos

Reliable communication we move fast and need someone who responds within a few hours during working days

VERY GOOD English comprehension (all footage and direction will be in English)

Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience with startup or business content

Basic motion graphics

Familiarity with wedding industry content

Schedule and Availability



This is an ongoing part-time role, roughly 15-25 hours per week depending on volume. We batch film once a week (usually Sunday or Monday US time) and need first edits back within 48 hours. Flexible on your working hours as long as deliverables are on time.



How to Apply



Please send:



A link to your portfolio or 3-5 examples of short-form videos you've edited (TikTok/Reels style)

A brief note about your editing tools and turnaround time

Your hourly rate or monthly rate expectation

We'll send top candidates a paid test edit with raw footage to see how you work before committing.

title: Graphic Designer/ VA (Canva, Adobe, Thumbnails, Carousels)
description:
We are hiring a highly skilled Graphic Designer VA to join our team full-time.



This role is for someone who can design fast, think creatively, and produce high-quality assets daily.



You will be responsible for creating scroll-stopping visuals for social media and brand assets across multiple platforms.



This is not a beginner role and not for people who rely on AI tools to do the work for them.



What You’ll Be Doing

Design Instagram carousel posts (high-converting, clean, modern)

Create YouTube thumbnails (CTR-focused)

Design logos and brand assets

Create YouTube banners, LinkedIn banners,
 banners

Produce graphics for marketing campaigns and funnels

Support ongoing client work across multiple brands



Bonus (Not Required but Preferred):



Video editing using CapCut or professional editing software

Ability to assist with YouTube long-form video editing

Requirements (Read Carefully)



DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet ALL of these:



Minimum 5+ years experience in graphic design

Strong skills in Canva + Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)

Proven experience designing for social media (especially carousels + thumbnails)

Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

Strong understanding of modern, clean, high-converting design styles

Fluent English (written)

Reliable internet and consistent availability

Important: AI Use



We do NOT want designers who rely on AI to generate designs.



You may use tools to support your workflow, but you must be able to design from scratch with strong fundamentals.



Proof of Work (MANDATORY)



To be considered, you MUST include:



Portfolio of previous work

Carousels

Thumbnails

Banners

Logos

Loom video (REQUIRED) walking through:

Your best designs

Your design process



No portfolio or Loom = no response.



Who This Is NOT For

Beginners or junior designers

People who rely heavily on templates with no originality

Slow workers or poor communicators



We only want serious professionals who can deliver consistently at a high level.



Salary

title: Creative Ops Manager (Fast-Paced DTC Creative Team)
description:
Description:



We’re a fast-moving creative strategy studio working with 7–8 figure ecom brands.



We produce 60+ creative briefs per week across multiple clients.

Each client has different systems, naming conventions, and workflows.



Your role is to bring order, speed, and structure to all of it.



What you’ll do:



Prepare each sprint across multiple clients

Follow and apply client-specific naming conventions (every client is different)

Create and organize Google Drive folders for UGC production

Ensure every brief is linked to the correct Drive folder

Copy + organize briefs into client Notion workspaces

Assign creators and track progress daily

Keep deadlines tight (nothing slips)

Update clients with key info (ex: creator shipping details)

Flag issues before they happen



System ownership (very important):



You are not just executing.



You are expected to:



Constantly ask: “How can we do this better?”

Improve workflows (Notion, Drive, tracking, communication)

Use ChatGPT / AI to optimize systems and save time



If you don’t naturally think about improving systems ? this is not the right role.



This role is for you if:



You think in systems, not just tasks

You are proactive and take initiative

You are detail-obsessed (naming, structure, organization)

You are fast and responsive

You are comfortable with high volume work

Experience in DTC or agency = strong plus



Availability (NON-NEGOTIABLE):



You must be available and responsive:



5–6AM to 2–3PM PST (Monday–Friday)



You don’t need to work nonstop,

but you MUST respond quickly during these hours.



No ghosting. No delays.

title: AI Video Editor & Graphic Designer — Shopify eCommerce (Digital Products)
description:
We're a growing Shopify store selling digital download products (craft & quilt patterns). We need an AI-powered Video Editor & Graphic Designer who can produce high-volume, scroll-stopping content for
 Ads,
 campaigns, and social media — fast.

This is NOT a traditional design role. We need someone who uses AI tools to work 3x faster than a normal designer. If you're still doing everything manually in 2026, this isn't the right fit.

What You'll Do Every Week:

— Create 10–15 short-form video ads (Reels/Stories format) for
 Ads using footage, templates, and AI tools

— Design static ad creatives, product mockups, and promotional banners for campaigns

— Edit and enhance product images for our Shopify store

— Design
 marketing graphics (banners, headers, product showcases) for Omnisend campaigns

— Create social media content (posts, carousels, stories) for
 and Instagram

— Produce quick-turnaround variations of winning ads (different hooks, colors, CTAs) for A/B testing

— Organize and maintain all design assets in a shared drive with clear naming conventions

Required Tools & Skills (Non-Negotiable):

— Canva Pro (advanced — not just basic templates)

— CapCut or Adobe Premiere Pro for video editing

— AI tools: Midjourney, ChatGPT, Runway, Leonardo AI, or similar for image/video generation

— Photoshop or Photopea for photo editing and mockups

— Basic understanding of what makes a
 Ad convert (hook, visual contrast, clear CTA)

— Familiarity with Shopify product image requirements

Bonus (Not Required But Will Get You Hired Faster):

— Experience creating ads for digital products, printables, or craft niches

— Familiarity with Omnisend or Klaviyo
 templates

— Motion graphics or animation skills (After Effects, Lottie)

— Understanding of direct-response advertising creative principles

What We Expect:

— Turnaround: Most tasks delivered within 24 hours

— Communication: Daily check-in via Slack or your assigned project management tool

— Reliability: Show up on time, hit deadlines, no excuses

— Speed over perfection: We test fast. We need volume. Polish comes after we find winners

— Self-starter: You don't wait to be told what to do — you flag problems, suggest ideas, and improve

How to Apply (READ THIS — Applications That Don't Follow Instructions Will Be Ignored):



Send your portfolio link showing at least 3 video ads AND 3 static ad designs you've created

Tell me which AI tools you currently use and how they speed up your workflow

Record a 2-minute Loom video showing one of your AI-assisted design workflows (e.g., creating an ad from scratch using AI + Canva/CapCut)

Include the word "PIXEL" at the top of your application so I know you read this



Do NOT send a generic "I'm a hard worker" message. Show me your work.

title: DME Billing manager and customer service
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented DME Intake Coordinator to manage the intake and distribution of medical supplies.

This role involves coordinating with suppliers, checking eligibility and benefits, verifying coverage guidelines with various insurance companies, ensuring the correct products are authorized, and ensuring compliance with each insurance plan’s policies.

Knowledgeable in Brightree Software and Insurance billing for DME is a must.

Reach out to healthcare providers to verify patient prescriptions and medical notes. Ensure that prescriptions meet the requirements for medical supplies and that all information is accurately documented.

Maintain regular communication with patients to ensure they are informed throughout the process. Address any concerns or questions they may have regarding their eligibility, coverage, or products.

Tracking inventory and ensuring the timely delivery to patients. The ideal candidate will possess strong organizational skills and a background in healthcare supply chain management. If you are passionate about supporting healthcare providers and have experience in the medical industry, we would like to hear from you.

title: On-call appointment setter | Requires Neutral Accent | Work 15 minutes, get paid for an hour! | (Hourly + Commissions)
description:
We're looking for an appointment setter to call new leads within 5 minutes and book them into discovery calls with our founder. There is a low quantity of leads so this is best suited as a second job (very easy to accomplish these tasks while working another remote job). 

IMPORTANT: You MUST be able to make these calls within 5 minutes of being notified.



About us:

We provide AI and automation for small business (primarily HVAC companies) in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

Leads come in through our ads and need to be called within 5 minutes of the lead submitting their form — so you need to be available, responsive, and ready to dial fast during business hours. 



What you'll do:

* Call inbound leads within 5 minutes of being notified

* Follow a framework to qualify and book discovery calls

* Log call outcomes and notes after each call (each call will be recorded to make this process easier for you)



Compensation:

* For each call you make, you will be paid for a full hour at $3/hour (even though it only take 5-15 minutes, so it's equivalent to $12-$36/hour!)

* PLUS, $20 per booked and completed discovery call (the lead must attend the booked meeting)

* PLUS, $25 bonus if the lead closes into a paying client

* You can earn $45+ from only 5 minutes of your time!



Requirements:

* Appointment setting or sales experience required

* Must have minimal accent and be fluent in English as you will be speaking with Canadian business owners and must be clearly understood on the phone

* You won't have to use much time each day, but you need to be available Monday–Friday at least from 9am-5pm MDT (local time in Calgary, Canada)

* Comfortable making outbound phone calls for appointment setting to small business owners

* Reliable, high speed internet connection — dropped calls are not acceptable in this role

* Good quality microphone or headset so you can be heard clearly

* A computer do your work on and an iPhone (or other smartphone with similar capabilities) to receive notifications

* Reliable, responsive, and able to act fast when a lead comes in



Extra points if you have:

* Extra availability: the ideal applicant would be available between 8am-8pm in the Calgary, Canada time zone, as well as weekends if you’d like to earn more money!

* Formal education in a related field such as business, communications, marketing, etc



You will likely only have to work for 5-45 minutes per day, but get paid for 1-3 hours! (PLUS commission and bonuses!)



This is an early-stage role with room to grow as we scale ad spend. We would love to have our VA grow with our company into a full-time role.



To apply, you MUST answer the following questions and include the required information in your initial application:

1. Include your resume and short cover letter

2. This role requires you to call new leads within 5 minutes of being notified. Do you have the ability and availability to stop what you're doing and make a call within 5 minutes?

3. Make a short voice or video and tell us about your previous experience with outbound calling or appointment setting, as well as your daily availability (youtube, Loom, or vocaroo recommended). Paste the link in your application. Applicants that do not complete this will not be considered.



***Applicants that do not include a recording will not be considered***

title: Part-Time Social Media + Influencer Outreach VA for VeriBite
description:
We are looking for a part-time virtual assistant to help grow VeriBite, an early-stage food and health tech app.



VeriBite helps people scan full meals, menus, and labels to see hidden ingredients, food quality, and body impact.



This role is focused on social media support and creator/influencer outreach.



What you will do:

 • Schedule and post approved content on X, TikTok, and Instagram

 • Repurpose screenshots, scan demos, and screen recordings into clean posts

 • Reply to comments and DMs using our brand tone

 • Research micro-influencers in food, fitness, wellness, clean eating, GLP-1, seed oil awareness, and biohacking

 • Send personalized outreach inviting creators to try VeriBite during pilot

 • Maintain a spreadsheet of outreach, replies, follow-ups, and creator status

 • Flag strong partnership or creator opportunities



Important:

 • You will not be expected to invent product claims from scratch

 • We will provide screenshots, app recordings, talking points, and product context

 • Your job is to turn that into polished content, thoughtful replies, and personalized outreach

 • This is not spam outreach. Messages must be personalized and well written



Requirements:

 • Strong written English

 • Organized and detail-oriented

 • Comfortable using X, TikTok, and Instagram

 • Comfortable researching creators and sending outreach

 • Able to follow tone/brand instructions

 • Bonus if you know health, nutrition, fitness, food, or wellness niches



Hours:

 • Start at 10 hours per week

 • Potential to grow if performance is strong



To apply:

Please include the word “scanner” in the first line of your application so I know you read the full post.



Also answer these:

 1. Have you managed posting or engagement for X, TikTok, or Instagram before?

 2. Have you done influencer or creator outreach before?

 3. Write one sample DM inviting a wellness creator to try an early-access food scanning app.

 4. Write one sample X reply to a post about seed oils in restaurant food.

 5. Tell me your hourly rate and weekly availability.

title: Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist
description:
We are a U.S.-based eCommerce company specializing in mobility scooters and power wheelchairs, and we are hiring a full-time Customer Service Representative to handle inbound phone calls,
s, and order processing using HubSpot. In this role, you will answer incoming customer calls (no cold calling), respond to
s, manage tickets in HubSpot, process orders accurately, and assist customers with product questions and order updates. You should be comfortable handling a high volume of daily calls and messages (typically 30–60 calls per day depending on volume).



The role is full-time (40 hours per week), with working hours from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST, and includes a 1-hour paid break. Compensation is $1,400/month, along with 10 days of paid time off and 7 sick days annually. No work is required during approved leave.



We are looking for someone with strong spoken and written English, as communication with customers is a critical part of this role. Prior experience in phone-based customer service is required, and experience with HubSpot or a similar CRM is preferred. You must have a reliable internet connection, a quiet workspace, and a backup internet and power solution in case of outages.



Performance will be measured based on response time, call handling, accuracy in order processing, and overall customer satisfaction.



To apply, please include your experience with phone customer service, your CRM experience (HubSpot preferred), and a required 1-minute video introduction where you clearly speak so we can assess your English and communication skills.



Important: Applications without a video introduction will not be considered. To confirm you have read this job description, include the word “Mobility” in your application.

title: Legal-Based Debt Recovery Agent (UK Debt Recovery
description:
About us 



We’re a UK-based credit management and debt recovery firm supporting small businesses. We're firm, fair, and compliant. We focus on outcomes, but we also care about doing the work properly and maintaining professional standards throughout. We already have a well-established team based in the Philippines, and this role will work closely with them.



The role 

We’re hiring a senior debt recovery specialist to manage a high-volume portfolio of UK debt recovery cases with compliance rigour and evidence discipline. This is a compliance-led role with strong case management: you will assess cases for disputes and escalation, gather and document evidence properly, make sound escalation decisions, and communicate clearly with clients and third parties. The balance between case analysis, documentation, and client communication will vary week to week depending on the portfolio.



You will handle a mix of:

• Commercial debts (e.g., Ltd companies)

• Consumer/sole trader matters where the Pre-Action Protocol (PAP) applies

We will train you on the nuances of UK debt recovery law and process; we are hiring for legal literacy and compliance capability.



Hours 

This role is available part-time or full-time (20–40 hours/week). We can offer 40 hours/week immediately for the right candidate. Please confirm your preferred weekly hours and availability in your application.

Salary and bonuses

Salary is up to PHP 50,000/month for the right candidate (depending on experience and performance), plus performance bonuses. This role is paid in PHP and you’ll be joining an established Philippines-based team.

Key responsibilities

• Assess cases for disputes, defences, and evidence gaps; identify issues early and escalate appropriately

• Gather, review, and document evidence (invoices, correspondence, contracts, payment records) to build a clear case narrative

• Draft clear, professional written communications to debtors, clients, and third parties (letters, evidence summaries, escalation memos)

• Identify when cases require legal escalation (statutory demands, court proceedings, etc.) and prepare appropriate paperwork

• Manage compliance-led processes: ensure all actions follow UK law, maintain audit trails, and document decision-making

• Communicate professionally with clients when required (case updates, escalation recommendations, dispute resolution)

• Maintain excellent case notes, timelines, and follow-up discipline so nothing is missed

• Take ownership of progressing cases daily and working to targets (quality and compliance-focused, not “busy work”)



What success looks like



• Cases are assessed thoroughly; disputes and escalation decisions are sound and well-documented

• Written communications are clear, professional, and legally compliant

• Evidence is gathered systematically and presented persuasively

• Notes are accurate, complete, and audit-ready (dates, amounts, evidence summaries, dispute details, escalation decisions, and next actions)

• You remain calm, professional, and objective under pressure; you can make difficult decisions and justify them

• You take pride in doing things properly, not just quickly



Performance and incentives 



We work toward clear targets and reward performance. Bonuses are based on results and quality (e.g., case closures, evidence quality, compliance with standards, and client satisfaction).

Must-have requirements (please don’t apply if you don’t meet these)



• Legal background (law degree, paralegal qualification, or equivalent) OR 3+ years of experience in a legal-services or compliance-led collections environment

• Experience working in a high-volume legal or collections environment (agency or in-house team)

• Demonstrable experience managing disputes, gathering evidence, and making escalation decisions

• Strong written English and the ability to draft clear, professional legal communications

• High attention to detail and strong personal organisation (case notes and documentation are non-negotiable)

• Professional judgement and emotional regulation: objective and composed, able to make difficult decisions

• Comfortable handling a mixed portfolio (commercial and consumer/sole trader matters)

• Comfortable being client-facing when required: able to communicate clearly and professionally with business owners/clients and third parties

• Understanding of legal/compliance-led debt recovery processes: able to work within due diligence frameworks and understand escalation pathways

Work setup requirements (must-have)

• Reliable laptop/desktop suitable for daily case management work

• Stable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet, private workspace for calls and written work

• Headset with clear audio (noise-cancelling preferred)

• Working webcam and microphone (required for interview, training, and occasional check-ins)

• Backup internet option (mobile data is fine) for continuity

• You must be able to maintain consistent connectivity during agreed working hours

• We provide the calling/VOIP system for debtor calls



Additional experience (beneficial, but not required) If you don’t have these, you can still be a strong fit — please apply if you meet the must-haves.



• UK debt recovery exposure (e.g., familiarity with LBA/PAP, UK court/claims process, or UK compliance expectations)



Fit and standards



This is not a customer service role. We're seeking a legal professional who can accurately assess cases, make sound decisions, and document everything thoroughly. If you prefer a highly scripted environment, avoid written work, or struggle with compliance-driven processes, this role will not be a good fit.

Screening



To be considered, you must complete our short TestGorilla assessment. We will only review candidates who complete the assessment.

title: Resume Reviewer Expert Level Manager HIGH Volume US Candidates
description:

Your primary task will be to qualify or disqualify candidates based on their prior experience, answers to questions, location, and skill sets that align with employers' needs. This position requires someone with strong attention to detail, a keen eye for spotting key qualifications, and the ability to work efficiently in a very high-volume, fast-paced environment.



Responsibilities:

• Evaluate candidates based on their experience, answers to questions, location, and relevant skills

• Consistently maintain a high level of accuracy in identifying qualified applicants.

• Collaborate with hiring teams to ensure alignment between job requirements and candidate profiles.

• Manage a high volume of resumes while ensuring quality and consistency in evaluations.



Requirements:

**CANDIDATE NEEDS TO BE 100% FLUENT IN SPEAKING, READING AND WRITING ENGLISH**

• Strong attention to detail and ability to spot key qualifications quickly.

• Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage a high volume of resumes.

• Ability to work efficiently and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal.

• Previous experience in resume screening or recruitment in the US is a MUST

• Able to work 6 days per week during EST/eastern standard time hours

• Proficiency in Job Websites such as ZipRecruiter, Indeed, etc.



Why Join Us:

• Competitive compensation.- LONG TERM PROJECT

• Opportunity to work in a fast-paced, high-energy environment.

• Collaborative team culture with opportunities for growth and development.



If you are passionate about helping match top talent with the right opportunities and thrive in a fast-moving environment, we encourage you to apply for the Resume Reviewer position today!



Weekly payments made via PayPal

title: Growing Hospitality Company Needs Dynamic Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Our organization collaborates extensively with remote workers based in the Philippines, and we

are currently seeking to expand our team by adding a new role: Virtual Executive Assistant.



Duties and Responsibilities: The Virtual Executive Assistant will be involved in the research,

execution, and administrative oversight of various business units, including but not limited to the

Short Term Rental Business, Tax Lien services, Amazon Kindle Direct Publishing, and other

related ventures.



This role encompasses tasks such as conducting research and interfacing with members of our

team, ranging from General Managers at our properties, to the Philippines-based Guest Services

Team, Operations Teams, as well as contractors and service providers based in the United

States.



The Virtual Executive Assistant will engage with various tea
mbers through voice calls,

, 
, and SMS to ensure seamless coordination and communication.



ABOUT US



Our organization operates distinct but interrelated business operations across various sectors,

including Short Term Rentals (Airbnb) in multiple states, Tax Lien services focused on real

estate in numerous states, Amazon Kindle Direct Publishing, and administrative support

services.

We have experienced significant growth and, with the right team, we look forward to continuing

our expansion and success.

We are excited about the prospect of welcoming a dedicated and skilled Virtual Executive

Assistant to our team. Your contributions will play a vital role in our ongoing success and

development.



REQUIREMENTS



Prospective applicants are kindly advised to apply only if they currently fulfill all of the following

criteria:

? Possession of knowledge and proficiency with the following platforms: Hostaway, Airbnb,

Cloudbed, 
, Keycafe, Remotelock, and Airtable.

? Comprehensive understanding of the Short-Term Rental Industry.

? No Secondary Employment. Applicants must be fully dedicated to this position to ensure

undivided attention and focus.

? Proficiency in Problem Solving and Research. While training will be provided for

procedural tasks, certain tasks may require independent problem-solving skills. This

could involve researching on Google, consulting support documentation, or making

phone calls to obtain necessary information.

? Organizational Skills. Given the involvement in multiple projects, applicants should

demonstrate a natural inclination towards maintaining their own notes, calendars,

reminders, and references. While a task list with pertinent dates will be provided,

applicants must be able to accommodate changes and follow up on various action items.

? Attention to Detail. Projects undertaken involve critical elements that cannot be

overlooked or forgotten, as such lapses could result in significant issues. An eye for

detail will ensure that all aspects are diligently managed.

? Availability of a backup generator or an alternative power plan.

? Possession of a secondary internet connection.

? Ability to communicate with the rest of the team in a professional and clear manner



TRAINING



A training period of approximately 2 to 4 weeks will be conducted with one of our co-founders

and our Operations Manager (also based in the Philippines). This training will encompass

learning our tools, processes, guest interaction tone, and general operations.



Platforms Utilized



Prospective candidates are informed that familiarity with the following platforms is not a

prerequisite, as comprehensive training will be provided for all:

? Airtable: Utilized as a database for information regarding all units, as well as policies,

procedures, and team contact details.

? 
: Employed for communication, with segmentation by unit group to ensure

clarity.

? Grasshopper: Used for SMS and phone communication with guests, maintenance,

housekeeping, and the team.

Payroll Bond

Upon commencement of training, GSA shall receive a monthly salary of $500, with $100 per

month being retained as a bond. This bond shall be released after a period of six (6) months.

title: Growing Hospitality Company Needs Full Time Dynamic Guest Service Agents!
description:
** POSITION ** 

Guest Services Agent

We are looking to continue growing our Guest Services team. This individual will be on a team ensuring our high standards are met in both the timeliness and quality of responses to our guests, and to engage on our behalf with Airbnb as needed.





** ABOUT Briefly Home **

We operate short term rentals in the US, primarily on Airbnb, but some are also on VRBO and 
. We have grown tremendously over the past year and we are looking for high value, high performing individuals to grow with us.



Our team operates around the clock - 24/7 and 365 days a year.  The Guest Services team is primarily responsible for:

Approving and updating reservations as necessary for guests according to company policy

Assisting guests with arrival and house operations (such as where to find certain items, etc)

Interfacing with the housekeeping team as needed for housekeeping related needs and issues

Accurately completing additional shift specific tasks





** POSITION REQUIREMENTS **

If you do not currently meet all of the following requirements, please wait to apply until you do.



No Other Jobs

This position must be the only position you are working so there is no divided focus.



Electrical Backup Plan

Backup generator / alternate power plan that will allow you to resume normal operations within 10 minutes in the case of a power outage. You will be 

 asked to provide details of the backup prior to a job offer.



Internet Backup Plan

Backup internet / alternate internet plan that will allow you to resume normal operations within 10 minutes in the case of an internet outage. You will be 

 asked to provide details of the backup prior to a job offer.





Laptop

As this position is remote, you are expected to have reliable, consistent access to your own laptop / desktop computer. This position can not be fulfilled from a cell phone.



English Proficiency

  Most of our guests speak English as their first or second language, and all communication is done in English. Therefore you must be extremely proficient 

  in BOTH spoken and written English.  You will complete a verbal and a written exchange with one of our tea
mbers to test for proficiency prior to a 

  job offer.





Company Standard Operating Tools and Procedures

Training will be provided covering all tools, systems, policies, and procedures. The successful applicant will possess the the ability to understand and internalize company information, think through *all steps* of a problem and solution.



Communication

The successful candidate will communicate with guests in very positive and upbeat manner and communicate with the rest of our team in a professional, 

 clear manner.



** PRIOR TO FIRST DAY OF TRAINING REQUIREMENTS **

 Our team uses 
 (think of it as the free alternative to Slack). Prior to the first day of training, the successful applicant must have installed and have a user 

 name on the free 
 app.



** TRAINING **

Roughly two weeks of training with our Guest Services Manager and internal management team learning our tools, our process, our tone with guests, and general operations; followed by role playing and shadowing of an experienced Guest Services tea
mber.

Important:

Why Join Us?

• Supportive, collaborative team culture

• Room for growth and learning in the recruiting & HR space

title: Content Talent Manager
description:
About the Role:

_____________________________



We're looking for a highly organized, creatively sharp Content Talent Manager to own our UGC creator ecosystem across multiple ecommerce brands. You'll be the connective tissue between our creative strategists and the creators who bring our ad concepts to life. This looks like managing relationships, sourcing new talent, ensuring content lands on time, and making sure every asset that enters our pipeline is built to convert.



This is a remote, part-time role with real ownership. You'll manage a monthly creator budget of $25,000+ and be held directly accountable to that KPI. If you have a talent for building relationships, a nose for high-converting content, and the organizational discipline to run a pipeline of 20+ creators without dropping a ball... we want to hear from you!



Responsibilities:

_____________________________



Creator Communication & Brief Management



• Serve as the primary point of contact for all UGC talent — translating creative briefs from our strategists into clear, actionable direction for creators.

• Manage timelines and follow-ups to ensure content is delivered on schedule.

• Provide constructive, on-brand feedback on submitted content and address creator questions promptly.

• Have the confidence to reject content that won't convert — clearly and professionally.



Talent Sourcing & Onboarding



• Proactively seed and recruit new UGC talent across Backstage, Instagram,
/X, TikTok Creator Marketplace, and other relevant channels.

• Own the full onboarding process for new creators: brand guidelines, tone of voice, content dos/don'ts, and contract execution.

• Coordinate with our fulfillment center to ship product samples to new and active talent.



Budget & Contract Management



• Own and manage a monthly creator budget of $25,000+, tracking spend and reporting against KPIs.

• Negotiate creator rates, whitelisting agreements, partnership deals, and monthly retainers.

• Manage all creator contracts including signing, renewals, usage rights, and whitelisting terms.



Roster Management & Performance



• Maintain a tiered creator roster (A/B/C) based on content quality, reliability, and conversion performance.

• Actively prune underperformers and identify new talent to fill gaps.

• Review ad performance data (hook rate, CTR, thumbstop, ROAS) and feed insights back to creators to continuously improve output quality.



Content Calendar & Asset Management



• Own a rolling 4–6 week content calendar to ensure a predictable, consistent inflow of assets for the creative team.

• Upload and organize all delivered creator assets inside Frame.io in a clearly structured, editor-ready format.



What We're Looking For

_____________________________



• A sharp eye for what makes a high-converting ad creative — you can tell within seconds whether a piece of content will hook or flop.

• Comfortable holding the line on quality — you won't approve content that doesn't meet the brief or the bar, no matter who made it.

• Excellent communicator with genuine patience — working with creators can be unpredictable, and you handle it with professionalism and warmth.

• Exceptionally organized — you're managing 15–25+ active creator relationships simultaneously without anything slipping through the cracks.

• Analytically minded — you can read basic performance metrics and use them to coach creators and improve content over time.

• Experienced with creator platforms, talent sourcing, or influencer/UGC management (agency or in-house).

• Familiarity with tools like Frame.io, Notion, Slack, and Meta Ads Manager is a plus.



If you got this far... please add the keyword: "Scale" into your intro message. This will show me that you are a serious candidate and your application will be favored :)



What Success Looks Like

_____________________________



• Monthly creator budget is consistently allocated and tracked with zero overruns.

• The creative team always has a 4+ week backlog of ready-to-edit UGC assets.

• Creator satisfaction is high — low churn, fast turnarounds, and quality improving over time.

• You're proactively surfacing new talent before gaps appear in the roster.

• Content quality scores improve as performance feedback loops back to creators.

title: Paid Social Video Editor
description:
About Us



We are a rapidly growing direct-to-consumer electronics brand specializing in protective earbuds for hunters and avid shooters. Launched just three months ago, we've achieved exceptional growth through strategic Meta advertising campaigns, currently scaling from $120,000/month to $500,000+/month in ad spend. Our lean team is focused on performance-driven creative that converts.



Position Overview



We're seeking a highly skilled Full-Time Paid Social Video Editor to join our creative team and help drive our aggressive scaling goals on Meta platforms. You'll work closely with our Creative Strategist and content creators to produce high-performing video ads that resonate with our target audience and drive conversions at scale.



Key Responsibilities



* Video Production: Produce 8-10 unique concept videos per week for Meta advertising campaigns

* Creative Execution: Transform creative briefs into compelling video ads across multiple formats including UGC, AI UGC, AI B-roll, and VSLs (Video Sales Letters)

* Brief Adherence: Meticulously follow creative briefs and strategist direction while maintaining attention to detail throughout the editing process

* Collaboration: Work closely with the Creative Strategist to implement feedback, refine concepts, and iterate on creative approaches

* Quality Control: Ensure all video outputs meet brand standards and performance benchmarks

* Asset Management: Organize and maintain video assets, templates, and project files efficiently

* Performance Optimization: Adapt editing techniques based on creative performance data and platform best practices





Experience Requirements



* 2+ years of proven experience creating Meta ad creatives for direct-response e-commerce brands

* Extensive portfolio demonstrating expertise in:



UGC (User-Generated Content) ads

AI UGC ads

AI B-roll ads

VSLs (Video Sales Letters)



* Track record of producing ads that have driven measurable performance results



Technical Skills



* Expert proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or similar)

* Strong understanding of Meta ad specifications, platform requirements, and best practices

* Experience with AI tools for content creation (e.g., HeyGen, Arc Ads, ElevenLabs, or similar)

* Knowledge of motion graphics and text animation

* Understanding of sound design and audio mixing for social media



Key Competencies



* Exceptional attention to detail with ability to follow briefs precisely

* Strong understanding of direct-response advertising principles

* Ability to work efficiently under deadline pressure while maintaining quality

* Self-motivated with excellent time management skills

* Strong communication skills for collaborating with remote teams

* Creative problem-solving abilities



Preferred Qualifications (Bonus)



* Experience designing static ads for Meta platforms

* Knowledge of graphic design software (Adobe Photoshop, Canva, Figma)

* Experience in the hunting, outdoor, tactical, or consumer electronics niches

* Understanding of Meta Ads Manager and creative performance metrics





Portfolio Requirements



Your portfolio must include:



* Multiple examples of UGC-style ads you've edited

* Examples of AI UGC ads demonstrating realistic execution

* AI B-roll ads showing creative use of AI-generated footage

* Before/after examples or case studies showing performance results (if available)



Note: Applications without a comprehensive portfolio demonstrating the required ad formats will not be considered.



What We Offer



* Competitive full-time compensation commensurate with experience

* High-impact role on a rapidly scaling brand with proven product-market fit

* Creative autonomy within strategic frameworks

* Direct collaboration with experienced performance marketers

* Remote flexibility - work from anywhere

* Growth opportunity - be part of a brand scaling from $120k/month to $500k+/month in ad spend

* Fast-paced environment where your work directly impacts revenue and growth



Expected Workflow



* Receive creative briefs from Creative Strategist

* Produce 8-10 unique concept videos weekly across various formats

* Implement feedback and revisions from strategist and founder

* Maintain organized asset library and project files

* Participate in creative strategy discussions and performance reviews

title: Paid Social Creative Strategist
description:
About Us



We are a rapidly growing direct-to-consumer electronics brand specializing in protective earbuds. Launched just three months ago, we've achieved exceptional growth through strategic Meta advertising campaigns. Our current team includes two video editors, one customer service representative, and partnership with specialized agencies for
 marketing and Google Ads.



Position Overview



We're seeking an experienced Paid Social Creative Strategist to drive our next phase of growth on Meta platforms. This role will take full ownership of creative strategy as we scale our Meta advertising spend from $120,000/month to a minimum of $500,000/month. We believe exceptional creative is the key lever that will unlock this growth trajectory.



Key Responsibilities



* Creative Strategy Development: Develop and execute comprehensive creative strategies aligned with scaling objectives on Meta platforms

* Video Brief Production: Produce 15-20 detailed video creative briefs per week (1-2 minutes in length each)

* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with our in-house video editing team to refine creative output through detailed feedback, revisions, and quality control

* Creator Management: Coordinate with content creators to source, direct, and optimize video content production

* Performance Analysis: Monitor creative performance metrics and iterate strategies based on data-driven insights

* Trend Identification: Stay current on Meta advertising best practices, platform updates, and creative trends within the e-commerce and consumer electronics space



Requirements



* Proven Experience: Extensive hands-on experience managing creative strategy for high-performing Meta advertising campaigns

* Scale Experience: Demonstrated track record of scaling Meta ad accounts, preferably from six figures to seven figures monthly in spend

* Direct-Response Expertise: Deep understanding of direct-response creative principles and what drives performance in e-commerce

* Production Knowledge: Strong understanding of video production workflows and effective collaboration with editors and creators

* Data-Driven Approach: Ability to analyze creative performance data and translate insights into actionable strategy

* Portfolio Required: Must provide portfolio demonstrating relevant experience with Meta ad creative



What We Offer



*High-Impact Role: Direct influence on company growth during a critical scaling phase

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a lean, focused team of specialists

*Growth Opportunity: Potential to transition to full-time as we scale

*Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere

*Creative Autonomy: Ownership over creative strategy direction

title: FOIA & Body Camera Footage Research Specialist
description:
We are looking for someone who can help us find real police body camera footage and real crime cases for video content.



This is research work only.



You are not editing videos and not recording footage.



Your job is to find real cases and the correct police department that owns the footage.



What You Will Do



Find real police cases, such as:



Fraud cases



Fake check or bank fraud arrests



Traffic stops



Police chases



Arrest bodycam footage



Find:



Bodycam videos already released online



Or where to request the footage legally



Submit or help prepare public records requests (FOIA / Open Records)



Keep everything organized in a spreadsheet:



Case name



City and state



Police department



Link to footage or request status



Important Rules



All footage must be:



Real



Legal



Publicly released or requested through official police departments



Do NOT use:



Leaked footage



Stolen footage



Fake or recreated videos

title: SENIOR BRAND INTEGRATOR | Personal Brand & Education Company Part-Time to Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term
description:
READ THIS FIRST

This role requires real experience.

Not "I've helped with social media" experience.

Not "I'm a fast learner" experience.

I mean: you have worked inside a personal brand or online business, you owned specific results, and you can show me exactly what you built and what happened because of it.

If that is you — keep reading.

If you are still building your skills — this is not the right fit, and that is okay.



ABOUT THIS WORK

I run a wealth coaching and personal brand education company.

I create content, lead programs, coach clients, and cast the vision.

I need someone who handles everything else — end to end — so I can stay in my zone of genius.

This is not a support role. This is a results role.

You will own real outcomes. You will be expected to track them, report on them, and continuously improve them.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN — AND EXECUTE YOURSELF

Podcast Production (end to end)



Edit full episodes in Riverside

Write show notes and episode titles

Create audiograms and clips

Publish and distribute across platforms



Content Creation & Social Media



Design carousels, graphics, and social posts in Canva

Write captions in my brand voice

Schedule and post across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

Repurpose long-form content into short-form assets

Maintain the content calendar

Track what performs and tell me what the data says



Outreach & Pipeline



Execute LinkedIn outreach sequences for coaching clients

Research and pitch podcasts for guest appearances

Manage the outreach tracker and follow-up pipeline

Report on open rates, responses, and booked calls



Course Platform & Operations



Manage Kajabi — pages, sequences, automations, and workflows

Support course launches and
 campaigns

Create simple SOPs and systems as we grow

Keep projects moving without being chased





THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



You need step-by-step instructions for every task

You have fewer than 3 years of experience inside an online business or personal brand

You cannot show specific examples of results you produced

You are not comfortable being accountable to metrics





THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

You have been inside a real online business and you owned something.

You can show me a podcast you edited, a carousel you designed, a launch you supported, an outreach campaign you ran — and tell me exactly what the outcome was.

You think ahead. You notice gaps. You bring solutions, not just questions.

You want to be part of something long-term and grow as the brand grows.



TOOLS YOU MUST ALREADY KNOW



Riverside (podcast editing)

Kajabi

Canva

Meta and LinkedIn scheduling tools



Bonus: CapCut, ManyChat,
 marketing, analytics dashboards



TO APPLY

All four are required. Missing anything means your application will not be reviewed.



Voice note (60–90 seconds) — introduce yourself and tell me one result you produced in a previous role. Not what you did. What happened because of what you did.

Portfolio or examples — show me at least two things you made or built: a podcast edit, a carousel, a Kajabi page, an outreach tracker — anything real

A short answer — what does being accountable to results mean to you, and how have you tracked your own performance in past roles?

The word EXPANSION in your subject line

mbers who are just as passionate about making an impact as we are. If you're highly organized, client-focused, and thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, we want YOU to be part of the Driven team.

Generator

s, and mail; redirect or prioritize as appropriate.

THE IDEAL CANDIDATE:

Detail-oriented, proactive, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.













Experience with technology & tools:

Comprehensive knowledge of Gdrive & GSuite tools 

Quickbooks 



NEXT STEPS:



If this position sounds like YOU and you’re jumping for JOY at this opportunity, follow these instructions very carefully:



Send your updated resume/CV and cover letter answering the following questions to 



What attracts YOU to this position & why are you the BEST candidate?

What are the QUALITIES that make you a great assistant and tea
mber?

How many YEARS of experience do you have with Quickbooks Online?

How many YEARS experience do you have in customer facing roles interacting with clients and prospects via
, text and/or phone?  



**This is no time to be bashful… put your best foot forward and really sell yourself... if you don’t, no one else will ;)



Thanks and GOOD LUCK!

title: Performance media buyer
description:
We are looking for a performance-driven media buyer to help scale our paid advertising, primarily on Meta Ads Manager. Who are we? Golden Grip is a premium fitness brand focused on grip strength, forearm training, and armwrestling equipment.



We already:

- Spend €10K–€20K/month on ads

- Have proven products and creatives

- Understand our audience and positioning



We need someone who can scale what works, improve efficiency, bring structure, and take on the operational work inside the ad manager.



Your key responsibilities would be:

- Campaign management and scaling

- Testing and identifying winning patterns

- Creative collaboration: work with our team on ad creatives, hooks, concepts, etc.

- Performance tracking and monitoring our key metric. We use TripleWhale for attribution, having experience with this is a plus.

- Risk management: following Meta best practices and work within platform policies to avoid account restrictions.



You are a good fit if:

- Proven experience managing €10+ monthly ad spend

- Strong understanding of Meta ads in 2026 landscape

- Experience scaling international ecommerce D2C brands

- Having affinity with fitness / strength sports is a huge plus

The job role would be part-time to start, but can evolve to more hours depending on your performance and skill sets.



Payment is based on a fixed monthly/hourly fee, depending on your experience. Performance bonuses could be discussed.



To apply, please answer:

- How do you structure a new ad account for scaling?

- What is your approach to creative testing?



Looking forward to working together!

This is not a traditional HR role. You will be responsible for identifying hiring needs, building the team, and ensuring everything runs smoothly on a day-to-day basis.

Managing day-to-day team operations and communication

Handling availability, days off, and team scheduling

Tracking worked hours and ensuring accuracy

Reviewing invoices from freelancers and tea
mbers, and forwarding them to management for payment

Setting up and improving systems to manage the team more efficiently

Keeping everything organized across roles, tasks, and performance

- Creative Strategists

title: Senior/Lead Developer -- Build a TMS From Scratch
description:
Lead Developer -- Build a TMS From Scratch



Pinnacle Logistics Group | Remote (Philippines-based, US hours) | Full-Time



We're a $35M tech-enabled freight brokerage based in Phoenix, AZ. We move freight across LTL, truckload, ocean, drayage, and Mexico cross-border. We're building our own transportation management system (TMS) called FlowTMS, and we need someone to own it.



This isn't a maintenance role. There's no legacy codebase to inherit. You're building the entire platform from zero -- architecture, data model, API layer, UI, deployment, all of it. You'll work directly with the President of Operations and have full ownership of technical decisions, including the tech stack.





What you're building:



FlowTMS is the operating system for our brokerage. It handles quoting, shipment management, carrier matching, tracking, invoicing, and reporting across all our service lines. You'll be designing and shipping production features from day one, not writing specs for someone else to build.





What we're looking for:



- You've built something from scratch before. Not maintained, not contributed to -- built. We want to see a project where you made the architecture decisions and shipped it.

- Strong in React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Experience with Next.js, PostgreSQL, and cloud deployment (AWS, Vercel, or similar) is a plus.

- You can communicate clearly. You'll be working US hours with a US-based leadership team. That means real-time collaboration, explaining trade-offs on calls, and asking good questions. Strong spoken and written English is a must.

- You're comfortable making decisions with incomplete information. We'll give you the business context and the problems to solve. You figure out how to build it.

- You don't need to be managed. Weekly check-ins, not daily standups. Ownership, not tickets.





What you get:



- Full ownership of a greenfield product at a fast-growing company

- You choose the tech stack. We'll build whatever environment you need to be successful.

- Unlimited Claude Code Enterprise access

- Direct line to leadership -- no layers of middle management

- Competitive salary

- A team that actually ships. We're not a company that talks about building things. We build them.





How to apply:



Send a message with:

1. A short video introduction explaining why this role is a good fit for you

2. A link to something you built from scratch (GitHub, live app, case study -- whatever shows your work)

3. A short note on how you'd approach building a TMS if you were starting today

4. Your expected monthly salary

title: Full-Time Executive & Personal Assistant
description:
About the role

I am a busy founder and business owner based in Ontario, Canada, looking for a highly organised, proactive, and reliable Executive and Personal Assistant to become my right hand — both in business and in life.



This is not a task-based VA role. You will be deeply integrated into how I run my day. That means managing my business operations and my personal life equally — from supplier
s to dinner reservations with family, from vendor follow-ups to making sure my bills are paid and my schedule is structured the way I need it. If it is on my plate, it is on yours.



I am looking for someone who thinks three steps ahead, communicates without being prompted, and takes full ownership of their responsibilities. This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with a founder, not just complete tasks.



What you will do

- Own my calendar completely — schedule meetings, structure my day intentionally, block personal commitments (family dinners, social plans, personal time), and resolve conflicts before I notice them

- Plan my day proactively — not just what is on the calendar, but ensuring the day flows logically and my priorities are protected

- Manage my
 inbox — triage, prioritise, draft responses, and ensure nothing is missed or delayed

- Handle personal administrative tasks — bill payments, subscriptions, reminders, and household coordination

- Call service providers on my behalf — insurance companies, utility companies, subscription services, and billing departments — to resolve issues, negotiate, or get information

- Plan and coordinate travel — flights, hotels, ground transport, and detailed itineraries

- Support business admin — order tracking, supplier and vendor communications, and documentation

- Update and maintain CRM trackers and records accurately

- Draft professional correspondence and communications on my behalf

- Build and maintain SOPs for recurring tasks so nothing depends on memory



A typical day might include

- Reviewing my upcoming day and structuring it so my priorities are in the right order

- Triaging overnight
s and flagging the two or three that need my attention today

- Calling an insurance company to resolve a billing discrepancy on my behalf

- Booking a dinner reservation and coordinating availability with family

- Following up with a vendor on an outstanding order

- Updating the CRM tracker with current client or lead status

- Paying a bill due this week and confirming it is processed



What I am looking for

- Minimum 2 years of experience as an executive assistant, personal assistant, or senior admin role

- C2 English: Excellent written and spoken English — professional, warm, and clear

- Naturally proactive and organised — you anticipate needs rather than waiting to be told

- Comfortable making calls to Canadian companies on behalf of a business owner

- Strong experience with Google Workspace and/or Microsoft 365

- Comfortable managing personal finances and life admin, not just business tasks

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional work environment

- Available during Canadian Eastern Time business hours, or with significant overlap



What makes this role different

- You work directly with the founder — no layers, no bureaucracy

- Your work matters immediately and visibly every single day

- I am not rotating assistants — I want someone who grows with me long-term

- I pay on time, every month, without exception



Applications that do not follow the instructions below will not be reviewed. Attention to detail is the single most important quality I am hiring for.

Question 1

Give me one specific example of a time you managed a complex or conflicting schedule. What was the situation, what did you do, and what was the result?



Question 2

I have back-to-back meetings all morning. An urgent
 arrives from a vendor requiring a response today. Walk me through exactly what you would do.



Question 3

This role includes managing my personal life — family dinners, social plans, bill payments, and calling service companies on my behalf. Are you comfortable with that level of access and responsibility? Describe how you have handled personal admin for someone before.



At the very end of your message, write the word "pineapple" on its own line. Do not explain it.
