title: Real Estate Agent Outreach Specialist
description:
Five Star Home Solutions is a nationwide, top-tier, real estate investment company (iBuyer) specializing in acquiring off-market properties.  We are seeking a high-performing Real Estate Agent Outreach Specialist to connect with licensed real estate agents and introduce them to our free platform that helps real estate agents earn 3-4X more income per property.  This is not a transactional sales role, this is an opportunity to build a network of agents that generates long term income. 



The ideal DISC style is a High D / High I: someone who is driven, takes initiative, customer service oriented, enjoys talking with people, and requires minimal hand holding. This person should be able to work independently and work aggressively to connect with real estate agents and share our opportunities.  



Key Responsibilities



- Call real estate agents using provided lists

- Introduce our company by making offers on their current listings

- Transition the conversation into our agent partnership opportunity

- Explain how agents can earn more through our platform

- Get agents signed up (100% free, simple process)

- Build relationships and stay top of mind



Every agent you bring on becomes part of your long term pipeline (affiliate network).  This role allows you to build a portfolio of agents that continues generating income as they transact - creating a scalable, repeatable revenue stream tied to your efforts.



Success Metrics



- Number of calls made

- Number of conversations with agents

- Number of agents signed up on our platform



This is a high-activity role - consistent outreach drives results



The Ideal Candidate



- Confident and engaging on the phone

- Able to quickly build rapport with professionals

- Consistent, disciplined, and self-motivated

- Comfortable with high daily call volume

- Motivated by both immediate income and long-term upside



Training & Onboarding



We provide a structured onboarding experience to set you up for success:



- Self-paced, video-based training covering our opportunities and platform

- One-on-one coaching during the first 30 days

- Ongoing access to proven systems, frameworks, coaching, and support



Success in this role is driven by execution, consistency, and coachability.



Qualifications & Experience



- 2-3+ years of real estate experience or familiarity with the industry (agents, listings, etc)

- Sales experience, especially phone-based sales

- Strong verbal communication skills and follow-up skills

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

- Ability to take direction and execute consistently



Compensation



- Pay rate: $5-$6 per hour, based on experience, plus lucrative bonus for each agent partner deal.

- Schedule: 48 hours per week (It could be more based on workload)

- Training: Yes, training will be provided.



***If you are interested in applying for this position please include an introduction video that outlines who you are and your background (specifically any real estate experience), and why this role speaks to you and why you believe you’re the perfect person for the role.

title: Influencer Associate
description:
As our Influencer Associate, you'll be the operational backbone of our creator / influencer marketing program. You'll own the day-to-day processes that keep our creator partnerships running smoothly: from creator / influencer sourcing, initial DM outreach, relationship management, product sample coordination, data upkeep, and whitelisting requests. Your job is to make sure nothing falls through the cracks and that every creator / influencer touchpoint is logged in trackers and conversations are handled with precision and care.



This is a full-time, process-driven role where organization, attention to detail, proactive thinking, and high EQ (given conversations with creators/influencers) matter above all else. 



You don't just follow SOPs, you consistently look for ways to improve them based on your learnings from your work and from your conversations with creators. We need someone who thinks one to two steps ahead, keeps our internal systems spotless, and brings a sharp, solutions-oriented mindset to everything they touch.



## About immi:



immi is a better-for-you Asian American food brand that invented the world's first low-carb, high-protein, and 100% plant-based instant ramen. At immi, we're reimagining our favorite foods with added nutrition and high-quality ingredients to taste just as good as you remember.



immi is founded by Kevin Lee (KLee) & Kevin Chanthasiriphan (KChan) who previously spent the past decade working together as product managers and venture investors in the tech industry. We grew up working alongside our families in the markets of Taiwan and Thailand where making and eating noodles was a part of our everyday lives.



We're building immi to help our families better manage their health conditions arising from poor nutrition and unhealthy diets.



## Key Responsibilities



- **Creator Outreach & Relationship Management**

    - Identify, research, and reach out to potential influencer and creator partners across Instagram, TikTok, and Youtube. The primary focus initially will be on Instagram.

    - Manage ongoing communication with creators by responding promptly, following up consistently, and maintaining strong relationships

    - Coordinate product gifting / sampling, ensuring creators receive the right products on time, and following up to inform them of shipping updates

    - Encourage creators to share public posts after receiving product.

    - Serve as the primary point of contact for creators throughout the partnership lifecycle

    - Track and manage all outreach efforts, responses, and partnership statuses

- **Influencer Operations & Process Management**

    - Execute and manage influencer marketing SOPs end to end

    - Negotiate whitelisting rights with select influencers based on quality of post content and ensure creator accounts are properly set up for paid amplification

    - Coordinate product shipments with our operations team: manage shipping logistics, tracking, and delivery confirmations

    - Manage contracts, briefs, and deliverable timelines with creators

    - Flag any process gaps, bottlenecks, or inefficiencies and propose improvements

- **Data Management & Internal Systems**

    - Keep all influencer databases, spreadsheets, and CRM records up to date and meticulously organized

    - Log outreach activity, partnership details, content deliverables, and performance data

    - Maintain clean, consistent data hygiene across all internal tools and systems

    - Build and maintain tracking systems that give the team clear visibility into pipeline status

    - Generate reports and summaries on influencer program performance as needed

- **Process Improvement & Systems Thinking**

    - Continuously evaluate current workflows and SOPs for opportunities to improve speed, accuracy, or scalability

    - Proactively suggest and implement system upgrades, automations, or organizational improvements

    - Document new processes clearly so they can be followed and replicated by others

    - Think one to two steps ahead. Anticipate what's needed before it's asked for

- **Communication & Collaboration**

    - Communicate proactively with the team on project status, creator updates, and any blockers

    - Follow SOPs closely and flag any gaps or confusion early

    - Operate reliably in an async environment. Updates don't wait to be asked for

    - Collaborate cross-functionally with marketing, creative, and operations teams as needed



## Qualifications



- Highly organized with an ability to manage multiple creator relationships and tasks simultaneously without letting details slip

- Strong attention to detail. You catch the thing most people miss

- Sharp, intelligent, and solutions-oriented. You don't just identify problems, you fix them

- High EQ with the ability to maintain conversations with creators and build organic relationships over time

- Self-starter who takes initiative and figures things out without hand-holding

- Reliable setup: stable internet, consistent availability, dependable turnaround times

- Able to follow detailed SOPs to the letter, and improve them when you see an opportunity



## Required Skills



- Strong written communication. You can draft professional, personable outreach messages and keep conversations moving

- Excellent organizational and data management skills — spreadsheets, databases, and CRMs are second nature to you

- Process-driven mindset with the ability to manage end-to-end workflows independently

- Proactive communication. You keep people in the loop without being asked

- Comfortable managing logistics: shipping coordination, tracking, and follow-ups

- Consistent output: you hit deadlines, every time



## Preferred Skillsets



- Interest in or exposure to influencer marketing, creator culture, or social media

- Familiarity with social media platforms (TikTok, Meta, YouTube) and a general sense of how creator content works

- Experience working with food brands or in the food and beverage industry (a big plus, not required)

- Comfortable with async collaboration tools like Notion, Slack, or Google Workspace

- Quick to onboard, asks smart questions, and figures things out independently

- Naturally curious. You dig into how things work and look for ways to make them better

- "No task is too small" attitude. You take pride in clean, reliable work even when it's unglamorous

- Growth mindset: you're always looking for ways to do the job faster and better



## Work Environment



- Full-time position

- Working hours aligned with Pacific Standard Time (PST)

- Fully remote. Open to international applicants

- Async-first work environment with clear deliverables and turnaround expectations

- Fast-paced startup environment with opportunities for growth and impact



## immi Values



- **We cook together (team):**

    - We create an inclusive environment to care for each other.

    - We push each other to strive for excellence.

    - We own the failures; we share the successes.

- **We are executive chefs (ownership):**

    - We adopt an ownership mentality for both our work and the company.

    - We look to bring more solutions than problems.

    - We have a bias for action and we're not afraid to get our hands dirty.

- **We strive for 3 stars (impact):**

    - We push to complete initiatives that drive impact and results.

    - We're open minded to creative solutions that drive impact.

    - We prioritize with the big picture in mind.

- **We write recipes (writing):**

    - We scale through written words.

    - We write for clarity of thought and better decision making.

    - We document for clearer communication and reflection.

- **We cook in an open kitchen (openness):**

    - We build trust and accountability through open communication.

    - We embrace evidence, learn from failures, accept criticism, and are always prepared to change our opinions.

    - We have the humility to make ourselves better.



## How to Apply



- Complete this Typeform to finalize your application:
salary: $700 USD / Month paid in local currency

title: Creative Content & Social Media Assistant
description:
Creative Content & Social Media Assistant (Full-Time, Remote)

We are a European digital studio dedicated to creating environments where stories can live. Currently, we are focused on building Lunebi, a premium, ad-free mobile app that helps busy parents maintain magical, uninterrupted evening routines with their children.



We are looking for someone who is completely at home in the digital world. In the past, we hired people who were great at blindly following instructions, but they lacked a "feel" for the brand. We don't just want a robot, but we do need someone who can follow the rules. We need a highly self-sufficient, creative problem-solver who deeply understands our mission, has a strong aesthetic eye, and can meticulously execute our workflows.



WHY THIS JOB IS DIFFERENT



Growth Partner: We aren't just looking for an employee; we are looking for a long-term partner. As our startup scales and succeeds, your role, responsibilities, and salary will grow right alongside us.



We Pay Weekly: You get paid $125 USD every Friday. We believe in reliable cash flow for our team.



Autonomy & Respect: We do not micromanage. We will give you structured Step-by-Step Video Guides (SOPs) for the basics, but we expect you to take initiative, use your own judgment, and figure things out when a guide doesn't cover everything.



No "Probationary" Pay Cut: We respect your time and pay the full professional salary from Day 1.



We Pay for Tests: If we ask you to complete a trial task during the hiring process, we pay you for it.



THE ROLE

You will be the creative operational engine behind our brand's online presence.



Content & Video Creation: Using the newest digital and AI tools to generate a wide mix of content. Especially in these early days, you will need to balance creating fast-paced, engaging videos for TikTok/Reels with curating a calming, aesthetic "safe-space" vibe for our Instagram and Pinterest.



Social Media & Community Management: Coming up with fresh, engaging ideas and using modern AI tools (like ChatGPT or Gemini) to bring those ideas to life. You will manage our social profiles and actively reply to comments from parents in a highly empathetic tone.



Following Guides (SOPs): While we value your creative input, we also have proven processes. It is absolutely critical that you can simply and meticulously follow our structured, step-by-step video guides when they are provided.



Independent Problem Solving: You will be working while our European founders might be offline. If you get stuck, you don't just stop and wait for hours. You Google it, you test a workaround, and you keep moving forward.



REQUIREMENTS (Please read carefully)



Impeccable Written English: Because you will be writing posts and replying directly to our community of parents, your written English must be fluent, natural, and capable of holding a warm, empathetic tone.



The "Digital Native": You are extremely comfortable with the latest tech tools. You don't get lost in new software interfaces. You adapt quickly.



Detail-Oriented & Creative: You understand what makes a social media post look good across different platforms, but you are also disciplined enough to follow exact instructions without missing a step.



Self-Sufficient: You know how to troubleshoot and act independently when your manager is unavailable.



Full-Time Focus: You must NOT have another full-time job or be a full-time university student. We require your exclusive professional focus for 40 hours per week.



Professional Setup: You must have a working laptop, a stable primary internet connection, and a reliable backup internet plan (e.g., mobile data hotspot) for emergencies.



COMPENSATION & SCHEDULE



Salary: $500 USD / Month (Paid out as $125 Weekly).



Raise Potential: Performance review after Month 3 with the potential to increase to $600/month. As a partner in our growth, further raises will align with the company's success.



13th Month Pay: Included for long-term staff.



Holidays: You will follow standard Philippine national holidays.



Schedule: Flexible 8-hour shifts, but you must overlap 4 hours of your shift with European mornings (approximately 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM Philippine Time).



HOW TO APPLY

Please reply to this posting with the exact subject line "Creative Digital Native" and include a short introduction about yourself.



Then, answer these 3 specific questions:



Your Taste & Experience: What is your experience with coming up with social media ideas and using modern/AI tools to execute them across platforms like TikTok, Instagram, or Pinterest? (Please link 1 or 2 examples of visual content you like or have created).



Problem Solving: Imagine you are working on an urgent video, but the software you normally use is completely down and I am asleep so you cannot ask me what to do. What is your exact step-by-step reaction?



Logistics: Can you confirm you do not have another job/university classes, and can you provide a Speedtest.net link + confirm your backup internet method?

title: Full-Time AI Content Creator / Editor
description:
We're a growing short-form content agency producing AI-generated UGC videos for e-commerce brands. We're looking for a self-driven creator who can handle the full production pipeline, from research all the way to final polish.                                 

                                                                                                         

This is a full-time role. We're not looking for someone to do one part of the process. We want someone who owns the whole thing. By providing quality hours towards this team you will be rewarded 10 fold with extremely high bonuses down the line because we view this role as extremely long-term.



  What you'll be doing:

  - Scrolling burner accounts to find viral hooks, angles, and reference content                         

  - Writing or adapting scripts based on what's performing                      

  - Generating base images using AI tools (experience with Nano Banana or similar is a plus)             

  - Animating clips using AI video tools (Veo3, Higgsfield, or similar)                                  

  - Polishing final videos in CapCut: captions, cuts, pacing, transitions                               

  - Delivering production-ready videos consistently every day                                            

                                                                                                         

  ---                                                                                                    

  You're a great fit if:                                                                                 

  - You already consume short-form content obsessively and understand what makes videos stop the scroll. 

  - You've used AI tools for content creation (image gen, video gen, or editing)                       

  - You're hungry to grow you want to get better every week, not just clock in                         

  - You take ownership of your work and don't need hand-holding                                          

  - You're comfortable in a fast-moving team where things change quickly



Details:                                                                                               

  - Full-time, remote                                                                                    

  - $300/month base + performance bonuses (no limit to the bonus ceiling as long as you complete quality and quantity work).                   

  - Long-term role: we invest in people who grow with us.

  - The pay for the role is exponential as we grow: pay for the role can grow every month.

  - All tools provided by the team, nothing should come out of your own pocket.

                                                                                                         

  ---                                                                                                    

To apply:                                                                                              

 Also attach samples of work you have completed in a portfolio and start your application with "hungry to learn".

title: Creative Strategist — Lingerie Brand (Remote)
description:
We're a lingerie brand selling online across multiple markets. Our marketing team is lean, remote, and built around one principle: every ad exists for a reason. We have a clear creative system — structured around intent, audience, and measurable output. We move fast, test hard, and scale what earns it.



YOUR TEAM

You'll be the fourth person in our core marketing team:

- Media buyer — Performance & spend

- Editor — Ad production

- Social media manager — Creators & UGC

- Creative strategist — You



THE ROLE

- You're the strategic brain behind everything we put out. You turn customer insight into angles, use cases, and airtight briefs. You own the process from concept through performance read — not the execution, but the thinking that makes the execution matter.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Build creative concepts and angles for Meta ads across TOF, MOF, and BOF

- Write sharp briefs for editors and UGC creators — use case, angle, awareness stage, content bucket, format — all of it

- Dig into Meta Ads Manager performance data and turn numbers into the next creative decision

- Know exactly which layer of a creative is underperforming — and whether to iterate or kill it

- Run ongoing customer research: reviews, competitor ads, comment sections, VOC

- Bring new ideas proactively — we don't want someone who waits to be briefed



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Minimum 2 years of experience as a creative strategist for D2C e-commerce brands on Meta — this is not an entry-level role

- Deep understanding of the full funnel and how hooks, messaging, and formats shift between TOF, MOF, and BOF

- Strong grasp of Use Case × Angle thinking as the foundation for high-intent creative

- Ability to read performance data and diagnose creative failure at the layer level — not just "the ad didn't work"

- Experience briefing UGC creators and knowing what separates a good brief from a useless one

- Systems thinker — you build creative frameworks, not random ads

- Fluent English, communicates clearly, works without hand-holding



WHAT YOU GET

- This is a long-term role. We're not here for a quick fix or a freelancer — we want someone who builds with us. Beyond the work itself, you'll get access to our internal knowledge base: frameworks, training material, and creative strategy systems built -specifically for D2C at a high level. You don't just work here — you get sharper here.



SALARY

- Discussed during the interview. If you have the skills, we'll pay for them — simple as that.



ONE IMPORTANT NOTE

- We are a lingerie and intimate apparel brand. Our ads are tasteful but adult in nature. You need to be genuinely comfortable working in this space and briefing creators on this type of content. If that's a problem, this isn't the right role.



HOW TO APPLY

Before we talk, we want to see how you think. Record a short video — 1 to 2 minutes, no longer — and cover:

- Who you are and what you do

- Your background as a creative strategist

- One concept or campaign you're proud of and why it worked



Upload it to Loom, Google Drive, or any platform and include the link in your application. We personally watch every submission.

title: CNC Learning Customer Support & Operations Assistant (AI + Creative Role)
description:
Hi! I’m Kyle, the founder of Learn Your CNC, an online training business that teaches people how to design and create projects using CNC machines and software like Vectric.



We’re growing and looking for a smart, proactive, and detail-oriented tea
mber to help with customer support, operations, and creative tasks.



This is NOT a typical VA role, we’re looking for someone who can think, solve problems, and take ownership.



Details

-Starting out part-time (~4 hours/day) with a probation period of 90 days

-Transition to full-time for the right candidate

-Long-term position

-Competitive pay based on experience



What You’ll Be Doing



This role is a mix of:

-Responding to customer
s (CNC/design-related questions)

-Helping troubleshoot basic CNC/software issues

-Admin / operations tasks

-Assisting with creative work (content, visuals, ideas)



What We’re Looking For



Required:

-Strong written English (friendly, clear, conversational)

-Experience with CNC, CAD/CAM, 3D modeling or graphic design software

(Vectric, Aspire, VCarve, Fusion 360, SketchUp, Illustrator, SolidWorks, etc.)

-Good problem-solving skills (can think through issues, not just follow instructions)

-Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to improve your work

-Reliable, responsive, and detail-oriented



Huge Plus:

-Experience with Vectric software (Aspire or VCarve)

-SketchUp experience

-Graphic design or content creation skills

-Experience with customer support or
 handling



How You Should Work



After your initial training, when you don’t know something, we expect you to:

-Be proactive to try and solve it yourself

-Check past examples or resources

-Use AI tools

-Come with possible solutions (not just questions)



This Role Is NOT For You If:

-You repeat the same mistakes

-You need constant supervision

-You wait for instructions instead of taking initiative

-You don’t pay attention to details



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To apply, please answer the following:

1. What CNC or design software have you used, and what kind of projects have you worked on?

2. Do you use AI tools like ChatGPT? If yes, how do you use them in your work?

3. How would you respond to this customer message:

“Hi, I’m trying to carve a sign but the letters don’t look centered when it cuts. The design looks centered on the screen though.”

(No need for a perfect answer — just show how you would think through it.)



ALSO, include this as your subject line when applying: “CNC Problem Solver”



If you’re someone who enjoys solving problems, learning new things, and taking ownership of your work, we’d love to hear from you.



– Kyle

title: Creative Director (Meta Ads) – Scale Winning Creatives Across Multiple Shopify Brands
description:
Launch Vector is a fast-growing eCommerce portfolio company managing 50+ Shopify brands across a wide range of niches. We acquire, operate, and scale online businesses—where paid media and creative performance drive growth.



You won’t be working on just one brand—you’ll be helping scale multiple stores across different industries, giving you massive exposure and learning opportunities.



Role Overview



We are looking for a Creative Director who is deeply experienced in Meta Ads and understands how to create high-performing creatives across different niches.



Your role is to identify what’s working, scale it, and continuously produce new winning creatives across multiple Shopify brands.



This is a performance-driven role—your success is measured by how well your creatives convert across different products, audiences, and markets.



Key Responsibilities



Creative Strategy & Direction



Analyze ad performance (ROAS, CTR, CPA, hook rate, etc.) across multiple brands and niches

Identify winning creatives and patterns across different industries

Develop new creative concepts based on data and trends

Create detailed briefs for video editors to produce high-converting ads

Continuously iterate on winners (new hooks, angles, formats, scripts)



Video Editor Management



Provide clear direction and structured briefs to video editors

Review and give actionable feedback on all creative output

Ensure high volume + high quality of ad creatives across multiple brands

Maintain fast turnaround times



UGC Creator Management



Source and manage UGC creators for different brands and niches

Create and refine UGC briefs (scripts, angles, hooks, deliverables)

Ensure creators deliver content aligned with performance goals

Coordinate content flow from creators ? editors ? ad accounts



Scaling Winning Creatives



Take top-performing ads and create multiple variations

Adapt winning concepts across different niches and products

Test new angles, hooks, and formats aggressively

Build a pipeline of consistent creative testing across all stores

What We’re Looking For



Must-Have Experience:



Proven experience managing Meta 
/Instagram) ad creatives

Strong understanding of direct response marketing

Experience working with multiple brands or products simultaneously

Experience managing video editors and UGC creators

Ability to analyze ad performance and make data-driven creative decisions



You Are:



Able to quickly adapt to different niches and audiences

Highly analytical but also creative

Obsessed with performance and results (ROAS-focused mindset)

Fast-moving and execution-driven

Extremely detail-oriented with strong feedback skills

Comfortable managing multiple creative pipelines at once

Nice to Have

Experience in eCommerce / Shopify brands

Familiarity with tools like CapCut, Premiere, After Effects

Experience scaling ads across different niches

Experience managing high-volume creative testing

KPIs (How You’ll Be Measured)

Improvement in ROAS across multiple brands

Volume of winning creatives produced

Speed of iteration and testing

Ability to transfer winning concepts across niches

Efficiency of the creative production pipeline



Please include:



Examples of ad creatives you’ve worked on (with performance metrics if possible)

A short explanation of how you identify and scale winning creatives

Your experience managing multiple brands or niches

Your experience working with video editors and/or UGC creators



Final Note



You will not be working on just one brand.

You will be responsible for scaling creatives across multiple Shopify stores in different niches.



We’re not looking for someone to “make ads look good.”

We’re looking for someone who knows how to make ads make money—at scale.



If that’s you, apply now.

title: APP/FRONT END DEV

---

* Gradually take on more responsibility



---

* Direct impact on the app experience

* Opportunity to grow with the platform over time



---

* A team environment focused on growth and building something real

title: Gamer Developer
description:
Unity Game Developer (Full-Time / Part-Time)



Job Type: Full-Time or Part-Time

Work Hours: Flexible (overlap with US time preferred)

Location: Remote

Salary: Competitive – based on experience and availability

Platform: Unity (Required)



 Job Overview:

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Job Title: Social Media Content Manager

Location: Remote 

Job Type: Full-Time 



About Us:

We are a fast-growing digital creator brand operating multiple channels across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, and
. Our content includes family entertainment, challenges, vlogs, skits, pranks, slime content, and lifestyle videos. We are looking for a Social Media Content Manager who can oversee all posting, platform organization, scheduling, and audience engagement across short-form and long-form content.



Position Overview:

The Social Media Content Manager will be responsible for managing our entire social ecosystem. This includes posting, scheduling, optimizing content, writing titles/captions, monitoring trends, engaging with our audience, reminding the team to capture photos/videos, and ensuring consistent daily activity on all platforms. You will work closely with our creators, editors, and content team to keep content flowing smoothly.



Responsibilities:

• Content Posting & Scheduling

• Post all short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube • • • Shorts,
 Reels, Snapchat Spotlight).

• Post all long-form content on YouTube and
 when needed.

• Upload and schedule posts at the optimal times for each platform.

• Maintain a cross-platform posting calendar.

• Ensure all drafts are properly captioned, titled, tagged, and ready for posting.



Content Management:

• Remind the team daily to take photos, behind-the-scenes, and spontaneous content.

• Organize and manage content folders from editors and creators.

• Track what has been posted, what’s scheduled, and what still needs to be filmed.

• Request additional footage from creators when content gaps appear.



Audience Engagement:

• Respond to comments, messages, and community interactions across all platforms.

• Monitor trending comments or feedback and report insights to the team.

• Encourage audience engagement through questions, CTAs, and community polls.



Optimization & Strategy:

• Research and stay up to date with social media trends, audios, formats, and hashtags.

• Track analytics to determine the best posting times, top-performing content, and weekly growth.

• Write engaging titles, captions, and thumbnail text that improve retention and click-through.

• Identify content opportunities from trends and present weekly ideas to the team.



Brand & Platform Consistency:

• Keep messaging consistent across all accounts.

• Ensure all posts represent the brand voice and style of the creators.

• Maintain an organized archive of previous posts for reference.



Daily Tasks:

• Post content across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, Snapchat, and
.

• Upload long-form videos as needed and optimize titles/descriptions.

• Remind creators to take photos and videos throughout the day.

• Engage with audience comments and messages.

• Track performance of yesterday’s posts.

• Update the content calendar with new posts, drafts, and scheduled items.

• Review trending audios, 
s, and formats for potential use.





Weekly Tasks:

• Prepare and present a weekly social media performance report.

• Review analytics and refine posting times/tactics accordingly.

• Meet with the content team to plan weekly filming needs.

• Pull the best photos and clips for next week’s posts.

• Create draft captions, titles, and posting templates.

• Identify weekly trends relevant to our brand.

• Maintain organization of all content folders and archives.

• Suggest 5–10 new short-form content ideas per week.



Qualifications:

• 1–3 years of social media experience (creator or influencer marketing preferred).

• Strong understanding of TikTok, YouTube, Instagram,
, and Snapchat algorithms.

• Excellent writing skills (titles, captions, descriptions).

• Ability to multitask and stay extremely organized.

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, content-heavy environment.

• Knowledge of trending audios, formats, 
 culture, and viral-style editing.

title: Intake & Operations Coordinator (Remote – Part-Time)
description:
Intake & Operations Coordinator (Remote – Part-Time)



We are a Canadian-based mental health clinic serving clients across British Columbia, specializing in the treatment of Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder (OCD) and related conditions. As our clinic continues to grow, we are seeking a highly organized, reliable, and proactive Intake & Operations Coordinator to support client intake and ensure a seamless front-end experience.



This is a remote, part-time role (~25 hours per week) with consistent hours and the opportunity to take ownership of key systems and processes.



Key Responsibilities: 

Respond to new client inquiries in a timely, professional, and empathetic manner

Schedule and manage consultation appointments

Maintain and actively manage the client waitlist

Follow up with prospective clients and guide them through the intake process

Coordinate scheduling and communication between clients and clinicians

Ensure no inquiries or intake steps fall through the cracks

Support general administrative and operational tasks as needed



What We’re Looking For: 

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Highly organized with excellent attention to detail

Reliable, consistent, and strong follow-through

Able to work independently and take initiative

Comfortable managing multiple priorities

Professional, warm, and client-focused in all communication

What Success Looks Like

Client inquiries are responded to promptly and professionally

Intake and scheduling processes run smoothly and efficiently

The waitlist is actively managed and up to date

Communication is clear, consistent, and dependable

The front end of the clinic operates without bottlenecks



Hours & Availability

Approximately 25 hours per week (around 5 hours per day)

Must have some overlap with Pacific Time (Vancouver), ideally between 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM



Compensation

$2,500 CAD/month

Fully remote

Payment in CAD (or equivalent based on exchange rate)



Additional Information

We are in a growth phase, and this role plays a key part in supporting that growth. There is strong potential for the role to evolve over time based on performance and clinic needs.

title: Short-Form Video Editor — AI Prank Reels (TikTok / IG Reels / YouTube Shorts)
description:
About the role: We're producing viral AI-powered prank videos for TikTok/Reels and need a fast, creative editor who understands the platform. Each video has 3 pre-made segments that you'll assemble and polish:



Hook — AI-generated video (the shocking reveal that stops the scroll)

App demo — Screen recording showing how the prank was made

Chat reaction — iPhone iMessage screen recording of the victim's response

What you'll do:



Assemble the 3 clips into one cohesive vertical reel (9:16)

Add bold, attention-grabbing captions/text overlays (CapCut or Canva style)

Time the text to match the conversation pacing

Add trending sounds / background music

Color correct and match the segments so they flow seamlessly

Optimize the first 1-2 seconds for maximum hook/retention

Export at 1080x1920, ready to post

You're a great fit if you:



Have experience editing short-form viral content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Understand pacing, retention, and what makes people stop scrolling

Can match the editing style of top-performing prank/AI content creators

Know how to use CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar

Can turn around edits fast (same day / next day)

Have a portfolio of short-form content with strong view counts

Volume: ~7-10 videos per batch, ongoing work for the right person. We provide all raw assets — you bring the editing magic.



To apply: Send 2-3 examples of short-form content you've edited (prank or reaction style preferred). Bonus if you can do a test edit with sample clips we provide.

title: Manifest Sourcing Virtual Assistant (E-commerce Product Research)
description:
About the Role:

We are building a fast growing online retail business and are looking for a detail oriented Virtual

Assistant to help identify profitable inventory from supplier manifests. Your role is critical you will be responsible for finding products that actually sell and generate profit.



Responsibilities:

- Review daily supplier manifests (bulk inventory lists)

- Identify high-potential shoe pallets (heels, boots, sneakers, etc.)

- Research real market demand using platforms like eBay, Poshmark, and
 Marketplace

- Check sold listings only to determine actual selling prices

- Estimate resale value, demand, and profit margins

- Submit daily reports with top 3–5 recommended pallets

- Provide screenshots or proof of sold listings for validation



Daily Output Expectations:

- Review 10–20 manifests per day

- Submit 3–5 qualified pallet opportunities



Each submission must include:

- Pallet cost

- Estimated resale price (based on sold data)

- Estimated total revenue

- Estimated profit



Requirements:

- Strong research and analytical skills

- Ability to follow instructions and meet daily targets

- Experience with eBay, Poshmark, or reselling is a plus

- Must understand how to find and analyze sold listings

- Reliable communication and daily reporting



Compensation:

- Base Pay: $200–$300/month (part-time)

- Performance Bonus: $10–$20 per approved profitable pallet



Important:

This role is focused on real data, not guesses.

You must base all recommendations on actual sold listings and verified market demand.



Growth Opportunity:

Top performers can grow into full-time roles with increased pay and responsibility as the business

scales.

title: YouTube Editor
description:
ABOUT US

Keenya Kelly LLC is a USA social media education brand that teaches entrepreneurs how to grow on TikTok and Instagram and generate consistent revenue from short-form content. We create engaging, high-energy educational videos that help our audience build a presence that feels authentic, grows without burnout, and makes money every single day.

We are a lean, high-output team that moves fast, communicates clearly, and holds a high standard for everything we put in front of our audience.



THE ROLE

We are looking for a talented, detail-oriented Video Editor to join our team on a part-time basis. You will edit our long-form YouTube content and cut short-form Reels from that footage each month. This is a creative, deadline-driven role for someone who takes pride in their craft and understands what makes educational video content actually watchable.



MONTHLY DELIVERABLES

Long-Form YouTube Videos (fully edited)

4 per month

Short-Form Reels (cut from YouTube footage)

3 per episode (12 total)

Thumbnails, Intros & End Cards (per video)

Included in scope





WHAT YOU'LL DO

Edit 4 long-form YouTube videos per month from raw footage into polished, educational content

Cut 3 short-form Reels per episode from that same footage (12 Reels total per month)

Design compelling thumbnails that stop the scroll and drive clicks

Build branded intros and end cards that are consistent with our visual identity

Apply motion graphics to make key teaching points pop and keep viewers engaged

Ensure every video is clean, well-paced, color-corrected, and on-brand

Manage your own project timeline and communicate proactively on progress and delivery dates

Take feedback, revise quickly, and deliver finished files on time every time



REQUIREMENTS

Minimum 3 years of YouTube long-form video editing experience

Strong portfolio that includes educational or content-creator style YouTube videos

Proficiency in your own editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

Must own your own editing software — no reimbursements provided

Proven ability to create thumbnails, intros, end cards, and motion graphics

Eye for visual storytelling and strong design sensibility

Detail-oriented with zero tolerance for sloppy edits, typos in captions, or off-brand visuals

Strong project management skills — you can juggle multiple deliverables without dropping the ball

Clear, professional, and timely communication (we do not chase people for updates)

title: Virtual Assistant for Brand| Full Time | $300/mo + Growth to $500+
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We run
 ad campaigns for health supplements. Each ad has a written script paired with one hero image. Your job is to find those images.



You will not write copy or edit images. You will read briefs, understand the script, and find images that match.



Important: start your application with the word "sunrise" so I know you read this post.





DAILY WORK



- Pull briefs from a shared queue (20-30 per day)

- Read each script, focusing on the first few paragraphs

- Find 4-5 images that match the script

- Download, rename, upload to Google Drive

- Move to the next brief



Each brief takes about 10-12 minutes once you know the workflow.





REQUIREMENTS



- Strong English reading comprehension (you will read 800+ word scripts daily)

- Comfortable with Google Drive and Google Docs

- Attention to detail with file naming

- Available full time, Monday to Friday, 10 AM to 6 PM EST





COMPENSATION



- $300/month starting

- Growth to $500+/month for strong performers who stay long term

- Paid monthly





HOW TO APPLY



Start your message with "sunrise" then tell me:





1. Are you comfortable reading long English articles without struggling?

2. What sort of work have you done in the past that required good problem solving? Send examples and proof. I want to see you are able to think and reason for yourself when only given simple instructions. 

3. Confirm you can work 10 AM to 6 PM EST, Monday to Friday





PAID TRIAL TASK



Before being hired, you will complete a paid trial task ($30 USD). You will receive a set of real briefs and instructions. The task takes a few hours and must be completed within 6 hours of receiving it. This is how I evaluate whether you are a good fit — your application alone does not get you hired, the trial task does.

title: Web + Shopify + SEO + AI Support Specialist
description:
Web + Shopify + SEO + AI Support Specialist



Build With Us From the Ground Up

Casper Buzz is growing fast, and we’re building a team to match. We’re a startup, and we want to be upfront about that — we’re early, we’re moving quickly, and we’re building something with real potential.



The advantage? The right people don’t just work for us — they grow with us.



The Role

We’re looking for someone who can support across websites, Shopify, SEO, and AI-powered workflows. This is a hands-on role for someone who likes getting things done and improving systems along the way.



What You’ll Work On



Website updates and builds

Shopify setup and ongoing management

SEO improvements across content and pages

AI-assisted workflows and automation

Keeping digital systems organized and efficient



You’re a Strong Fit If You



Have experience in websites and Shopify

Understand SEO and how it actually impacts results

Are open to using modern tools, including AI

Are dependable and easy to work with

Can adapt as things evolve (startup environment)



What You’ll Gain



A front-row seat in a growing company

Real responsibility early on

The chance to grow into a larger role as we expand



Position Details



Flexible starting structure

Designed to scale with performance

Best suited for someone who wants more than just project work



Hi, my name is Jordan, and I’m the owner of Casper Buzz Media Group.



I want to be transparent about why I’m here. With the advancement of tools like OpenClaw, I could automate a large portion of the work typically handled by virtual assistants. But what I cannot automate—and what I never will—is human connection.



At the core of what I’m building is something bigger than tasks or output. It’s about people. It’s about creating opportunities, supporting others, and building something meaningful that connects communities—both locally and globally.



I strongly believe in acting with intention and integrity—doing what’s right, even when it’s not the easiest path. That mindset has shaped how I’ve built this company, and it’s exactly how I intend to grow it moving forward.



Now, I’m in a position where I can bring others along for that journey. I’m not looking to just “hire help.” I’m building a team—one that grows together, supports each other, and operates at a level where no single person stands above the rest.



My goal is simple: build something strong enough that no one can easily point to who the leader is—only that the team itself is exceptional.



If that kind of environment excites you, I look forward to connecting and seeing if we’re the right fit.

title: Email Copywriter (eCommerce)
description:
We are a done-for-you
 marketing agency working with eCommerce brands across haircare, skincare, wellness, food & beverage, and gifting niches. We handle everything: strategy, copy, design, and implementation. We are growing fast and looking for someone to grow with us.



We are looking for a talented
 Copywriter who can produce high-converting copy across all areas of
 marketing.



What You'll Do:



Flows & Automation

- Write copy for automated
 flows including welcome series, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase, win-back, sunset, and VIP sequences

- Craft subject lines, preview text, body copy, and CTAs optimized for each flow trigger and audience segment



Campaigns

- Write 2x weekly broadcast campaign
s per client (promotions, product launches, seasonal, storytelling, educational)

- Adapt tone and messaging to match each brand's unique voice



SMS Copy

- Write short-form SMS messages for campaigns and automated flows

- Balance urgency, personality, and compliance within tight character limits



Strategy & Optimization

- Contribute to
 calendar planning and content strategy

- Write A/B test variations for subject lines, CTAs, and offer framing

- Review performance data and suggest copy improvements based on open rates, CTR, and revenue per recipient



Creative Collaboration

- Brief the design team on
 layout and visual direction

- Write copy that fits within designed templates and renders well across devices



Other Copy Needs

- Write popup and signup form copy to grow client
 lists

- Occasionally support with ad copy, landing page copy, or product descriptions as needed



What We're Looking For:

- 3+ years of
 copywriting experience, ideally in eCommerce or DTC

- Strong grasp of consumer psychology, storytelling, and direct response

- Ability to write in multiple brand voices: luxury, playful, bold, minimal

- Experience with Klaviyo or similar ESP

- Fast, reliable, and able to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Portfolio of
 copy or live campaigns required



Nice to Have:

- Familiarity with Shopify or eCommerce metrics

- SMS copywriting experience

- Understanding of list segmentation and deliverability basics



SKILLS: Copywriting,
 Marketing, Klaviyo, SMS Marketing, eCommerce, Direct Response, Campaign Strategy

title: Be Our YouTube Editor
description:
To apply, please read everything below and submit a forum. DMs will be ignored



— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that tell a compelling and entertaining story.



GRAPHIC & ANIMATIONS (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— WHAT WE OFFER —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D):

title: Google Ads (PPC) Setup + Monthly Management – Small Project, Ongoing Work (Experienced Only)
description:
Please read this entire post carefully. Applications that do not follow the instructions will not be considered.



I’m a web developer working with my own clients, and I’m looking for someone who knows how to set up and manage Google Ads the right way.



I’ve set up and run campaigns in the past, but it’s been a couple years and I don’t want to re-learn everything. I’d rather hand this off to someone who already knows what they’re doing.



This is not a big corporate job.

It’s one client to start—but if it goes well, I’ll have more work.



I’m not looking for an agency.

I’m looking for a skilled person who is reasonable and knows what they’re doing.



This starts with a full campaign setup, and I’m also looking for ongoing monthly management and optimization.



What I Need (Setup):

	•	Full Google Ads account setup (or cleanup if needed)

	•	Campaign creation (Search campaigns to start)

	•	Keyword research (focused, relevant—not bloated)

	•	Ad copy creation (clear, strong, conversion-focused)

	•	Conversion tracking setup (forms, calls, key actions)

	•	Proper campaign structure (ad groups, targeting, etc.)

	•	Budget setup and bidding strategy



Ongoing (Monthly):

	•	Campaign monitoring and optimization

	•	Adjust bids, keywords, and targeting

	•	Improve ad performance (CTR, conversions)

	•	Add negative keywords

	•	Simple, clear monthly reporting (no fluff)

	•	Practical recommendations to improve results



Important:



This is a small, focused campaign.

I don’t need anything overly complex—I need it set up correctly, managed consistently, and improved over time.



Requirements:

	•	Proven experience with Google Ads (PPC)

	•	Must provide real examples of campaigns you’ve managed

	•	Must be able to explain:

	•	What you did

	•	Why you did it

	•	What results came from it

	•	Strong understanding of conversion tracking



If you can’t show real work, please don’t apply.



Budget:

For transparency, here’s the range I’m expecting:

	•	Setup: $150–$250

	•	Monthly Management: $75–$125



This is for a small campaign, not a large account.



I’m not looking for the cheapest option, and I’m not looking for inflated agency pricing. I’m looking for fair, reasonable rates for solid work.



To Apply:



Please include:

	1.	1–2 examples of Google Ads campaigns you’ve managed

	2.	What your approach would be for a small business campaign

	3.	Your price for:

	•	Initial setup

	•	Monthly management



Applications without this information will be ignored.



Final Note:



I’m easy to work with and value long-term relationships.

If you do solid work, this can turn into consistent projects.



To confirm you’ve read this post, start your application with the word “orange.”

We are hiring a VOD Editor for a single gig. You will receive one long Twitch/YouTube VOD recording of a live podcast (3–5 hours). The show is a weekly FGC discussion hosted by a well-known Street Fighter commentator. You will watch the full VOD, identify every distinct conversation topic, and edit each topic into its own standalone YouTube video (15–60 minutes each, depending on the topic). You will cut dead air, remove off-topic tangents, add b-roll footage that shows what the host is talking about, and deliver finished exports ready for upload. You should expect to produce 3–5 finished videos from a single VOD. If the work is strong, there may be future gigs.



OVERVIEW & DETAILS

This is for a YouTube channel run by a veteran FGC commentator and influencer. The channel publishes standalone videos cut from a long-form weekly podcast. The audience is fighting game players and fans who follow the fighting game scene.



What you will receive:

-   One full VOD from a weekly live podcast, streamed on Twitch and YouTube. Episodes run 3–5 hours.

-   The VOD covers multiple topics per episode. A single topic can run anywhere from 15 minutes to over an hour.

-   The host may show topics on screen, but a listed topic may actually contain multiple distinct discussions.



Each VOD comes with a timestamp list or show notes when available, but you should not rely on these. You will need to watch the VOD yourself to find the real topic boundaries.



CORE OBJECTIVES

-   You are watching one full VOD (3–5 hours) and identifying every distinct conversation topic that can stand alone as a YouTube video.

-   You are editing each topic into a standalone YouTube video (15–60 minutes) with clean pacing and no dead air.

-   You are sourcing and adding relevant b-roll footage to each video that visually shows what the host is talking about.

-   You are delivering 3–5 finished, YouTube-ready video exports from a single VOD.



EXPANDED OBJECTIVES

-   Topic Identification

    -   You will receive the raw VOD file via Google Drive.

    -   Watch the full recording and log every topic the host discusses.

    -   For each topic, note the start timestamp, end timestamp, and a short summary.

    -   The host does not always announce topic changes. You will need to identify which segments belong together and which tangents to cut.

    -   Measured by: completeness of topic identification, accuracy of timestamps, quality of topic summaries.

-   Editing & Pacing

    -   Each video must make sense on its own to a viewer who has never seen the full podcast.

    -   Cut dead air, off-topic tangents, and repeated points.

    -   If the host circles back to a point, keep the best version and cut the rest.

    -   Measured by: pacing quality, no dead spots, each video stands alone as a complete topic.

-   B-Roll

    -   The raw footage is mostly a webcam of the host talking.

    -   When the host references a tournament 
nt, player, game clip, or news story, you will find and add matching b-roll.

    -   B-roll may include tournament footage, gameplay clips, screenshots of tweets or articles, or game trailers.

    -   You will source b-roll yourself from publicly available content.

    -   Measured by: b-roll relevance and timing, visual variety.

-   Delivery

    -   Final exports must be 1080p minimum with clean audio levels.

    -   Videos must be ready to upload to YouTube with no additional editing needed.

    -   Deliver all files via Google Drive.

    -   Measured by: number of usable videos delivered, export quality, delivery on time.



REQUIREMENTS

-   Required: You understand the FGC and can prove it. You know who the major players, commentators, and tournament organizers are. You follow Street Fighter 6 at minimum. You can tell the difference between a meaningful discussion topic and idle chatter. If you do not follow the FGC, do not apply.

-   Required: You have edited long-form content into short-form cut-downs before and can show the work. You are proficient in DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere Pro, or CapCut. You have a reliable internet connection and your own workstation capable of handling long recordings.

-   Required: You know how to source and add b-roll footage. You can find relevant clips, screenshots, and images online and edit them into a video to match what the host is discussing.

-   Ideal: You have edited podcast or talk show content into topic-based cut-downs before.

-   Ideal: You actively play Street Fighter 6, Tekken 8, or other competitive fighting games.

-   Ideal: Experience with YouTube audience retention and pacing for discussion content.

-   Ideal: You are familiar with the host's content.

-   Ideal: Experience with After Effects or motion graphics for lower thirds and text overlays.



HOW TO APPLY

 your application to [APPLICATION
] with the subject line: [VOD Editor Gig] Your Name



Watch this VOD:





Your application must include both of the following. Applications that are missing either item or do not follow these exact instructions will not be reviewed.



1. A test edit.

Watch the VOD. Find one topic. Edit it down to a clean 1–3 minute clip.

-   Identify a clear topic

-   Cut out any dead air

-   Cut out any redundancies

-   Cut out any tangents

-   Add 1–2 pieces of b-roll that show what the host is talking about

Upload your finished edit to Google Drive or Dropbox and share the link.



2. A Google Sheet explaining your process.

Create a Google Sheet with exactly these column headers:

-   Topic Title

-   Timestamp (Start)

-   Timestamp (End)

-   Why This Topic Works as a Standalone Clip

-   B-Roll Used

-   Why You Chose This B-Roll

Fill in one row for the topic you selected. Explain why you think this clip is good and relevant, and why you chose the b-roll that you chose.



The first cell in your Google Sheet (A1) must contain the word "Hansei."



Share the Google Sheet link in your application. Make sure the link is set to "Anyone with the link can view."



Applications that do not follow every instruction above will not be considered.



If your application passes, you will be offered a paid gig to edit one full VOD (3–5 hours) into multiple standalone YouTube videos.

·       Detail-oriented and comfortable working to agreed standards and deadlines.



Work Setup: Remote/WFH



Work Schedule: Day Shift

title: AI Video Editor - Long-Form (Sleep & Educational History Content)
description:
We’re hiring a full-time video editor to create long-form YouTube content (1–2+ hours) who can use AI tools and efficient batch workflows.



This role is focused on building content at scale without sacrificing quality. We are not looking for low-quality, overly AI-generated videos. The goal is to create content that feels natural, immersive, and engaging.



What You’ll Do:



-Create long-form videos (1–2+ hours), including:

-Sleep / relaxation content

-Educational / B-roll-style videos

-Use a batch workflow to generate and assemble content, for example:



1.Script + scene generation (Claude or similar)



2.Voice-over generation (via our platform)



3.Visual generation (Fal.ai, Veo, etc.)



4.Editing and assembling into a final video

Combine AI images, AI video, and real B-roll footage to create a natural viewing experience



Important: Quality Standard,we are aiming for content that:



-Feels authentic and not overly AI-generated

-Uses AI video + B-roll, not just static AI images

-Has enough visual variation to maintain engagement

-Avoids repetition and low-effort scene generation



Examples:

-

-



Workflow Expectation:



Ideally you should not be editing everything manually. We expect you to:



-Batch generate scenes and assets

-Use AI tools efficiently

-Build a workflow that balances speed + quality



Output Expectations:

-1 long-form video every other day(48 hour turnaround)

-Consistent delivery and meeting deadlines



Requirements:



-Proven experience creating long-form YouTube content (1 hour+)

-Strong understanding of pacing and retention

-Experience using AI tools for video/image generation

-Ability to combine AI videos/images + B-roll effectively

-Ability to build efficient batch workflows

-Reliable and able to work independently



Bonus (not required):



-Experience with sleep/relaxation content

-Experience with tools like Claude, Fal.ai, Veo, etc.



Compensation:

$375/month

Long-term role with growth opportunities

Start your application with the name of your favourite animal and answer the screening questions or we will likely not respond,

title: Media Buyer Analyst (Linear TV)
description:
Media Buying Analyst (Linear TV)



Location: Remote – U.S. 

Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time

Compensation: $1,800 USD per month 



About the Role:



Workspark is hiring a Media Buying Analyst to embed directly within a top-tier U.S. advertising agency. This is a high-impact role for a media professional who excels at the intersection of precise execution and proactive data analysis.

We are looking for an individual who sets the gold standard for remote collaboration: high responsiveness, meticulous accuracy, and the ability to scale from 2 to 4+ complex campaigns within the first 90 days. You will be expected to own your workflow, manage tight deadlines independently, and provide the transparency needed in a fast-paced agency environment.



What You Will Do:



- Plan & Execute: Launch linear TV media buys based on strategy, CPM goals, and strict budgets.

- Audit with Precision: Perform independent pre-buying audits by Month 3 to ensure flawless campaign launches and "zero-error" delivery.

- Real-Time Optimization: Monitor daily pacing and performance; make autonomous budget shifts to hit KPI thresholds (+/- 10%).

- Rapid Reconciliation: Resolve all billing and media discrepancies within a strict 48-hour business window.

- Proactive Communication: Maintain ultra-high responsiveness. You are expected to acknowledge requests within minutes and flag performance risks before they impact the campaign results.

- Analytical Logic: Use Excel/Google Sheets to interpret reports and ensure campaign data is logically sound (e.g., verifying that delivery aligns with spend and goals).



What We’re Looking For:



- Experience: 2–3+ years of agency experience specifically in Linear TV Media Buying (Digital-only experience will not qualify).

- High Initiative: A "go-getter" personality who proactively asks questions and seeks clarity early, rather than waiting for a deadline to pass.

- Time Management Mastery: Proven ability to manage multiple high-stakes deadlines (specifically the critical Thursday 5:00 PM buy deadline) without procrastination.

- Communication Fluency: Excellent, confident English communication skills. You must be able to explain the "why" behind your data insights clearly to internal teams.

- Problem-Solving "Street Smarts": The ability to look at a data set and quickly identify if something "feels" wrong, escalating issues with potential solutions in mind.



Technical Requirements:



- Reliable, high-speed internet with a documented backup power solution (essential for U.S. market hours).

- Functional webcam and headset for daily video collaboration and internal strategy sessions.

- Quiet, professional home office environment.



Why WorkSpark?



- Long-Term Career Stability: This is a full-time, career-track role, not a short-term contract.

- Direct U.S. Agency Exposure: Work with proprietary AI media tools and collaborate with senior industry experts.

- Payroll: Bi-monthly payments made via Wise.

- Benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and sick leave (after probation).



How to Apply:



Apply here: 

- You must provide 

1 - Updated Resume.

2 - Video/Audio introduction describing your specific experience with Linear TV reconciliation and how you prioritize tasks when managing multiple campaigns at once.



**Note: Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.**

title: Strategic Video Clipper — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US

title: Paid Search Specialist
description:
Paid Search Specialist



Location - Remote

Salary: $3,000 USD/month 

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM ET (U.S. East Coast Hours)



Role Overview:



We are hiring a technical, "hands-on-keyboard" Paid Search Specialist to serve as a vital member of the media activation team for a leading U.S. data-powered marketing agency. This is an internal-facing, long-term role focused on executing and optimizing high-performing campaigns for diverse agency clients. We are looking for a practitioner who is equally capable of executing day-to-day operations and contributing strategic recommendations that drive business outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:



- Campaign Strategy & Development: Lead the end-to-end build of paid search campaigns across Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, including Search, Performance Max, Display, Video, and Demand Gen campaign types.

- Platform Mix: Focus primarily on Google Ads (90%) and Microsoft Ads (10%). (Note: No Shopping or e-commerce feed management is currently required).

- Optimization & Performance: Monitor, analyze, and optimize campaign performance on a continuous basis, including bid adjustments, budget pacing, and quality score improvements.

- Analytical Storytelling: Extract data from GA4 and native tools to draft weekly performance narratives that provide "color" and context—explaining the "why" behind the numbers for internal leads.

- Automation & Strategy: Leverage Smart Bidding and automated campaign strategies thoughtfully, validating machine learning signals against specific business requirements.

- Technical Troubleshooting: Audit and troubleshoot tracking setups, pixels, and GA4 events to ensure total data accuracy.

- Team Integration: Collaborate daily via Microsoft Teams with account leads and strategists; this is a highly outgoing, and collaborative team environment.



Requirements:



- Experience: 2–3+ years of hands-on experience managing paid search campaigns in an agency or in-house environment.

- Account Management: Proven ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously (initially 2–3, scaling to 5–6).

- Platform Proficiency: Demonstrated expertise in Search, Performance Max, Display, Video, and Demand Gen.

- Technical Skills: Strong command of keyword research methodologies, match type strategy, negative keyword management, and audience targeting.

- Analytics: Proficiency in Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, and platform-native reporting tools.

- Software: Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel (for analysis) and PowerPoint (for client-friendly decks) are essential.

- Soft Skills: Must be coachable, have a learning attitude, and possess the ability to communicate strategic recommendations clearly.

- Home Setup: Reliable quiet work environment, high-speed internet, and webcam for East Coast sync calls.



Preferred Qualifications:



- Google Ads and/or Microsoft Advertising certifications.

- Experience with third-party platforms (e.g., SA360, Marin, Skai).

- Familiarity with paid social platforms (Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok) and cross-channel media strategy.

- Experience with multi-location or zip-code level optimization.



What You Get:



- Stable Role: Long-term, full-time commitment with a U.S. company.

- Support: No direct client-facing pressure initially; ongoing support from the Workspark leadership team.

- Payroll: Bi-monthly payments made via Wise.

- Benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and sick leave (after probation).



How to Apply:



Click here to apply: 

 - Important: Submit a brief video recording introducing yourself. Explain your experience with "hands-on-keyboard" campaign management and how you prefer to report wins and performance challenges to your team.



**Note: Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.**

title: Paid Social Specialist
description:
Paid Social Specialist



Location: Remote

Salary: $3,200 USD/month 

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM ET (U.S. East Coast Hours)



Role Overview:



We are hiring a Paid Social Specialist to support a fast-growing, data-driven marketing agency. This is an execution-focused role for a "thinker, not just a doer" who can manage high-budget campaigns while providing strategic storytelling and performance insights. You will work as an integrated member of the media activation team, primarily focusing on Meta Ads, while supporting additional platforms like TikTok and Snapchat.



Key Responsibilities:



- Campaign Execution: Lead the build, launch, and daily management of paid social programs, with a heavy emphasis on Meta (90% of budget).

- Optimization: Manage account pacing and performance through a mix of manual adjustments and platform automation (e.g., Meta Advantage+).

- Insights & Reporting: Go beyond data extraction to add "color" and storytelling to weekly performance reports, explaining the why behind the numbers.

- Strategic Collaboration: Actively participate in internal campaign brainstorming and "war room" sessions to refine cohesive cross-channel strategies.

- Troubleshooting: Monitor tracking pixels and GA4 events to diagnose issues before performance is impacted.

- Account Management: Simultaneously manage the performance of 3 to 6 individual client accounts.



Tools You Should Know:



- Expertise Required: Meta Ads Manager 
/Instagram).

- Proficiency Required: TikTok Ads Manager and Snapchat Ads Manager.

- Analytics: GA4 and platform-native reporting tools.

- Business Suite: Advanced Microsoft Excel (for data analysis) and PowerPoint (for client-ready decks).

- Collaboration: Microsoft Teams and Outlook.

- Bonus: Familiarity with LinkedIn Ads, Spotify Ads, or Programmatic strategy.



What Success Looks Like:



- Proactive Communication: Flagging performance dips and providing immediate recommendations to account leads.

- Technical Mastery: Flawless campaign launches and accurate budget pacing.

- Team Synergy: Receiving high feedback for being "coachable" and "pleasant to work with" in a lively, outgoing team environment.



Requirements:



- Experience: 5+ years of hands-on experience managing paid social in an agency environment.

- Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills for internal strategy collaboration.

- Attitude: A high degree of coachability and a desire to contribute ideas rather than just taking orders.

- Setup: Reliable high-speed internet, webcam, headset, and a quiet home office environment.

- Commitment: Willingness to work U.S. East Coast hours long-term.



What You Get:



- Stable Role: Long-term, full-time commitment with a U.S. company.

- Support: No direct client-facing pressure initially; ongoing support from the Workspark leadership team.

- Payroll: Bi-monthly payments made via Wise.

- Benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and sick leave (after probation)

title: Office 365 Senior Helpdesk Engineer
description:

????????? The Role
