Please include a shared online CV (Google Drive / Notion / website) and make sure the link works. Applications without this won’t be reviewed.



???? Responsibilities

Provide Level 2 support across Microsoft 365

(Exchange, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, Intune)

Troubleshoot
, MFA, login, and access issues

Manage onboarding, offboarding, and licensing

Handle escalations and see tickets through to resolution

Work closely with clients and communicate clearly



???? What We’re Looking For

3+ years experience in IT support (L2 or higher)

Strong Microsoft 365 troubleshooting skills

Solid understanding of user, device, and access management

Clear, professional communication (written and verbal)

Ability to work independently and take ownership



Nice to have (not required): Power Automate, Power BI, scripting, or exposure to AI tools

title: VIDEO EDITOR (MUST USE ADOBE PREMIERE)
description:
Full-Time Corporate Video Editor - Interviews, Brand & Storytelling



We are a video production agency based in Australia, working with corporate brands, marketing teams, and organisations across Australia and New Zealand.



We are looking for a full-time Video Editor who specialises in corporate content — someone who understands how to craft clean, professional, story-driven videos, not just fast social edits.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants consistency, growth, and to be part of a high-quality production team.



What You’ll Be Editing-->



Interview-style corporate videos

Case studies & testimonials

Brand / company overview videos

Internal communications content



You must be able to produce work at this level (or better):











What Makes a Great Fit (Important)



This is NOT a social media editing role.



We are looking for someone who:



-Understands story structure from interviews (not just cutting clips)

-Can identify and build clear, compelling narratives

-Has a strong eye for clean, minimal, corporate-style motion graphics

-Knows how to edit with restraint, pacing, and professionalism

-Can make people look and sound credible, confident, and polished





Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



4+ years professional video editing experience



Advanced in:

-Adobe Premiere Pro

-Adobe After Effects



Strong experience with:

-Interview editing & story building

-Audio cleanup and dialogue clarity

-Basic colour correction (natural, professional look)

-Excellent English (written and spoken)

-Stable internet + professional working setup (we will test this)



Please DO NOT Apply If:

Your experience is mainly TikTok / reels / 
-style editing

You rely heavily on flashy effects or templates

You cannot confidently edit interview-based content into a strong narrative

Your communication or internet is unreliable





What You’ll Be Responsible For

Turning raw interview footage into clear, structured stories

Selecting the best soundbites and building narrative flow

Adding clean, on-brand motion graphics (titles, lower thirds, etc.)

Ensuring final videos feel professional, polished, and on-message

Working efficiently with our team using clear briefs and feedback



Application Process (STRICT)



To be considered, you MUST complete all steps:



1. Portfolio

Send your best corporate / interview-style work only

(We will not review TikTok-style portfolios)



2. Resume

Include your experience and previous roles



3. Short Answer (2–3 sentences)

Why do you want to work with us?



Applications that do not follow these steps will be ignored.



Role Details

Salary: 50,000 – 70,000 PHP/month (based on experience)

Type: Full-time contract (long-term)

Start Date: ASAP



Timezone: Australia / New Zealand friendly



Final Note



We are building a team focused on quality over quantity.



If you take pride in crafting professional, story-driven content and want to work on meaningful corporate projects — we’d love to hear from you.





*****BONUS STEP*****

Tell us (in 2–3 sentences) how you would approach editing an interview into a compelling story.

title: Outbound Appointment Setter – High Volume Cold Calls
description:
Remote Cold Calling | Philippines | US Time Zone (EST)



Role Summary

We are hiring a sharp, reliable VA to make outbound cold calls using our proven script. Your ONLY job is to book 15-minute discovery calls with service business owners (power washing, window cleaning, HVAC, plumbing, electrical).



We are a US-based service helping local businesses recover missed calls and book more jobs automatically.

We provide the system that automatically captures, qualifies, and books their inbound leads so they stop losing money on missed calls. You simply fill the owner’s discovery calendar so we can close new clients.



What You’ll Do

50–100 dials per day using our exact script

Follow the script structure exactly (natural delivery is expected)

Strictly: Permission ? Problem acknowledgment ? Validation ? Calendar ask

Log everything in GoHighLevel

NO pricing talk, NO demos



Pay Structure 

(Hybrid – Performance + Stability)

$7.00 per hour base pay (paid weekly via Wise/PayPal)

Weeks 1–2 (ramp): $15 per booked discovery call

Week 3+: $25 per discovery call that books AND shows (verified within 48 hrs)

Top performers can earn $1,400+ USD per month (performance-based)

Performance Expectations (after training)

2–4 qualified bookings per 100 dials

0.5–1.5 showed calls per day (steady state)

Minimum 50 dials per day required to remain active



What We Provide

Pre-loaded clean lead lists

Full script + objection handlers

GoHighLevel dialer + recording system

Weekly training & call reviews

Fast weekly payouts

Important Note

This is high-volume cold calling. Expect rejection on most calls.

Requirements (must have)

Strong, clear, neutral English (record a 30-second voice sample reading the script opening — we’ll send it)

Prior sales or call-center experience preferred

Quiet workspace + stable internet

Available during US business hours (Iowa time zone)

Can start immediately



How to Apply (must do all 3)

Record yourself reading the first 30 seconds of our opening script (attach the file).

Answer: “How many dials per day are you comfortable making?”

Attach your last 2 weeks of call metrics (or reply “none yet” if new).

Reply with “I’m ready” + your voice sample and we’ll send the full script and test call instructions within 24 hours.



Strict script adherence — we review every recorded call

Can start immediately

title: Video & Motion Graphics Editor
description:
About Us:

Million Dollar Baby Co. is the parent company behind some of the most beloved nursery and kids' furniture brands including babyletto, daVinci, Namesake, and Nursery Works. We’re known for blending modern design with safety, sustainability, and style—creating beautiful spaces where families grow.



We’re seeking a talented Video & Motion Graphics Editor to help bring our brand stories to life across



What you’ll be doing:



Edit high-quality, on-brand videos for brand campaigns, product launches, digital ads, paid media, and social channels (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Meta)

Design and animate motion graphics for our website, Instagram Reels & TikTok, campaigns, and promotional videos

Collaborate closely with the creative, social, partnerships and brand teams to ideate and execute engaging visual narratives

Organize and manage footage, audio, and design assets for seamless production workflows

Maintain brand consistency across all video and motion projects, while adapting style & tone for each channel or brand

Stay up to date on content trends, editing styles, and platform best practices (especially short-form content)

Occasionally assist in art direction and shoot planning for video-based campaigns

Experience using video asset management software like Dropbox and 

Perform basic audio editing tasks such as noise reduction, level balancing, and syncing dialogue with visuals to ensure high-quality final products

Develop clear, engaging storyboards that visually communicate narrative flow, actions, and scene composition, ensuring alignment with creative direction and project goals.

What You Bring to Bring to Table:



5+ years of experience in video editing and motion graphics, ideally in a consumer or lifestyle brand setting

Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

Experience editing for social-first formats (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Meta ads)

Ability to work within brand guidelines while pushing creative boundaries

Excellent storytelling instincts and pacing for both short- and long-form video

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

Experience with 3D, , and sound design

Bonus Points If You



Have a great eye for interior design, kids’ lifestyle aesthetics, or fashion-forward visual storytelling

Have experience with product or brand storytelling across DTC and retail

Have worked with parenting, baby, or Gen Z and millennial-focused brands

Why You'll Love Working With Us



Join a creative, high-impact team shaping the future of modern parenting design

Collaborate on trend-forward campaigns seen across global retailers

Competitive salary, benefits, and growth opportunities in a design-led environment



Interested applicants, please your full cv on the url below:
